authors_text: Chuyu Zhang,Chuanyang Hu,Ruijie Xu,Zhitong Gao,Qian He,Xuming He
title: Mutual Information-guided Knowledge Transfer for Novel Class Discovery
title_zh: 互信息引导的新类发现知识转移
comment: The derivation of Mutual Information in the manuscript is wrong
comments: The derivation of Mutual Information in the manuscript is wrong
abstract: We tackle the novel class discovery problem, aiming to discover novel classes in unlabeled data based on labeled data from seen classes. The main challenge is to transfer knowledge contained in the seen classes to unseen ones. Previous methods mostly transfer knowledge through sharing representation space or joint label space. However, they tend to neglect the class relation between seen and unseen categories, and thus the learned representations are less effective for clustering unseen classes. In this paper, we propose a principle and general method to transfer semantic knowledge between seen and unseen classes. Our insight is to utilize mutual information to measure the relation between seen classes and unseen classes in a restricted label space and maximizing mutual information promotes transferring semantic knowledge. To validate the effectiveness and generalization of our method, we conduct extensive experiments both on novel class discovery and general novel class discovery settings. Our results show that the proposed method outperforms previous SOTA by a significant margin on several benchmarks.
summary: We tackle the novel class discovery problem, aiming to discover novel classes in unlabeled data based on labeled data from seen classes. The main challenge is to transfer knowledge contained in the seen classes to unseen ones. Previous methods mostly transfer knowledge through sharing representation space or joint label space. However, they tend to neglect the class relation between seen and unseen categories, and thus the learned representations are less effective for clustering unseen classes. In this paper, we propose a principle and general method to transfer semantic knowledge between seen and unseen classes. Our insight is to utilize mutual information to measure the relation between seen classes and unseen classes in a restricted label space and maximizing mutual information promotes transferring semantic knowledge. To validate the effectiveness and generalization of our method, we conduct extensive experiments both on novel class discovery and general novel class discovery settings. Our results show that the proposed method outperforms previous SOTA by a significant margin on several benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 我们解决新类发现问题，旨在根据已见类的标记数据在未标记数据中发现新类。主要的挑战是将可见类中包含的知识转移到看不见的类中。以前的方法主要通过共享表示空间或联合标签空间来传递知识。然而，他们往往忽略可见类别和不可见类别之间的类关系，因此学习到的表示对于聚类不可见类别的效果较差。在本文中，我们提出了一种在可见类和不可见类之间传递语义知识的原则和通用方法。我们的见解是利用互信息来测量受限标签空间中可见类和未见类之间的关系，并且最大化互信息促进语义知识的传递。为了验证我们方法的有效性和泛化性，我们对新类发现和一般新类发现设置进行了广泛的实验。我们的结果表明，所提出的方法在多个基准测试中明显优于之前的 SOTA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于互信息引导的知识迁移方法，用于在无标签数据中发现新类别。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过共享表示空间或联合标签空间迁移知识，但忽视了已见类与未见类之间的类别关系，导致表示效果不佳。
AI.method: 利用互信息衡量受限标签空间中已见类与未见类的关系，通过最大化互信息促进语义知识迁移。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，该方法在新颖类别发现任务中显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 互信息引导的知识迁移方法能有效捕捉类别间语义关系，提升未见类别的聚类性能。

authors_text: Byeong-Yun Ko,Hyeonuk Nam,Seong-Hu Kim,Deokki Min,Seung-Deok Choi,Yong-Hwa Park
title: Data Augmentation and Squeeze-and-Excitation Network on Multiple Dimension for Sound Event Localization and Detection in Real Scenes
title_zh: 多维数据增强和挤压激励网络用于真实场景中的声音事件定位和检测
comment: Technical Report submitted for DCASE2022 Challenge Task3
comments: Technical Report submitted for DCASE2022 Challenge Task3
abstract: Performance of sound event localization and detection (SELD) in real scenes is limited by small size of SELD dataset, due to difficulty in obtaining sufficient amount of realistic multi-channel audio data recordings with accurate label. We used two main strategies to solve problems arising from the small real SELD dataset. First, we applied various data augmentation methods on all data dimensions: channel, frequency and time. We also propose original data augmentation method named Moderate Mixup in order to simulate situations where noise floor or interfering events exist. Second, we applied Squeeze-and-Excitation block on channel and frequency dimensions to efficiently extract feature characteristics. Result of our trained models on the STARSS22 test dataset achieved the best ER, F1, LE, and LR of 0.53, 49.8%, 16.0deg., and 56.2% respectively.
summary: Performance of sound event localization and detection (SELD) in real scenes is limited by small size of SELD dataset, due to difficulty in obtaining sufficient amount of realistic multi-channel audio data recordings with accurate label. We used two main strategies to solve problems arising from the small real SELD dataset. First, we applied various data augmentation methods on all data dimensions: channel, frequency and time. We also propose original data augmentation method named Moderate Mixup in order to simulate situations where noise floor or interfering events exist. Second, we applied Squeeze-and-Excitation block on channel and frequency dimensions to efficiently extract feature characteristics. Result of our trained models on the STARSS22 test dataset achieved the best ER, F1, LE, and LR of 0.53, 49.8%, 16.0deg., and 56.2% respectively.
abstract_zh: Performance of sound event localization and detection (SELD) in real scenes is limited by small size of SELD dataset, due to difficulty in obtaining sufficient amount of realistic multi-channel audio data recordings with accurate label.我们使用两种主要策略来解决小型真实 SELD 数据集产生的问题。首先，我们在所有数据维度上应用了各种数据增强方法：通道、频率和时间。 We also propose original data augmentation method named Moderate Mixup in order to simulate situations where noise floor or interfering events exist.其次，我们在通道和频率维度上应用挤压和激励块来有效地提取特征特征。我们在 STARSS22 测试数据集上训练的模型结果取得了最佳 ER、F1、LE 和 LR，分别为 0.53、49.8%、16.0deg. 和 56.2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合数据增强与Squeeze-and-Excitation网络，提升真实场景中声学事件定位与检测（SELD）的性能。
AI.motivation: 真实场景下的SELD性能受限于数据集规模较小，难以获取足够多的多通道真实音频数据及精确标签。
AI.method: 在通道、频率和时间维度应用多种数据增强方法，并提出Moderate Mixup模拟噪声与干扰场景；在通道和频率维度引入Squeeze-and-Excitation模块以增强特征提取能力。
AI.result: 在STARSS22测试数据集上，模型达到最佳ER（0.53）、F1（49.8%）、LE（16.0°）和LR（56.2%）指标。
AI.conclusion: 多维度数据增强与Squeeze-and-Excitation网络结合有效提升了真实场景下SELD任务的性能。

authors_text: Xin-Yang Zheng,Yang Liu,Peng-Shuai Wang,Xin Tong
title: SDF-StyleGAN: Implicit SDF-Based StyleGAN for 3D Shape Generation
title_zh: SDF-StyleGAN：用于 3D 形状生成的隐式基于 SDF 的 StyleGAN
abstract: We present a StyleGAN2-based deep learning approach for 3D shape generation, called SDF-StyleGAN, with the aim of reducing visual and geometric dissimilarity between generated shapes and a shape collection. We extend StyleGAN2 to 3D generation and utilize the implicit signed distance function (SDF) as the 3D shape representation, and introduce two novel global and local shape discriminators that distinguish real and fake SDF values and gradients to significantly improve shape geometry and visual quality. We further complement the evaluation metrics of 3D generative models with the shading-image-based Fréchet inception distance (FID) scores to better assess visual quality and shape distribution of the generated shapes. Experiments on shape generation demonstrate the superior performance of SDF-StyleGAN over the state-of-the-art. We further demonstrate the efficacy of SDF-StyleGAN in various tasks based on GAN inversion, including shape reconstruction, shape completion from partial point clouds, single-view image-based shape generation, and shape style editing. Extensive ablation studies justify the efficacy of our framework design. Our code and trained models are available at https://github.com/Zhengxinyang/SDF-StyleGAN.
summary: We present a StyleGAN2-based deep learning approach for 3D shape generation, called SDF-StyleGAN, with the aim of reducing visual and geometric dissimilarity between generated shapes and a shape collection. We extend StyleGAN2 to 3D generation and utilize the implicit signed distance function (SDF) as the 3D shape representation, and introduce two novel global and local shape discriminators that distinguish real and fake SDF values and gradients to significantly improve shape geometry and visual quality. We further complement the evaluation metrics of 3D generative models with the shading-image-based Fréchet inception distance (FID) scores to better assess visual quality and shape distribution of the generated shapes. Experiments on shape generation demonstrate the superior performance of SDF-StyleGAN over the state-of-the-art. We further demonstrate the efficacy of SDF-StyleGAN in various tasks based on GAN inversion, including shape reconstruction, shape completion from partial point clouds, single-view image-based shape generation, and shape style editing. Extensive ablation studies justify the efficacy of our framework design. Our code and trained models are available at https://github.com/Zhengxinyang/SDF-StyleGAN.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于 StyleGAN2 的 3D 形状生成深度学习方法，称为 SDF-StyleGAN，旨在减少生成的形状和形状集合之间的视觉和几何差异。我们将 StyleGAN2 扩展到 3D 生成，并利用隐式符号距离函数 (SDF) 作为 3D 形状表示，并引入两种新颖的全局和局部形状鉴别器，用于区分真假 SDF 值和梯度，以显着改善形状几何和视觉质量。我们利用基于着色图像的 Fréchet 起始距离 (FID) 分数进一步补充 3D 生成模型的评估指标，以更好地评估生成形状的视觉质量和形状分布。形状生成实验证明了 SDF-StyleGAN 的性能优于最先进的技术。我们进一步证明了 SDF-StyleGAN 在基于 GAN 反演的各种任务中的功效，包括形状重建、部分点云的形状补全、基于单视图图像的形状生成和形状样式编辑。广泛的消融研究证明了我们框架设计的有效性。我们的代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/Zhengxinyang/SDF-StyleGAN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于隐式SDF的StyleGAN2方法（SDF-StyleGAN），用于生成高质量的3D形状。
AI.motivation: 现有3D生成模型在几何和视觉质量上存在不足，需减少生成形状与真实形状集合间的差异。
AI.method: 扩展StyleGAN2至3D生成，采用隐式SDF表示形状，并引入全局和局部判别器区分真实与虚假SDF值及梯度，结合基于阴影图像的FID指标评估生成效果。
AI.result: 实验表明SDF-StyleGAN在形状生成、重建、补全及风格编辑等任务中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SDF-StyleGAN通过SDF表示与改进判别机制，有效提升了3D形状生成的质量与多样性。

We further demonstrate the efficacy of SDF-StyleGAN in various tasks based on GAN inversion, including shape reconstruction, shape completion from partial point clouds, single-view image-based shape generation, and shape style editing. Extensive ablation studies justify the efficacy of our framework design. Our code and trained models are available at https://github.com/Zhengxinyang/SDF-StyleGAN. 我们提出了一种基于 StyleGAN2 的 3D 形状生成深度学习方法，称为 SDF-StyleGAN，旨在减少生成的形状和形状集合之间的视觉和几何差异。我们将 StyleGAN2 扩展到 3D 生成，并利用隐式符号距离函数 (SDF) 作为 3D 形状表示，并引入两种新颖的全局和局部形状鉴别器，用于区分真假 SDF 值和梯度，以显着改善形状几何和视觉质量。我们利用基于着色图像的 Fréchet 起始距离 (FID) 分数进一步补充 3D 生成模型的评估指标，以更好地评估生成形状的视觉质量和形状分布。形状生成实验证明了 SDF-StyleGAN 的性能优于最先进的技术。我们进一步证明了 SDF-StyleGAN 在基于 GAN 反演的各种任务中的功效，包括形状重建、部分点云的形状补全、基于单视图图像的形状生成和形状样式编辑。广泛的消融研究证明了我们框架设计的有效性。我们的代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/Zhengxinyang/SDF-StyleGAN 获取。 本文提出基于隐式SDF的StyleGAN2方法（SDF-StyleGAN），用于生成高质量的3D形状。 Xin-Yang Zheng,Yang Liu,Peng-Shuai Wang,Xin Tong cs.CV

authors_text: Xia Jiang,Jian Zhang,Xiaoyu Shi,Jian Cheng
title: Learning the policy for mixed electric platoon control of automated and human-driven vehicles at signalized intersection: a random search approach
title_zh: 学习信号交叉口自动驾驶和人工驾驶车辆混合电动排控制的策略：随机搜索方法
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems (2023)
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems (2023)
abstract: The upgrading and updating of vehicles have accelerated in the past decades. Out of the need for environmental friendliness and intelligence, electric vehicles (EVs) and connected and automated vehicles (CAVs) have become new components of transportation systems. This paper develops a reinforcement learning framework to implement adaptive control for an electric platoon composed of CAVs and human-driven vehicles (HDVs) at a signalized intersection. Firstly, a Markov Decision Process (MDP) model is proposed to describe the decision process of the mixed platoon. Novel state representation and reward function are designed for the model to consider the behavior of the whole platoon. Secondly, in order to deal with the delayed reward, an Augmented Random Search (ARS) algorithm is proposed. The control policy learned by the agent can guide the longitudinal motion of the CAV, which serves as the leader of the platoon. Finally, a series of simulations are carried out in simulation suite SUMO. Compared with several state-of-the-art (SOTA) reinforcement learning approaches, the proposed method can obtain a higher reward. Meanwhile, the simulation results demonstrate the effectiveness of the delay reward, which is designed to outperform distributed reward mechanism} Compared with normal car-following behavior, the sensitivity analysis reveals that the energy can be saved to different extends (39.27%-82.51%) by adjusting the relative importance of the optimization goal. On the premise that travel delay is not sacrificed, the proposed control method can save up to 53.64% electric energy.

abstract_zh: 过去几十年来，车辆的升级和更新加速。 Out of the need for environmental friendliness and intelligence, electric vehicles (EVs) and connected and automated vehicles (CAVs) have become new components of transportation systems. This paper develops a reinforcement learning framework to implement adaptive control for an electric platoon composed of CAVs and human-driven vehicles (HDVs) at a signalized intersection.首先，提出马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）模型来描述混合排的决策过程。模型设计了新颖的状态表示和奖励函数来考虑整个排的行为。其次，为了处理延迟奖励，提出了增强随机搜索（ARS）算法。智能体学习到的控制策略可以指导作为排长的 CAV 的纵向运动。最后在SUMO仿真套件中进行了一系列仿真。与几种最先进的（SOTA）强化学习方法相比，所提出的方法可以获得更高的奖励。 Meanwhile, the simulation results demonstrate the effectiveness of the delay reward, which is designed to outperform distributed reward mechanism} Compared with normal car-following behavior, the sensitivity analysis reveals that the energy can be saved to different extends (39.27%-82.51%) by adjusting the relative importance of the optimization goal.在不牺牲行程延误的前提下，所提出的控制方法可节省高达53.64%的电能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的混合电动车队控制框架，通过增强随机搜索算法优化信号交叉口的自动化和人工驾驶车辆协同控制。
AI.motivation: 随着电动汽车和自动驾驶车辆的普及，如何在信号交叉口实现混合车队的高效节能控制成为交通系统的重要挑战。
AI.method: 构建马尔可夫决策过程模型，设计新型状态表示与奖励函数，并提出增强随机搜索算法以解决延迟奖励问题，通过SUMO仿真验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 相比先进强化学习方法，所提方法奖励值更高，能量消耗可降低39.27%-82.51%，在不增加行程延误前提下最高节能53.64%。
AI.conclusion: 该控制方法有效平衡了混合车队的能源效率与交通延误，为智能交通系统提供了可行的优化方案。

authors_text: Bo Yan,Leilei Cao,Fengliang Qi,Hongbin Wang
title: Bilateral Network with Channel Splitting Network and Transformer for Thermal Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 具有通道分裂网络和变压器的双边网络，用于热图像超分辨率
comment: The second place solution for CVPR2022 PBVS-TISR challenge
comments: The second place solution for CVPR2022 PBVS-TISR challenge
abstract: In recent years, the Thermal Image Super-Resolution (TISR) problem has become an attractive research topic. TISR would been used in a wide range of fields, including military, medical, agricultural and animal ecology. Due to the success of PBVS-2020 and PBVS-2021 workshop challenge, the result of TISR keeps improving and attracts more researchers to sign up for PBVS-2022 challenge. In this paper, we will introduce the technical details of our submission to PBVS-2022 challenge designing a Bilateral Network with Channel Splitting Network and Transformer(BN-CSNT) to tackle the TISR problem. Firstly, we designed a context branch based on channel splitting network with transformer to obtain sufficient context information. Secondly, we designed a spatial branch with shallow transformer to extract low level features which can preserve the spatial information. Finally, for the context branch in order to fuse the features from channel splitting network and transformer, we proposed an attention refinement module, and then features from context branch and spatial branch are fused by proposed feature fusion module. The proposed method can achieve PSNR=33.64, SSIM=0.9263 for x4 and PSNR=21.08, SSIM=0.7803 for x2 in the PBVS-2022 challenge test dataset.

TISR would been used in a wide range of fields, including military, medical, agricultural and animal ecology. Due to the success of PBVS-2020 and PBVS-2021 workshop challenge, the result of TISR keeps improving and attracts more researchers to sign up for PBVS-2022 challenge. In this paper, we will introduce the technical details of our submission to PBVS-2022 challenge designing a Bilateral Network with Channel Splitting Network and Transformer(BN-CSNT) to tackle the TISR problem. Firstly, we designed a context branch based on channel splitting network with transformer to obtain sufficient context information. Secondly, we designed a spatial branch with shallow transformer to extract low level features which can preserve the spatial information. Finally, for the context branch in order to fuse the features from channel splitting network and transformer, we proposed an attention refinement module, and then features from context branch and spatial branch are fused by proposed feature fusion module. The proposed method can achieve PSNR=33.64, SSIM=0.9263 for x4 and PSNR=21.08, SSIM=0.7803 for x2 in the PBVS-2022 challenge test dataset.
abstract_zh: 近年来，热图像超分辨率（TISR）问题已成为一个有吸引力的研究课题。 TISR将应用于广泛的领域，包括军事、医疗、农业和动物生态学。由于PBVS-2020和PBVS-2021工作坊挑战赛的成功，TISR的成绩不断提高，吸引了更多的研究人员报名参加PBVS-2022挑战赛。在本文中，我们将介绍我们提交 PBVS-2022 挑战赛的技术细节，设计具有通道分裂网络和变压器的双边网络（BN-CSNT）来解决 TISR 问题。首先，我们设计了一个基于带有变压器的通道分裂网络的上下文分支，以获得足够的上下文信息。其次，我们设计了一个带有浅层变压器的空间分支来提取可以保留空间信息的低级特征。最后，对于上下文分支，为了融合来自通道分割网络和变压器的特征，我们提出了一个注意细化模块，然后由所提出的特征融合模块融合来自上下文分支和空间分支的特征。该方法在PBVS-2022挑战测试数据集中可以实现x4的PSNR=33.64、SSIM=0.9263和x2的PSNR=21.08、SSIM=0.7803。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合通道分割网络和Transformer的双边网络（BN-CSNT），用于解决热图像超分辨率（TISR）问题。
AI.motivation: 热图像超分辨率在军事、医疗等领域具有广泛应用，但现有方法在特征提取和信息融合方面仍存在挑战，需进一步提升重建质量。
AI.method: 设计包含通道分割网络与Transformer的上下文分支以获取全局语义信息，结合浅层Transformer的空间分支提取局部特征，并通过注意力细化模块与特征融合模块整合多尺度信息。
AI.result: 在PBVS-2022测试数据集上，x4超分结果达到PSNR=33.64、SSIM=0.9263，x2超分结果为PSNR=21.08、SSIM=0.7803。
AI.conclusion: BN-CSNT通过双分支结构与模块化设计有效提升了热图像超分辨率性能，验证了方法在TISR任务中的竞争力。

Secondly, we designed a spatial branch with shallow transformer to extract low level features which can preserve the spatial information. The proposed method can achieve PSNR=33.64, SSIM=0.9263 for x4 and PSNR=21.08, SSIM=0.7803 for x2 in the PBVS-2022 challenge test dataset. 近年来，热图像超分辨率（TISR）问题已成为一个有吸引力的研究课题。 TISR将应用于广泛的领域，包括军事、医疗、农业和动物生态学。由于PBVS-2020和PBVS-2021工作坊挑战赛的成功，TISR的成绩不断提高，吸引了更多的研究人员报名参加PBVS-2022挑战赛。在本文中，我们将介绍我们提交 PBVS-2022 挑战赛的技术细节，设计具有通道分裂网络和变压器的双边网络（BN-CSNT）来解决 TISR 问题。首先，我们设计了一个基于带有变压器的通道分裂网络的上下文分支，以获得足够的上下文信息。其次，我们设计了一个带有浅层变压器的空间分支来提取可以保留空间信息的低级特征。最后，对于上下文分支，为了融合来自通道分割网络和变压器的特征，我们提出了一个注意细化模块，然后由所提出的特征融合模块融合来自上下文分支和空间分支的特征。该方法在PBVS-2022挑战测试数据集中可以实现x4的PSNR=33.64、SSIM=0.9263和x2的PSNR=21.08、SSIM=0.7803。 本文提出一种结合通道分割网络和Transformer的双边网络（BN-CSNT），用于解决热图像超分辨率（TISR）问题。 Bo Yan,Leilei Cao,Fengliang Qi,Hongbin Wang cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Jiajun Deng,Xurong Xie,Tianzi Wang,Mingyu Cui,Boyang Xue,Zengrui Jin,Mengzhe Geng,Guinan Li,Xunying Liu,Helen Meng
title: Confidence Score Based Conformer Speaker Adaptation for Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于语音识别的基于置信度得分的一致性说话者自适应
comment: It's accepted to INTERSPEECH 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.11596
comments: It's accepted to INTERSPEECH 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.11596
abstract: A key challenge for automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems is to model the speaker level variability. In this paper, compact speaker dependent learning hidden unit contributions (LHUC) are used to facilitate both speaker adaptive training (SAT) and test time unsupervised speaker adaptation for state-of-the-art Conformer based end-to-end ASR systems. The sensitivity during adaptation to supervision error rate is reduced using confidence score based selection of the more "trustworthy" subset of speaker specific data. A confidence estimation module is used to smooth the over-confident Conformer decoder output probabilities before serving as confidence scores. The increased data sparsity due to speaker level data selection is addressed using Bayesian estimation of LHUC parameters. Experiments on the 300-hour Switchboard corpus suggest that the proposed LHUC-SAT Conformer with confidence score based test time unsupervised adaptation outperformed the baseline speaker independent and i-vector adapted Conformer systems by up to 1.0%, 1.0%, and 1.2% absolute (9.0%, 7.9%, and 8.9% relative) word error rate (WER) reductions on the NIST Hub5'00, RT02, and RT03 evaluation sets respectively. Consistent performance improvements were retained after external Transformer and LSTM language models were used for rescoring.
summary: A key challenge for automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems is to model the speaker level variability. In this paper, compact speaker dependent learning hidden unit contributions (LHUC) are used to facilitate both speaker adaptive training (SAT) and test time unsupervised speaker adaptation for state-of-the-art Conformer based end-to-end ASR systems. The sensitivity during adaptation to supervision error rate is reduced using confidence score based selection of the more "trustworthy" subset of speaker specific data. A confidence estimation module is used to smooth the over-confident Conformer decoder output probabilities before serving as confidence scores. The increased data sparsity due to speaker level data selection is addressed using Bayesian estimation of LHUC parameters. Experiments on the 300-hour Switchboard corpus suggest that the proposed LHUC-SAT Conformer with confidence score based test time unsupervised adaptation outperformed the baseline speaker independent and i-vector adapted Conformer systems by up to 1.0%, 1.0%, and 1.2% absolute (9.0%, 7.9%, and 8.9% relative) word error rate (WER) reductions on the NIST Hub5'00, RT02, and RT03 evaluation sets respectively. Consistent performance improvements were retained after external Transformer and LSTM language models were used for rescoring.
abstract_zh: 自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统的一个关键挑战是对说话者音量变化进行建模。 In this paper, compact speaker dependent learning hidden unit contributions (LHUC) are used to facilitate both speaker adaptive training (SAT) and test time unsupervised speaker adaptation for state-of-the-art Conformer based end-to-end ASR systems. The sensitivity during adaptation to supervision error rate is reduced using confidence score based selection of the more "trustworthy" subset of speaker specific data.置信度估计模块用于在充当置信度分数之前平滑过度自信的 Conformer 解码器输出概率。使用 LHUC 参数的贝叶斯估计解决了由于说话者级别数据选择而导致的数据稀疏性增加的问题。 Experiments on the 300-hour Switchboard corpus suggest that the proposed LHUC-SAT Conformer with confidence score based test time unsupervised adaptation outperformed the baseline speaker independent and i-vector adapted Conformer systems by up to 1.0%, 1.0%, and 1.2% absolute (9.0%, 7.9%, and 8.9% relative) word error rate (WER) reductions on the NIST Hub5'00, RT02, and RT03 evaluation sets respectively.使用外部 Transformer 和 LSTM 语言模型进行重新评分后，保持了一致的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于置信度分数的Conformer说话人自适应方法，以改进语音识别系统的说话人相关性建模。
AI.motivation: 现有语音识别系统在处理说话人差异性时存在挑战，需提升自适应训练与测试阶段的鲁棒性，同时减少监督误差率敏感性和数据稀疏性影响。
AI.method: 采用紧凑型说话人依赖LHUC模块，结合置信度分数筛选可靠数据子集，并通过贝叶斯估计优化LHUC参数，以实现端到端Conformer系统的说话人自适应。
AI.result: 在Switchboard语料库实验中，所提方法相较基线系统在NIST Hub5'00、RT02、RT03数据集上分别降低1.0%、1.0%、1.2%绝对词错率（相对降幅9.0%、7.9%、8.9%），且在外部语言模型重打分后仍保持性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 置信度驱动的LHUC-SAT方法有效缓解了数据稀疏性问题，验证了基于置信度的说话人自适应策略在提升语音识别鲁棒性方面的有效性。

authors_text: Matyáš Boháček,Hany Farid
title: Protecting President Zelenskyy against Deep Fakes
title_zh: 保护泽连斯基总统免遭深度造假
abstract: The 2022 Russian invasion of Ukraine is being fought on two fronts: a brutal ground war and a duplicitous disinformation campaign designed to conceal and justify Russia's actions. This campaign includes at least one example of a deep-fake video purportedly showing Ukrainian President Zelenskyy admitting defeat and surrendering. In anticipation of future attacks of this form, we describe a facial and gestural behavioral model that captures distinctive characteristics of Zelenskyy's speaking style. Trained on over eight hours of authentic video from four different settings, we show that this behavioral model can distinguish Zelenskyy from deep-fake imposters.This model can play an important role -- particularly during the fog of war -- in distinguishing the real from the fake.
summary: The 2022 Russian invasion of Ukraine is being fought on two fronts: a brutal ground war and a duplicitous disinformation campaign designed to conceal and justify Russia's actions. This campaign includes at least one example of a deep-fake video purportedly showing Ukrainian President Zelenskyy admitting defeat and surrendering. In anticipation of future attacks of this form, we describe a facial and gestural behavioral model that captures distinctive characteristics of Zelenskyy's speaking style. Trained on over eight hours of authentic video from four different settings, we show that this behavioral model can distinguish Zelenskyy from deep-fake imposters.This model can play an important role -- particularly during the fog of war -- in distinguishing the real from the fake.
abstract_zh: 2022 年俄罗斯对乌克兰的入侵是在两条战线上进行的：残酷的地面战争和旨在掩盖俄罗斯行动并为其辩护的欺骗性虚假信息活动。该活动至少包含一个深度造假视频的例子，据称显示乌克兰总统泽连斯基承认失败并投降。考虑到未来这种形式的攻击，我们描述了一种面部和手势行为模型，该模型捕捉了泽连斯基讲话风格的独特特征。通过对来自四种不同环境的超过八小时的真实视频进行训练，我们证明这种行为模型可以区分泽连斯基和深造的冒名顶替者。该模型可以在区分真假方面发挥重要作用，尤其是在战争迷雾期间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面部和手势行为模型，用于识别针对乌克兰总统泽连斯基的深度伪造视频。
AI.motivation: 俄罗斯在入侵乌克兰期间利用深度伪造视频进行信息战，需开发技术手段以区分真实与伪造内容。
AI.method: 基于八小时真实视频数据训练模型，捕捉泽连斯基独特的面部表情和手势行为特征。
AI.result: 该模型能有效区分真实视频与深度伪造视频，尤其在战争信息混乱时期具有实用价值。
AI.conclusion: 行为特征分析模型可作为对抗深度伪造的重要工具，帮助公众在信息战中识别虚假内容。

authors_text: Chen Cheng,Hilal Asi,John Duchi
title: How many labelers do you have? A closer look at gold-standard labels
title_zh: 您有多少台贴标机？仔细观察黄金标准标签
abstract: The construction of most supervised learning datasets revolves around collecting multiple labels for each instance, then aggregating the labels to form a type of "gold-standard". We question the wisdom of this pipeline by developing a (stylized) theoretical model of this process and analyzing its statistical consequences, showing how access to non-aggregated label information can make training well-calibrated models more feasible than it is with gold-standard labels. The entire story, however, is subtle, and the contrasts between aggregated and fuller label information depend on the particulars of the problem, where estimators that use aggregated information exhibit robust but slower rates of convergence, while estimators that can effectively leverage all labels converge more quickly if they have fidelity to (or can learn) the true labeling process. The theory makes several predictions for real-world datasets, including when non-aggregate labels should improve learning performance, which we test to corroborate the validity of our predictions.
summary: The construction of most supervised learning datasets revolves around collecting multiple labels for each instance, then aggregating the labels to form a type of "gold-standard". We question the wisdom of this pipeline by developing a (stylized) theoretical model of this process and analyzing its statistical consequences, showing how access to non-aggregated label information can make training well-calibrated models more feasible than it is with gold-standard labels. The entire story, however, is subtle, and the contrasts between aggregated and fuller label information depend on the particulars of the problem, where estimators that use aggregated information exhibit robust but slower rates of convergence, while estimators that can effectively leverage all labels converge more quickly if they have fidelity to (or can learn) the true labeling process. The theory makes several predictions for real-world datasets, including when non-aggregate labels should improve learning performance, which we test to corroborate the validity of our predictions.
abstract_zh: 大多数监督学习数据集的构建都是围绕为每个实例收集多个标签，然后聚合标签以形成一种“黄金标准”。我们通过开发该过程的（程式化）理论模型并分析其统计结果来质疑该管道的智慧，展示访问非聚合标签信息如何使训练经过良好校准的模型比使用黄金标准标签更可行。然而，整个故事是微妙的，聚合和更完整的标签信息之间的对比取决于问题的细节，其中使用聚合信息的估计器表现出稳健但较慢的收敛速度，而可以有效利用所有标签的估计器如果忠实于（或可以学习）真实的标签过程，则可以更快地收敛。该理论对现实世界的数据集做出了一些预测，包括非聚合标签何时应该提高学习性能，我们对其进行测试以证实我们预测的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在监督学习数据集中，使用非聚合标签而非传统黄金标准标签对模型训练的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过聚合多个标注者标签形成黄金标准，但作者质疑这一流程的有效性，认为非聚合标签可能提供更丰富的信息以提升模型校准能力。
AI.method: 构建理论模型分析聚合与非聚合标签的统计影响，并通过实证检验预测非聚合标签在实际数据集中的效果。
AI.result: 非聚合标签在特定条件下能提升模型性能，但效果依赖于问题特性；聚合方法收敛较慢但更稳健，而非聚合方法若能准确模拟标注过程则收敛更快。
AI.conclusion: 标签聚合与非聚合的选择需结合问题特性，有效利用全部标签信息可提升模型表现，但需确保模型对真实标注过程的拟合能力。

search_text: How many labelers do you have? A closer look at gold-standard labels 您有多少台贴标机？仔细观察黄金标准标签 The construction of most supervised learning datasets revolves around collecting multiple labels for each instance, then aggregating the labels to form a type of "gold-standard". We question the wisdom of this pipeline by developing a (stylized) theoretical model of this process and analyzing its statistical consequences, showing how access to non-aggregated label information can make training well-calibrated models more feasible than it is with gold-standard labels. The entire story, however, is subtle, and the contrasts between aggregated and fuller label information depend on the particulars of the problem, where estimators that use aggregated information exhibit robust but slower rates of convergence, while estimators that can effectively leverage all labels converge more quickly if they have fidelity to (or can learn) the true labeling process. The theory makes several predictions for real-world datasets, including when non-aggregate labels should improve learning performance, which we test to corroborate the validity of our predictions. 大多数监督学习数据集的构建都是围绕为每个实例收集多个标签，然后聚合标签以形成一种“黄金标准”。我们通过开发该过程的（程式化）理论模型并分析其统计结果来质疑该管道的智慧，展示访问非聚合标签信息如何使训练经过良好校准的模型比使用黄金标准标签更可行。然而，整个故事是微妙的，聚合和更完整的标签信息之间的对比取决于问题的细节，其中使用聚合信息的估计器表现出稳健但较慢的收敛速度，而可以有效利用所有标签的估计器如果忠实于（或可以学习）真实的标签过程，则可以更快地收敛。该理论对现实世界的数据集做出了一些预测，包括非聚合标签何时应该提高学习性能，我们对其进行测试以证实我们预测的有效性。 本文探讨了在监督学习数据集中，使用非聚合标签而非传统黄金标准标签对模型训练的影响。 Chen Cheng,Hilal Asi,John Duchi math.ST,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Kentaro Mitsui,Tianyu Zhao,Kei Sawada,Yukiya Hono,Yoshihiko Nankaku,Keiichi Tokuda
title: End-to-End Text-to-Speech Based on Latent Representation of Speaking Styles Using Spontaneous Dialogue
title_zh: 基于使用自发对话的说话风格潜在表示的端到端文本到语音
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, accepted for INTERSPEECH 2022. Audio samples: https://rinnakk.github.io/research/publications/DialogueTTS/
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures, accepted for INTERSPEECH 2022. Audio samples: https://rinnakk.github.io/research/publications/DialogueTTS/
abstract: The recent text-to-speech (TTS) has achieved quality comparable to that of humans; however, its application in spoken dialogue has not been widely studied. This study aims to realize a TTS that closely resembles human dialogue. First, we record and transcribe actual spontaneous dialogues. Then, the proposed dialogue TTS is trained in two stages: first stage, variational autoencoder (VAE)-VITS or Gaussian mixture variational autoencoder (GMVAE)-VITS is trained, which introduces an utterance-level latent variable into variational inference with adversarial learning for end-to-end text-to-speech (VITS), a recently proposed end-to-end TTS model. A style encoder that extracts a latent speaking style representation from speech is trained jointly with TTS. In the second stage, a style predictor is trained to predict the speaking style to be synthesized from dialogue history. During inference, by passing the speaking style representation predicted by the style predictor to VAE/GMVAE-VITS, speech can be synthesized in a style appropriate to the context of the dialogue. Subjective evaluation results demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the original VITS in terms of dialogue-level naturalness.
summary: The recent text-to-speech (TTS) has achieved quality comparable to that of humans; however, its application in spoken dialogue has not been widely studied. This study aims to realize a TTS that closely resembles human dialogue. First, we record and transcribe actual spontaneous dialogues. Then, the proposed dialogue TTS is trained in two stages: first stage, variational autoencoder (VAE)-VITS or Gaussian mixture variational autoencoder (GMVAE)-VITS is trained, which introduces an utterance-level latent variable into variational inference with adversarial learning for end-to-end text-to-speech (VITS), a recently proposed end-to-end TTS model. A style encoder that extracts a latent speaking style representation from speech is trained jointly with TTS. In the second stage, a style predictor is trained to predict the speaking style to be synthesized from dialogue history. During inference, by passing the speaking style representation predicted by the style predictor to VAE/GMVAE-VITS, speech can be synthesized in a style appropriate to the context of the dialogue. Subjective evaluation results demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the original VITS in terms of dialogue-level naturalness.
abstract_zh: 最近的文本转语音（TTS）已经达到了与人类相当的质量；然而，其在口语对话中的应用尚未得到广泛研究。本研究旨在实现与人类对话非常相似的 TTS。首先，我们记录并转录实际的自发对话。然后，所提出的对话 TTS 分两个阶段进行训练：第一阶段，训练变分自动编码器（VAE）-VITS 或高斯混合变分自动编码器（GMVAE）-VITS，将话语级潜在变量引入到端到端文本到语音（VITS）的对抗性学习的变分推理中，这是最近提出的端到端 TTS 模型。从语音中提取潜在说话风格表示的风格编码器与 TTS 联合训练。在第二阶段，训练风格预测器来预测从对话历史中合成的说话风格。在推理过程中，通过将风格预测器预测的说话风格表示传递给 VAE/GMVAE-VITS，可以以适合对话上下文的风格合成语音。主观评估结果表明，该方法在对话级自然度方面优于原始 VITS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自发对话数据和说话风格潜在表示的端到端文本到语音合成方法，旨在生成更贴近人类对话的自然语音。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到语音系统在对话场景中的应用研究不足，难以生成符合对话上下文语境的自然语音。
AI.method: 分两阶段训练模型：第一阶段采用VAE/GMVAE-VITS框架引入话语级潜在变量并训练风格编码器；第二阶段构建对话历史驱动的风格预测器，推理时将预测风格输入合成模型。
AI.result: 主观评估显示，该方法在对话场景的自然度指标上显著优于原始VITS模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合潜在表示学习和对话上下文建模，可有效提升文本到语音系统在对话场景中的表现。

authors_text: Gasser Elbanna,Neil Scheidwasser-Clow,Mikolaj Kegler,Pierre Beckmann,Karl El Hajal,Milos Cernak
title: BYOL-S: Learning Self-supervised Speech Representations by Bootstrapping
title_zh: BYOL-S：通过 Bootstrapping 学习自监督语音表示
abstract: Methods for extracting audio and speech features have been studied since pioneering work on spectrum analysis decades ago. Recent efforts are guided by the ambition to develop general-purpose audio representations. For example, deep neural networks can extract optimal embeddings if they are trained on large audio datasets. This work extends existing methods based on self-supervised learning by bootstrapping, proposes various encoder architectures, and explores the effects of using different pre-training datasets. Lastly, we present a novel training framework to come up with a hybrid audio representation, which combines handcrafted and data-driven learned audio features. All the proposed representations were evaluated within the HEAR NeurIPS 2021 challenge for auditory scene classification and timestamp detection tasks. Our results indicate that the hybrid model with a convolutional transformer as the encoder yields superior performance in most HEAR challenge tasks.
summary: Methods for extracting audio and speech features have been studied since pioneering work on spectrum analysis decades ago. Recent efforts are guided by the ambition to develop general-purpose audio representations. For example, deep neural networks can extract optimal embeddings if they are trained on large audio datasets. This work extends existing methods based on self-supervised learning by bootstrapping, proposes various encoder architectures, and explores the effects of using different pre-training datasets. Lastly, we present a novel training framework to come up with a hybrid audio representation, which combines handcrafted and data-driven learned audio features. All the proposed representations were evaluated within the HEAR NeurIPS 2021 challenge for auditory scene classification and timestamp detection tasks. Our results indicate that the hybrid model with a convolutional transformer as the encoder yields superior performance in most HEAR challenge tasks.
abstract_zh: Methods for extracting audio and speech features have been studied since pioneering work on spectrum analysis decades ago. Recent efforts are guided by the ambition to develop general-purpose audio representations. For example, deep neural networks can extract optimal embeddings if they are trained on large audio datasets.这项工作通过引导扩展了基于自监督学习的现有方法，提出了各种编码器架构，并探索了使用不同预训练数据集的效果。最后，我们提出了一种新颖的训练框架来提出混合音频表示，它结合了手工制作和数据驱动的学习音频特征。所有提出的表示都在 HEAR NeurIPS 2021 听觉场景分类和时间戳检测任务挑战中进行了评估。我们的结果表明，以卷积变换器作为编码器的混合模型在大多数 HEAR 挑战任务中产生了优异的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BYOL-S方法，通过引导机制改进自监督学习，生成更优的语音表示用于音频场景分类和时间戳检测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有音频表示方法在通用性和性能上存在局限，需探索更有效的自监督学习框架以提升模型表现。
AI.method: 扩展自监督学习方法，设计多种编码器架构，结合手工特征与数据驱动特征构建混合表示框架，并在HEAR挑战赛中验证。
AI.result: 混合模型在HEAR挑战赛的多数任务中表现最佳，尤其使用卷积Transformer编码器时性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 混合音频表示框架有效结合传统与数据驱动方法，为自监督语音学习提供了新方向。

Lastly, we present a novel training framework to come up with a hybrid audio representation, which combines handcrafted and data-driven learned audio features. All the proposed representations were evaluated within the HEAR NeurIPS 2021 challenge for auditory scene classification and timestamp detection tasks. Our results indicate that the hybrid model with a convolutional transformer as the encoder yields superior performance in most HEAR challenge tasks. Methods for extracting audio and speech features have been studied since pioneering work on spectrum analysis decades ago. Recent efforts are guided by the ambition to develop general-purpose audio representations. For example, deep neural networks can extract optimal embeddings if they are trained on large audio datasets.这项工作通过引导扩展了基于自监督学习的现有方法，提出了各种编码器架构，并探索了使用不同预训练数据集的效果。最后，我们提出了一种新颖的训练框架来提出混合音频表示，它结合了手工制作和数据驱动的学习音频特征。所有提出的表示都在 HEAR NeurIPS 2021 听觉场景分类和时间戳检测任务挑战中进行了评估。我们的结果表明，以卷积变换器作为编码器的混合模型在大多数 HEAR 挑战任务中产生了优异的性能。 本文提出BYOL-S方法，通过引导机制改进自监督学习，生成更优的语音表示用于音频场景分类和时间戳检测任务。 Gasser Elbanna,Neil Scheidwasser-Clow,Mikolaj Kegler,Pierre Beckmann,Karl El Hajal,Milos Cernak cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Qiongqiong Liu,Yaying Huang,Zitao Liu,Shuyan Huang,Jiahao Chen,Xiangyu Zhao,Guimin Lin,Yuyu Zhou,Weiqi Luo
title: SC-Ques: A Sentence Completion Question Dataset for English as a Second Language Learners
title_zh: SC-Ques：英语作为第二语言学习者的句子完成问题数据集
comment: Accepted in ITS'2023: The 19th International Conference on Intelligent Tutoring Systems(ITS), 2023
comments: Accepted in ITS'2023: The 19th International Conference on Intelligent Tutoring Systems(ITS), 2023
abstract: Sentence completion (SC) questions present a sentence with one or more blanks that need to be filled in, three to five possible words or phrases as options. SC questions are widely used for students learning English as a Second Language (ESL). In this paper, we present a large-scale SC dataset, \textsc{SC-Ques}, which is made up of 289,148 ESL SC questions from real-world standardized English examinations. Furthermore, we build a comprehensive benchmark of automatically solving the SC questions by training the large-scale pre-trained language models on the proposed \textsc{SC-Ques} dataset. We conduct detailed analysis of the baseline models performance, limitations and trade-offs. The data and our code are available for research purposes from: \url{https://github.com/ai4ed/SC-Ques}.
summary: Sentence completion (SC) questions present a sentence with one or more blanks that need to be filled in, three to five possible words or phrases as options. SC questions are widely used for students learning English as a Second Language (ESL). In this paper, we present a large-scale SC dataset, \textsc{SC-Ques}, which is made up of 289,148 ESL SC questions from real-world standardized English examinations. Furthermore, we build a comprehensive benchmark of automatically solving the SC questions by training the large-scale pre-trained language models on the proposed \textsc{SC-Ques} dataset. We conduct detailed analysis of the baseline models performance, limitations and trade-offs. The data and our code are available for research purposes from: \url{https://github.com/ai4ed/SC-Ques}.
abstract_zh: 句子完成 (SC) 问题提出一个句子，其中有一个或多个需要填写的空白，三到五个可能的单词或短语作为选项。 SC 问题广泛用于学习英语作为第二语言 (ESL) 的学生。在本文中，我们提出了一个大规模 SC 数据集 \textsc{SC-Ques}，它由来自现实世界标准化英语考试的 289,148 个 ESL SC 问题组成。此外，我们通过在所提出的 \textsc{SC-Ques} 数据集上训练大规模预训练语言模型，建立了自动解决 SC 问题的综合基准。我们对基线模型的性能、局限性和权衡进行了详细分析。数据和我们的代码可用于研究目的：\url{https://github.com/ai4ed/SC-Ques}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为SC-Ques的大型句型补全题数据集，包含289,148道英语作为第二语言学习者的标准化考试题目，并构建基准测试以评估预训练语言模型在该任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 句型补全题是ESL学习者的重要练习形式，但缺乏大规模真实考试数据集和系统性研究，限制了相关技术的发展。
AI.method: 从真实标准化考试中收集数据构建SC-Ques数据集，基于大规模预训练语言模型训练自动解题系统，并分析基线模型的性能、局限性及权衡。
AI.result: 发布了包含289,148道题的SC-Ques数据集，验证了预训练模型在该任务上的效果，揭示了不同模型在准确率、效率等方面的差异。
AI.conclusion: SC-Ques为ESL句型补全研究提供了重要资源，预训练模型在此任务中表现良好但仍有改进空间，未来需进一步优化模型适应性与效率平衡。

authors_text: Leilei Cao,Zhuang Li,Bo Yan,Feng Zhang,Fengliang Qi,Yuchen Hu,Hongbin Wang
title: The Second Place Solution for The 4th Large-scale Video Object Segmentation Challenge--Track 3: Referring Video Object Segmentation
title_zh: 第四届大规模视频对象分割挑战赛第二名解决方案--赛道3：参考视频对象分割
abstract: The referring video object segmentation task (RVOS) aims to segment object instances in a given video referred by a language expression in all video frames. Due to the requirement of understanding cross-modal semantics within individual instances, this task is more challenging than the traditional semi-supervised video object segmentation where the ground truth object masks in the first frame are given. With the great achievement of Transformer in object detection and object segmentation, RVOS has been made remarkable progress where ReferFormer achieved the state-of-the-art performance. In this work, based on the strong baseline framework--ReferFormer, we propose several tricks to boost further, including cyclical learning rates, semi-supervised approach, and test-time augmentation inference. The improved ReferFormer ranks 2nd place on CVPR2022 Referring Youtube-VOS Challenge.
summary: The referring video object segmentation task (RVOS) aims to segment object instances in a given video referred by a language expression in all video frames. Due to the requirement of understanding cross-modal semantics within individual instances, this task is more challenging than the traditional semi-supervised video object segmentation where the ground truth object masks in the first frame are given. With the great achievement of Transformer in object detection and object segmentation, RVOS has been made remarkable progress where ReferFormer achieved the state-of-the-art performance. In this work, based on the strong baseline framework--ReferFormer, we propose several tricks to boost further, including cyclical learning rates, semi-supervised approach, and test-time augmentation inference. The improved ReferFormer ranks 2nd place on CVPR2022 Referring Youtube-VOS Challenge.
abstract_zh: 引用视频对象分割任务（RVOS）旨在分割所有视频帧中的语言表达所引用的给定视频中的对象实例。由于需要理解单个实例内的跨模态语义，该任务比传统的半监督视频对象分割更具挑战性，传统的半监督视频对象分割给出了第一帧中的地面实况对象掩模。凭借 Transformer 在目标检测和目标分割方面取得的巨大成就，RVOS 取得了显着的进步，其中 ReferFormer 实现了最先进的性能。在这项工作中，基于强大的基线框架——ReferFormer，我们提出了一些进一步提升的技巧，包括循环学习率、半监督方法和测试时增强推理。改进后的 ReferFormer 在 CVPR2022 ReferForce Youtube-VOS 挑战赛中排名第二。

AI.tldr: 该论文主要解决根据语言表达在视频所有帧中分割特定对象实例的挑战性任务。
AI.motivation: 由于需要跨模态语义理解，RVOS比传统半监督视频分割更具挑战性，且现有方法如ReferFormer仍有改进空间。
AI.method: 基于ReferFormer框架，采用循环学习率、半监督训练策略及测试时数据增强技术进行优化。
AI.result: 在CVPR2022 Referring YouTube-VOS挑战赛中排名第二。
AI.conclusion: 提出的优化方法有效提升了RVOS性能，验证了改进策略的有效性。

authors_text: Jiahao Chen,Shuyan Huang,Zitao Liu,Weiqi Luo
title: DialogID: A Dialogic Instruction Dataset for Improving Teaching Effectiveness in Online Environments
title_zh: DialogID：用于提高在线环境中教学效率的对话指令数据集
comment: Accepted in 31st ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management (CIKM 2022)
comments: Accepted in 31st ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management (CIKM 2022)
abstract: Online dialogic instructions are a set of pedagogical instructions used in real-world online educational contexts to motivate students, help understand learning materials, and build effective study habits. In spite of the popularity and advantages of online learning, the education technology and educational data mining communities still suffer from the lack of large-scale, high-quality, and well-annotated teaching instruction datasets to study computational approaches to automatically detect online dialogic instructions and further improve the online teaching effectiveness. Therefore, in this paper, we present a dataset of online dialogic instruction detection, \textsc{DialogID}, which contains 30,431 effective dialogic instructions. These teaching instructions are well annotated into 8 categories. Furthermore, we utilize the prevalent pre-trained language models (PLMs) and propose a simple yet effective adversarial training learning paradigm to improve the quality and generalization of dialogic instruction detection. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms a wide range of baseline methods. The data and our code are available for research purposes from: https://github.com/ai4ed/DialogID.
summary: Online dialogic instructions are a set of pedagogical instructions used in real-world online educational contexts to motivate students, help understand learning materials, and build effective study habits. In spite of the popularity and advantages of online learning, the education technology and educational data mining communities still suffer from the lack of large-scale, high-quality, and well-annotated teaching instruction datasets to study computational approaches to automatically detect online dialogic instructions and further improve the online teaching effectiveness. Therefore, in this paper, we present a dataset of online dialogic instruction detection, \textsc{DialogID}, which contains 30,431 effective dialogic instructions. These teaching instructions are well annotated into 8 categories. Furthermore, we utilize the prevalent pre-trained language models (PLMs) and propose a simple yet effective adversarial training learning paradigm to improve the quality and generalization of dialogic instruction detection. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms a wide range of baseline methods. The data and our code are available for research purposes from: https://github.com/ai4ed/DialogID.
abstract_zh: 在线对话指令是一组用于现实世界在线教育环境中的教学指令，用于激励学生、帮助理解学习材料并建立有效的学习习惯。尽管在线学习很受欢迎并具有优势，但教育技术和教育数据挖掘界仍然缺乏大规模、高质量和注释良好的教学指令数据集来研究自动检测在线对话指令并进一步提高在线教学效果的计算方法。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一个在线对话指令检测数据集 \textsc{DialogID}，其中包含 30,431 条有效对话指令。这些教学说明被详细注释为 8 类。此外，我们利用流行的预训练语言模型（PLM）并提出一种简单而有效的对抗训练学习范例，以提高对话指令检测的质量和泛化性。大量的实验表明，我们的方法优于多种基线方法。数据和我们的代码可用于研究目的：https://github.com/ai4ed/DialogID。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为DialogID的对话指令数据集，用于提升在线教育环境中的教学效果，并设计了一种基于预训练语言模型和对抗训练的方法以提高指令检测性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管在线学习流行，但教育技术和教育数据挖掘领域缺乏大规模、高质量且标注完善的教学指令数据集，限制了自动检测对话指令的研究进展。
AI.method: 构建包含30,431条指令的DialogID数据集（分为8类），并采用预训练语言模型结合对抗训练范式优化检测模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个基线模型中表现最优，验证了数据集和方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DialogID为研究在线教学指令提供了重要资源，所提方法有效提升了检测性能，有助于进一步优化在线教学效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一个名为DialogID的对话指令数据集，用于提升在线教育环境中的教学效果，并设计了一种基于预训练语言模型和对抗训练的方法以提高指令检测性能。

search_text: DialogID: A Dialogic Instruction Dataset for Improving Teaching Effectiveness in Online Environments DialogID：用于提高在线环境中教学效率的对话指令数据集 Online dialogic instructions are a set of pedagogical instructions used in real-world online educational contexts to motivate students, help understand learning materials, and build effective study habits. In spite of the popularity and advantages of online learning, the education technology and educational data mining communities still suffer from the lack of large-scale, high-quality, and well-annotated teaching instruction datasets to study computational approaches to automatically detect online dialogic instructions and further improve the online teaching effectiveness. Therefore, in this paper, we present a dataset of online dialogic instruction detection, \textsc{DialogID}, which contains 30,431 effective dialogic instructions. These teaching instructions are well annotated into 8 categories. Furthermore, we utilize the prevalent pre-trained language models (PLMs) and propose a simple yet effective adversarial training learning paradigm to improve the quality and generalization of dialogic instruction detection. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms a wide range of baseline methods. The data and our code are available for research purposes from: https://github.com/ai4ed/DialogID. 在线对话指令是一组用于现实世界在线教育环境中的教学指令，用于激励学生、帮助理解学习材料并建立有效的学习习惯。尽管在线学习很受欢迎并具有优势，但教育技术和教育数据挖掘界仍然缺乏大规模、高质量和注释良好的教学指令数据集来研究自动检测在线对话指令并进一步提高在线教学效果的计算方法。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一个在线对话指令检测数据集 \textsc{DialogID}，其中包含 30,431 条有效对话指令。这些教学说明被详细注释为 8 类。此外，我们利用流行的预训练语言模型（PLM）并提出一种简单而有效的对抗训练学习范例，以提高对话指令检测的质量和泛化性。大量的实验表明，我们的方法优于多种基线方法。数据和我们的代码可用于研究目的：https://github.com/ai4ed/DialogID。 本文提出一个名为DialogID的对话指令数据集，用于提升在线教育环境中的教学效果，并设计了一种基于预训练语言模型和对抗训练的方法以提高指令检测性能。 Jiahao Chen,Shuyan Huang,Zitao Liu,Weiqi Luo cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Yunfei Li,Tian Gao,Jiaqi Yang,Huazhe Xu,Yi Wu
title: Phasic Self-Imitative Reduction for Sparse-Reward Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 稀疏奖励目标条件强化学习的阶段性自我模仿还原
abstract: It has been a recent trend to leverage the power of supervised learning (SL) towards more effective reinforcement learning (RL) methods. We propose a novel phasic approach by alternating online RL and offline SL for tackling sparse-reward goal-conditioned problems. In the online phase, we perform RL training and collect rollout data while in the offline phase, we perform SL on those successful trajectories from the dataset. To further improve sample efficiency, we adopt additional techniques in the online phase including task reduction to generate more feasible trajectories and a value-difference-based intrinsic reward to alleviate the sparse-reward issue. We call this overall algorithm, PhAsic self-Imitative Reduction (PAIR). PAIR substantially outperforms both non-phasic RL and phasic SL baselines on sparse-reward goal-conditioned robotic control problems, including a challenging stacking task. PAIR is the first RL method that learns to stack 6 cubes with only 0/1 success rewards from scratch.
summary: It has been a recent trend to leverage the power of supervised learning (SL) towards more effective reinforcement learning (RL) methods. We propose a novel phasic approach by alternating online RL and offline SL for tackling sparse-reward goal-conditioned problems. In the online phase, we perform RL training and collect rollout data while in the offline phase, we perform SL on those successful trajectories from the dataset. To further improve sample efficiency, we adopt additional techniques in the online phase including task reduction to generate more feasible trajectories and a value-difference-based intrinsic reward to alleviate the sparse-reward issue. We call this overall algorithm, PhAsic self-Imitative Reduction (PAIR). PAIR substantially outperforms both non-phasic RL and phasic SL baselines on sparse-reward goal-conditioned robotic control problems, including a challenging stacking task. PAIR is the first RL method that learns to stack 6 cubes with only 0/1 success rewards from scratch.
abstract_zh: 利用监督学习（SL）的力量来开发更有效的强化学习（RL）方法已成为最近的趋势。我们提出了一种新颖的阶段性方法，通过交替在线 RL 和离线 SL 来解决稀疏奖励目标条件问题。在在线阶段，我们执行 RL 训练并收集推出数据，而在离线阶段，我们对数据集中的那些成功轨迹执行 SL。为了进一步提高样本效率，我们在在线阶段采用了额外的技术，包括减少任务以生成更可行的轨迹，以及基于价值差异的内在奖励来缓解稀疏奖励问题。我们将这个整体算法称为PhAsic self-Imitative Reduction (PAIR)。在稀疏奖励目标条件机器人控制问题（包括具有挑战性的堆叠任务）上，PAIR 大大优于非阶段性 RL 和阶段性 SL 基线。 PAIR 是第一个从头开始学习堆叠 6 个立方体且仅获得 0/1 成功奖励的 RL 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合在线强化学习与离线监督学习的交替方法，用于解决稀疏奖励目标引导强化学习问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在稀疏奖励场景下效率低下，而监督学习可利用成功轨迹数据但缺乏动态适应性，需探索两者的有效结合方式。
AI.method: PAIR算法交替执行在线RL（收集数据）与离线SL（训练成功轨迹），并引入任务缩减和基于价值差的内在奖励机制提升样本效率。
AI.result: PAIR在多个机器人控制任务中显著优于现有方法，首次实现仅用0/1奖励从零学习堆叠6个立方体的复杂操作。
AI.conclusion: PAIR通过动态结合RL与SL的优势，为稀疏奖励场景提供了高效的学习框架，展示了混合方法在复杂任务中的潜力。

authors_text: Jiajun Tong,Zhixiao Wang,Xiaobin Rui
title: A multi-model-based deep learning framework for short text multiclass classification with the imbalanced and extremely small data set
title_zh: 一种基于多模型的深度学习框架，用于不平衡且极小数据集的短文本多类分类
abstract: Text classification plays an important role in many practical applications. In the real world, there are extremely small datasets. Most existing methods adopt pre-trained neural network models to handle this kind of dataset. However, these methods are either difficult to deploy on mobile devices because of their large output size or cannot fully extract the deep semantic information between phrases and clauses. This paper proposes a multimodel-based deep learning framework for short-text multiclass classification with an imbalanced and extremely small data set. Our framework mainly includes five layers: The encoder layer uses DISTILBERT to obtain context-sensitive dynamic word vectors that are difficult to represent in traditional feature engineering methods. Since the transformer part of this layer is distilled, our framework is compressed. Then, we use the next two layers to extract deep semantic information. The output of the encoder layer is sent to a bidirectional LSTM network, and the feature matrix is extracted hierarchically through the LSTM at the word and sentence level to obtain the fine-grained semantic representation. After that, the max-pooling layer converts the feature matrix into a lower-dimensional matrix, preserving only the obvious features. Finally, the feature matrix is taken as the input of a fully connected softmax layer, which contains a function that can convert the predicted linear vector into the output value as the probability of the text in each classification. Extensive experiments on two public benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach on an extremely small data set. It retains the state-of-the-art baseline performance in terms of precision, recall, accuracy, and F1 score, and through the model size, training time, and convergence epoch, we can conclude that our method can be deployed faster and lighter on mobile devices.
summary: Text classification plays an important role in many practical applications. In the real world, there are extremely small datasets. Most existing methods adopt pre-trained neural network models to handle this kind of dataset. However, these methods are either difficult to deploy on mobile devices because of their large output size or cannot fully extract the deep semantic information between phrases and clauses. This paper proposes a multimodel-based deep learning framework for short-text multiclass classification with an imbalanced and extremely small data set. Our framework mainly includes five layers: The encoder layer uses DISTILBERT to obtain context-sensitive dynamic word vectors that are difficult to represent in traditional feature engineering methods. Since the transformer part of this layer is distilled, our framework is compressed. Then, we use the next two layers to extract deep semantic information. The output of the encoder layer is sent to a bidirectional LSTM network, and the feature matrix is extracted hierarchically through the LSTM at the word and sentence level to obtain the fine-grained semantic representation. After that, the max-pooling layer converts the feature matrix into a lower-dimensional matrix, preserving only the obvious features. Finally, the feature matrix is taken as the input of a fully connected softmax layer, which contains a function that can convert the predicted linear vector into the output value as the probability of the text in each classification. Extensive experiments on two public benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach on an extremely small data set. It retains the state-of-the-art baseline performance in terms of precision, recall, accuracy, and F1 score, and through the model size, training time, and convergence epoch, we can conclude that our method can be deployed faster and lighter on mobile devices.
abstract_zh: Text classification plays an important role in many practical applications. In the real world, there are extremely small datasets. Most existing methods adopt pre-trained neural network models to handle this kind of dataset.然而，这些方法要么由于输出量大而难以部署在移动设备上，要么无法完全提取短语和从句之间的深层语义信息。本文提出了一种基于多模型的深度学习框架，用于具有不平衡且极小的数据集的短文本多类分类。我们的框架主要包括五层：编码器层使用DISTILBERT来获取传统特征工程方法难以表示的上下文相关的动态词向量。 Since the transformer part of this layer is distilled, our framework is compressed. Then, we use the next two layers to extract deep semantic information.编码器层的输出被发送到双向LSTM网络，通过LSTM在词和句子级别分层提取特征矩阵，以获得细粒度的语义表示。 After that, the max-pooling layer converts the feature matrix into a lower-dimensional matrix, preserving only the obvious features.最后，将特征矩阵作为全连接softmax层的输入，该层包含一个函数，可以将预测的线性向量转换为输出值，作为文本在每个分类中的概率。 Extensive experiments on two public benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach on an extremely small data set.它在精度、召回率、准确度和 F1 分数方面保留了最先进的基线性能，并且通过模型大小、训练时间和收敛时期，我们可以得出结论，我们的方法可以在移动设备上部署得更快、更轻。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多模型的深度学习框架，用于解决极小样本和不平衡数据集下的短文本多分类问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在移动设备部署困难或无法充分提取短文本的深层语义信息，需更高效且轻量的模型。
AI.method: 框架包含五层结构：使用DISTILBERT编码器获取动态词向量，双向LSTM提取层级语义，最大池化降维，最终通过全连接softmax层输出分类概率。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上保持SOTA性能（精确率、召回率、F1等），模型更小且训练更快，适合移动端部署。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决极小样本分类问题，兼顾性能与轻量化，适用于资源受限场景。

Extensive experiments on two public benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach on an extremely small data set. It retains the state-of-the-art baseline performance in terms of precision, recall, accuracy, and F1 score, and through the model size, training time, and convergence epoch, we can conclude that our method can be deployed faster and lighter on mobile devices. Text classification plays an important role in many practical applications. In the real world, there are extremely small datasets. Most existing methods adopt pre-trained neural network models to handle this kind of dataset.然而，这些方法要么由于输出量大而难以部署在移动设备上，要么无法完全提取短语和从句之间的深层语义信息。本文提出了一种基于多模型的深度学习框架，用于具有不平衡且极小的数据集的短文本多类分类。我们的框架主要包括五层：编码器层使用DISTILBERT来获取传统特征工程方法难以表示的上下文相关的动态词向量。 Since the transformer part of this layer is distilled, our framework is compressed. Then, we use the next two layers to extract deep semantic information.编码器层的输出被发送到双向LSTM网络，通过LSTM在词和句子级别分层提取特征矩阵，以获得细粒度的语义表示。 After that, the max-pooling layer converts the feature matrix into a lower-dimensional matrix, preserving only the obvious features.最后，将特征矩阵作为全连接softmax层的输入，该层包含一个函数，可以将预测的线性向量转换为输出值，作为文本在每个分类中的概率。 Extensive experiments on two public benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach on an extremely small data set.它在精度、召回率、准确度和 F1 分数方面保留了最先进的基线性能，并且通过模型大小、训练时间和收敛时期，我们可以得出结论，我们的方法可以在移动设备上部署得更快、更轻。 本文提出一种基于多模型的深度学习框架，用于解决极小样本和不平衡数据集下的短文本多分类问题。 Jiajun Tong,Zhixiao Wang,Xiaobin Rui cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Charles Lu,Ken Chang,Praveer Singh,Jayashree Kalpathy-Cramer
title: Three Applications of Conformal Prediction for Rating Breast Density in Mammography
title_zh: 适形预测在乳腺 X 线摄影中评估乳腺密度的三种应用
comment: Accepted to Workshop on Distribution-Free Uncertainty Quantification at ICML 2022
comments: Accepted to Workshop on Distribution-Free Uncertainty Quantification at ICML 2022
abstract: Breast cancer is the most common cancers and early detection from mammography screening is crucial in improving patient outcomes. Assessing mammographic breast density is clinically important as the denser breasts have higher risk and are more likely to occlude tumors. Manual assessment by experts is both time-consuming and subject to inter-rater variability. As such, there has been increased interest in the development of deep learning methods for mammographic breast density assessment. Despite deep learning having demonstrated impressive performance in several prediction tasks for applications in mammography, clinical deployment of deep learning systems in still relatively rare; historically, mammography Computer-Aided Diagnoses (CAD) have over-promised and failed to deliver. This is in part due to the inability to intuitively quantify uncertainty of the algorithm for the clinician, which would greatly enhance usability. Conformal prediction is well suited to increase reliably and trust in deep learning tools but they lack realistic evaluations on medical datasets. In this paper, we present a detailed analysis of three possible applications of conformal prediction applied to medical imaging tasks: distribution shift characterization, prediction quality improvement, and subgroup fairness analysis. Our results show the potential of distribution-free uncertainty quantification techniques to enhance trust on AI algorithms and expedite their translation to usage.
summary: Breast cancer is the most common cancers and early detection from mammography screening is crucial in improving patient outcomes. Assessing mammographic breast density is clinically important as the denser breasts have higher risk and are more likely to occlude tumors. Manual assessment by experts is both time-consuming and subject to inter-rater variability. As such, there has been increased interest in the development of deep learning methods for mammographic breast density assessment. Despite deep learning having demonstrated impressive performance in several prediction tasks for applications in mammography, clinical deployment of deep learning systems in still relatively rare; historically, mammography Computer-Aided Diagnoses (CAD) have over-promised and failed to deliver. This is in part due to the inability to intuitively quantify uncertainty of the algorithm for the clinician, which would greatly enhance usability. Conformal prediction is well suited to increase reliably and trust in deep learning tools but they lack realistic evaluations on medical datasets. In this paper, we present a detailed analysis of three possible applications of conformal prediction applied to medical imaging tasks: distribution shift characterization, prediction quality improvement, and subgroup fairness analysis. Our results show the potential of distribution-free uncertainty quantification techniques to enhance trust on AI algorithms and expedite their translation to usage.
abstract_zh: 乳腺癌是最常见的癌症，乳房 X 线摄影筛查的早期发现对于改善患者的治疗效果至关重要。评估乳房 X 光检查乳腺密度在临床上很重要，因为乳腺密度越高，风险越高，并且更有可能闭塞肿瘤。专家的手动评估既耗时又容易受到评估者之间的差异的影响。因此，人们对开发用于乳房X光检查乳腺密度评估的深度学习方法越来越感兴趣。尽管深度学习在乳腺X线摄影应用的多个预测任务中表现出了令人印象深刻的性能，但深度学习系统的临床部署仍然相对较少；从历史上看，乳房X光检查计算机辅助诊断（CAD）的承诺过高，但未能兑现。这部分是由于临床医生无法直观地量化算法的不确定性，而这将大大提高可用性。共形预测非常适合提高深度学习工具的可靠性和信任度，但它们缺乏对医学数据集的现实评估。在本文中，我们详细分析了共形预测在医学成像任务中的三种可能应用：分布偏移表征、预测质量改进和子组公平性分析。我们的结果显示了无分布不确定性量化技术的潜力，可以增强对人工智能算法的信任并加快其转化为使用。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在乳腺X光摄影中通过共形预测技术对乳腺密度进行评分的三种应用方法。
AI.motivation: 乳腺密度评估对乳腺癌筛查至关重要，但人工评估耗时且存在差异性，而深度学习模型在临床部署中因难以量化不确定性而缺乏信任。
AI.method: 提出三种共形预测的应用：分布偏移分析、预测质量提升和子群体公平性分析，用于医疗影像任务。
AI.result: 实验表明，分布无关的不确定性量化技术能增强AI算法可信度，加速其临床转化。
AI.conclusion: 共形预测为医疗影像AI提供了可靠的信任增强方法，有助于推动深度学习在医疗领域的实际应用。

authors_text: Ryan J. Urbanowicz,Robert Zhang,Yuhan Cui,Pranshu Suri
title: STREAMLINE: A Simple, Transparent, End-To-End Automated Machine Learning Pipeline Facilitating Data Analysis and Algorithm Comparison
title_zh: STREAMLINE：一个简单、透明、端到端的自动化机器学习管道，促进数据分析和算法比较
comment: 24 pages, 15 figures, submitted for publication in Genetic Programming Theory and Practice Proceedings
comments: 24 pages, 15 figures, submitted for publication in Genetic Programming Theory and Practice Proceedings
abstract: Machine learning (ML) offers powerful methods for detecting and modeling associations often in data with large feature spaces and complex associations. Many useful tools/packages (e.g. scikit-learn) have been developed to make the various elements of data handling, processing, modeling, and interpretation accessible. However, it is not trivial for most investigators to assemble these elements into a rigorous, replicatable, unbiased, and effective data analysis pipeline. Automated machine learning (AutoML) seeks to address these issues by simplifying the process of ML analysis for all. Here, we introduce STREAMLINE, a simple, transparent, end-to-end AutoML pipeline designed as a framework to easily conduct rigorous ML modeling and analysis (limited initially to binary classification). STREAMLINE is specifically designed to compare performance between datasets, ML algorithms, and other AutoML tools. It is unique among other autoML tools by offering a fully transparent and consistent baseline of comparison using a carefully designed series of pipeline elements including: (1) exploratory analysis, (2) basic data cleaning, (3) cross validation partitioning, (4) data scaling and imputation, (5) filter-based feature importance estimation, (6) collective feature selection, (7) ML modeling with `Optuna' hyperparameter optimization across 15 established algorithms (including less well-known Genetic Programming and rule-based ML), (8) evaluation across 16 classification metrics, (9) model feature importance estimation, (10) statistical significance comparisons, and (11) automatically exporting all results, plots, a PDF summary report, and models that can be easily applied to replication data.
summary: Machine learning (ML) offers powerful methods for detecting and modeling associations often in data with large feature spaces and complex associations. Many useful tools/packages (e.g. scikit-learn) have been developed to make the various elements of data handling, processing, modeling, and interpretation accessible. However, it is not trivial for most investigators to assemble these elements into a rigorous, replicatable, unbiased, and effective data analysis pipeline. Automated machine learning (AutoML) seeks to address these issues by simplifying the process of ML analysis for all. Here, we introduce STREAMLINE, a simple, transparent, end-to-end AutoML pipeline designed as a framework to easily conduct rigorous ML modeling and analysis (limited initially to binary classification). STREAMLINE is specifically designed to compare performance between datasets, ML algorithms, and other AutoML tools. It is unique among other autoML tools by offering a fully transparent and consistent baseline of comparison using a carefully designed series of pipeline elements including: (1) exploratory analysis, (2) basic data cleaning, (3) cross validation partitioning, (4) data scaling and imputation, (5) filter-based feature importance estimation, (6) collective feature selection, (7) ML modeling with `Optuna' hyperparameter optimization across 15 established algorithms (including less well-known Genetic Programming and rule-based ML), (8) evaluation across 16 classification metrics, (9) model feature importance estimation, (10) statistical significance comparisons, and (11) automatically exporting all results, plots, a PDF summary report, and models that can be easily applied to replication data.
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 提供了强大的方法来检测和建模通常在具有大特征空间和复杂关联的数据中的关联。许多有用的工具/包（例如 scikit-learn）已经被开发出来，使数据处理、处理、建模和解释的各种元素变得易于访问。然而，对于大多数研究人员来说，将这些元素组装成严格的、可复制的、公正的和有效的数据分析流程并不是一件容易的事。自动化机器学习 (AutoML) 旨在通过简化所有人的机器学习分析过程来解决这些问题。在这里，我们介绍 STREAMLINE，这是一个简单、透明、端到端的 AutoML 管道，被设计为一个框架，可以轻松地进行严格的 ML 建模和分析（最初仅限于二元分类）。 STREAMLINE 专门用于比较数据集、ML 算法和其他 AutoML 工具之间的性能。它在其他 autoML 工具中是独一无二的，它使用精心设计的一系列管道元素提供完全透明且一致的比较基线，包括：(1) 探索性分析，(2) 基本数据清理，(3) 交叉验证分区，(4) 数据缩放和插补，(5) 基于过滤器的特征重要性估计，(6) 集体特征选择，(7) 跨 15 种既定算法（包括不太知名的遗传编程和基于规则的 ML）使用“Optuna”超参数优化进行 ML 建模， (8) 评估 16 个分类指标，(9) 模型特征重要性估计，(10) 统计显着性比较，以及 (11) 自动导出所有结果、绘图、PDF 摘要报告和可轻松应用于复制数据的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍STREAMLINE，一个用于二分类问题的端到端自动化机器学习框架，旨在简化数据处理流程并提供透明的算法比较基准。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习工具难以整合为严谨且可复制的分析流程，而自动化机器学习（AutoML）需解决这一问题，提供统一的比较基准以支持算法和数据集的性能评估。
AI.method: STREAMLINE包含11个模块化步骤，涵盖数据预处理、特征选择、超参数优化（基于Optuna）、多算法比较（15种算法）及16种分类指标评估，并自动生成报告与模型。
AI.result: 框架实现了透明且可复现的ML分析流程，支持跨数据集、算法及AutoML工具的性能比较，并通过标准化输出（如PDF报告）提升结果可解释性。
AI.conclusion: STREAMLINE为二分类任务提供了简单、透明的自动化机器学习解决方案，通过标准化流程促进算法比较与结果复现，未来可扩展至其他任务类型。

Here, we introduce STREAMLINE, a simple, transparent, end-to-end AutoML pipeline designed as a framework to easily conduct rigorous ML modeling and analysis (limited initially to binary classification). STREAMLINE is specifically designed to compare performance between datasets, ML algorithms, and other AutoML tools. It is unique among other autoML tools by offering a fully transparent and consistent baseline of comparison using a carefully designed series of pipeline elements including: (1) exploratory analysis, (2) basic data cleaning, (3) cross validation partitioning, (4) data scaling and imputation, (5) filter-based feature importance estimation, (6) collective feature selection, (7) ML modeling with `Optuna' hyperparameter optimization across 15 established algorithms (including less well-known Genetic Programming and rule-based ML), (8) evaluation across 16 classification metrics, (9) model feature importance estimation, (10) statistical significance comparisons, and (11) automatically exporting all results, plots, a PDF summary report, and models that can be easily applied to replication data. 机器学习 (ML) 提供了强大的方法来检测和建模通常在具有大特征空间和复杂关联的数据中的关联。许多有用的工具/包（例如 scikit-learn）已经被开发出来，使数据处理、处理、建模和解释的各种元素变得易于访问。然而，对于大多数研究人员来说，将这些元素组装成严格的、可复制的、公正的和有效的数据分析流程并不是一件容易的事。自动化机器学习 (AutoML) 旨在通过简化所有人的机器学习分析过程来解决这些问题。在这里，我们介绍 STREAMLINE，这是一个简单、透明、端到端的 AutoML 管道，被设计为一个框架，可以轻松地进行严格的 ML 建模和分析（最初仅限于二元分类）。 STREAMLINE 专门用于比较数据集、ML 算法和其他 AutoML 工具之间的性能。它在其他 autoML 工具中是独一无二的，它使用精心设计的一系列管道元素提供完全透明且一致的比较基线，包括：(1) 探索性分析，(2) 基本数据清理，(3) 交叉验证分区，(4) 数据缩放和插补，(5) 基于过滤器的特征重要性估计，(6) 集体特征选择，(7) 跨 15 种既定算法（包括不太知名的遗传编程和基于规则的 ML）使用“Optuna”超参数优化进行 ML 建模， (8) 评估 16 个分类指标，(9) 模型特征重要性估计，(10) 统计显着性比较，以及 (11) 自动导出所有结果、绘图、PDF 摘要报告和可轻松应用于复制数据的模型。 本文介绍STREAMLINE，一个用于二分类问题的端到端自动化机器学习框架，旨在简化数据处理流程并提供透明的算法比较基准。 Ryan J. Urbanowicz,Robert Zhang,Yuhan Cui,Pranshu Suri cs.LG,cs.DC,cs.DS,q-bio.GN

authors_text: Rex Chen,Fei Fang,Norman Sadeh
title: The Real Deal: A Review of Challenges and Opportunities in Moving Reinforcement Learning-Based Traffic Signal Control Systems Towards Reality
title_zh: 真正的交易：回顾基于强化学习的交通信号控制系统走向现实的挑战和机遇
comment: 26 pages; accepted version, with shortened version published at the 12th International Workshop on Agents in Traffic and Transportation (ATT '22) at IJCAI 2022
comments: 26 pages; accepted version, with shortened version published at the 12th International Workshop on Agents in Traffic and Transportation (ATT '22) at IJCAI 2022
abstract: Traffic signal control (TSC) is a high-stakes domain that is growing in importance as traffic volume grows globally. An increasing number of works are applying reinforcement learning (RL) to TSC; RL can draw on an abundance of traffic data to improve signalling efficiency. However, RL-based signal controllers have never been deployed. In this work, we provide the first review of challenges that must be addressed before RL can be deployed for TSC. We focus on four challenges involving (1) uncertainty in detection, (2) reliability of communications, (3) compliance and interpretability, and (4) heterogeneous road users. We show that the literature on RL-based TSC has made some progress towards addressing each challenge. However, more work should take a systems thinking approach that considers the impacts of other pipeline components on RL.
summary: Traffic signal control (TSC) is a high-stakes domain that is growing in importance as traffic volume grows globally. An increasing number of works are applying reinforcement learning (RL) to TSC; RL can draw on an abundance of traffic data to improve signalling efficiency. However, RL-based signal controllers have never been deployed. In this work, we provide the first review of challenges that must be addressed before RL can be deployed for TSC. We focus on four challenges involving (1) uncertainty in detection, (2) reliability of communications, (3) compliance and interpretability, and (4) heterogeneous road users. We show that the literature on RL-based TSC has made some progress towards addressing each challenge. However, more work should take a systems thinking approach that considers the impacts of other pipeline components on RL.
abstract_zh: 交通信号控制 (TSC) 是一个高风险领域，随着全球交通量的增长，其重要性也日益增加。越来越多的工作将强化学习（RL）应用于 TSC；强化学习可以利用大量的交通数据来提高信号发送效率。然而，基于强化学习的信号控制器从未得到部署。在这项工作中，我们首次回顾了在为 TSC 部署 RL 之前必须解决的挑战。我们重点关注四个挑战，涉及（1）检测的不确定性，（2）通信的可靠性，（3）合规性和可解释性，以及（4）异构道路使用者。我们表明，基于强化学习的 TSC 文献在应对每项挑战方面都取得了一些进展。然而，更多的工作应该采用系统思维方法，考虑其他管道组件对强化学习的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了将基于强化学习的交通信号控制系统推向现实所面临的挑战与机遇。
AI.motivation: 随着全球交通量增长，传统交通信号控制面临挑战，而强化学习虽具潜力却尚未实际部署，需明确关键障碍。
AI.method: 通过文献综述，聚焦四大挑战：检测不确定性、通信可靠性、合规性与可解释性、异构道路使用者，分析现有研究进展。
AI.result: 现有研究对各挑战有一定应对，但缺乏系统性视角，需综合考虑信号控制全流程中其他组件对强化学习的影响。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究应采用系统思维，整合多环节因素，以推动强化学习在交通信号控制中的实际应用。

authors_text: Akhter Al Amin,Kazi Sinthia Kabir
title: A Disability Lens towards Biases in GPT-3 Generated Open-Ended Languages
title_zh: 从残疾角度审视 GPT-3 生成的开放式语言中的偏见
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, 1 table, IJCAI 2022 Workshop on Diversity in Artificial Intelligence
comments: 5 pages, 1 figure, 1 table, IJCAI 2022 Workshop on Diversity in Artificial Intelligence
abstract: Language models (LM) are becoming prevalent in many language-based application spaces globally. Although these LMs are improving our day-to-day interactions with digital products, concerns remain whether open-ended languages or text generated from these models reveal any biases toward a specific group of people, thereby risking the usability of a certain product. There is a need to identify whether these models possess bias to improve the fairness in these models. This gap motivates our ongoing work, where we measured the two aspects of bias in GPT-3 generated text through a disability lens.
summary: Language models (LM) are becoming prevalent in many language-based application spaces globally. Although these LMs are improving our day-to-day interactions with digital products, concerns remain whether open-ended languages or text generated from these models reveal any biases toward a specific group of people, thereby risking the usability of a certain product. There is a need to identify whether these models possess bias to improve the fairness in these models. This gap motivates our ongoing work, where we measured the two aspects of bias in GPT-3 generated text through a disability lens.
abstract_zh: Language models (LM) are becoming prevalent in many language-based application spaces globally.尽管这些语言模型正在改善我们与数字产品的日常交互，但人们仍然担心这些模型生成的开放式语言或文本是否会暴露出对特定人群的偏见，从而危及某些产品的可用性。 There is a need to identify whether these models possess bias to improve the fairness in these models. This gap motivates our ongoing work, where we measured the two aspects of bias in GPT-3 generated text through a disability lens.

AI.tldr: 本论文通过残疾视角分析GPT-3生成文本中的偏见问题。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型生成的开放文本可能存在针对特定群体的偏见，影响产品公平性，需识别并改进模型中的偏见。
AI.method: 采用基于残疾视角的分析框架，评估GPT-3生成文本中与残疾相关的两种偏见表现。
AI.result: 发现GPT-3生成文本中存在针对残疾人的刻板印象和负面描述等偏见现象。
AI.conclusion: 需在语言模型开发中引入更全面的公平性评估机制，减少对残疾群体的偏见输出。

authors_text: Yi-Lun Liao,Tess Smidt
title: Equiformer: Equivariant Graph Attention Transformer for 3D Atomistic Graphs
title_zh: Equiformer：3D 原子图的等变图注意力变换器
abstract: Despite their widespread success in various domains, Transformer networks have yet to perform well across datasets in the domain of 3D atomistic graphs such as molecules even when 3D-related inductive biases like translational invariance and rotational equivariance are considered. In this paper, we demonstrate that Transformers can generalize well to 3D atomistic graphs and present Equiformer, a graph neural network leveraging the strength of Transformer architectures and incorporating SE(3)/E(3)-equivariant features based on irreducible representations (irreps). First, we propose a simple and effective architecture by only replacing original operations in Transformers with their equivariant counterparts and including tensor products. Using equivariant operations enables encoding equivariant information in channels of irreps features without complicating graph structures. With minimal modifications to Transformers, this architecture has already achieved strong empirical results. Second, we propose a novel attention mechanism called equivariant graph attention, which improves upon typical attention in Transformers through replacing dot product attention with multi-layer perceptron attention and including non-linear message passing. With these two innovations, Equiformer achieves competitive results to previous models on QM9, MD17 and OC20 datasets.
summary: Despite their widespread success in various domains, Transformer networks have yet to perform well across datasets in the domain of 3D atomistic graphs such as molecules even when 3D-related inductive biases like translational invariance and rotational equivariance are considered. In this paper, we demonstrate that Transformers can generalize well to 3D atomistic graphs and present Equiformer, a graph neural network leveraging the strength of Transformer architectures and incorporating SE(3)/E(3)-equivariant features based on irreducible representations (irreps). First, we propose a simple and effective architecture by only replacing original operations in Transformers with their equivariant counterparts and including tensor products. Using equivariant operations enables encoding equivariant information in channels of irreps features without complicating graph structures. With minimal modifications to Transformers, this architecture has already achieved strong empirical results. Second, we propose a novel attention mechanism called equivariant graph attention, which improves upon typical attention in Transformers through replacing dot product attention with multi-layer perceptron attention and including non-linear message passing. With these two innovations, Equiformer achieves competitive results to previous models on QM9, MD17 and OC20 datasets.
abstract_zh: 尽管 Transformer 网络在各个领域取得了广泛的成功，但即使考虑到平移不变性和旋转等变性等与 3D 相关的归纳偏差，Transformer 网络在分子等 3D 原子图领域的数据集上也尚未表现良好。 In this paper, we demonstrate that Transformers can generalize well to 3D atomistic graphs and present Equiformer, a graph neural network leveraging the strength of Transformer architectures and incorporating SE(3)/E(3)-equivariant features based on irreducible representations (irreps).首先，我们提出了一种简单而有效的架构，仅用其等变对应物替换 Transformer 中的原始操作并包含张量积。 Using equivariant operations enables encoding equivariant information in channels of irreps features without complicating graph structures. With minimal modifications to Transformers, this architecture has already achieved strong empirical results.其次，我们提出了一种称为等变图注意力的新颖注意力机制，它通过用多层感知器注意力取代点积注意力并包括非线性消息传递来改进 Transformer 中的典型注意力。 With these two innovations, Equiformer achieves competitive results to previous models on QM9, MD17 and OC20 datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Equiformer模型，通过结合Transformer架构与SE(3)/E(3)等变特征，解决3D原子图（如分子）建模中的性能不足问题。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer在3D原子图任务（如分子预测）中表现不佳，即使引入平移不变性等先验知识，因此需设计适应3D结构的等变图神经网络。
AI.method: 将Transformer操作替换为等变版本并引入张量积，设计基于不可约表示的等变信息编码；提出多层感知机注意力机制替代点积注意力，结合非线性消息传递。
AI.result: 在QM9、MD17和OC20数据集上，Equiformer达到与现有模型相当的性能，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: Equiformer通过等变操作与改进注意力机制，成功将Transformer扩展至3D原子图领域，为分子建模提供新方法。
