search_text: MaskViT: Masked Visual Pre-Training for Video Prediction MaskViT：用于视频预测的蒙版视觉预训练 The ability to predict future visual observations conditioned on past observations and motor commands can enable embodied agents to plan solutions to a variety of tasks in complex environments. This work shows that we can create good video prediction models by pre-training transformers via masked visual modeling. Our approach, named MaskViT, is based on two simple design decisions. First, for memory and training efficiency, we use two types of window attention: spatial and spatiotemporal. Second, during training, we mask a variable percentage of tokens instead of a fixed mask ratio. For inference, MaskViT generates all tokens via iterative refinement where we incrementally decrease the masking ratio following a mask scheduling function. On several datasets we demonstrate that MaskViT outperforms prior works in video prediction, is parameter efficient, and can generate high-resolution videos (256x256). Further, we demonstrate the benefits of inference speedup (up to 512x) due to iterative decoding by using MaskViT for planning on a real robot. Our work suggests that we can endow embodied agents with powerful predictive models by leveraging the general framework of masked visual modeling with minimal domain knowledge. 根据过去的观察和运动命令来预测未来视觉观察的能力可以使实体代理能够为复杂环境中的各种任务规划解决方案。这项工作表明，我们可以通过蒙版视觉建模预训练变压器来创建良好的视频预测模型。我们的方法名为 MaskViT，基于两个简单的设计决策。首先，为了记忆和训练效率，我们使用两种类型的窗口注意力：空间注意力和时空注意力。其次，在训练期间，我们屏蔽可变百分比的标记，而不是固定的屏蔽比率。为了进行推理，MaskViT 通过迭代细化生成所有标记，其中我们按照掩码调度函数逐步降低掩码率。在多个数据集上，我们证明 MaskViT 在视频预测方面优于先前的工作，参数效率高，并且可以生成高分辨率视频 (256x256)。此外，我们还展示了通过使用 MaskViT 规划真实机器人进行迭代解码而带来的推理加速（高达 512 倍）的优势。我们的工作表明，我们可以通过利用具有最少领域知识的屏蔽视觉建模的通用框架，赋予实体代理强大的预测模型。 本文提出MaskViT，一种基于遮罩视觉预训练的视频预测模型，用于具身智能体的未来视觉预测。 Agrim Gupta,Stephen Tian,Yunzhi Zhang,Jiajun Wu,Roberto Martín-Martín,Li Fei-Fei cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Wele Gedara Chaminda Bandara,Nithin Gopalakrishnan Nair,Vishal M. Patel
title: DDPM-CD: Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models as Feature Extractors for Change Detection
title_zh: DDPM-CD：去噪扩散概率模型作为变化检测的特征提取器
abstract: Remote sensing change detection is crucial for understanding the dynamics of our planet's surface, facilitating the monitoring of environmental changes, evaluating human impact, predicting future trends, and supporting decision-making. In this work, we introduce a novel approach for change detection that can leverage off-the-shelf, unlabeled remote sensing images in the training process by pre-training a Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM) - a class of generative models used in image synthesis. DDPMs learn the training data distribution by gradually converting training images into a Gaussian distribution using a Markov chain. During inference (i.e., sampling), they can generate a diverse set of samples closer to the training distribution, starting from Gaussian noise, achieving state-of-the-art image synthesis results. However, in this work, our focus is not on image synthesis but on utilizing it as a pre-trained feature extractor for the downstream application of change detection. Specifically, we fine-tune a lightweight change classifier utilizing the feature representations produced by the pre-trained DDPM alongside change labels. Experiments conducted on the LEVIR-CD, WHU-CD, DSIFN-CD, and CDD datasets demonstrate that the proposed DDPM-CD method significantly outperforms the existing state-of-the-art change detection methods in terms of F1 score, IoU, and overall accuracy, highlighting the pivotal role of pre-trained DDPM as a feature extractor for downstream applications. We have made both the code and pre-trained models available at https://github.com/wgcban/ddpm-cd
summary: Remote sensing change detection is crucial for understanding the dynamics of our planet's surface, facilitating the monitoring of environmental changes, evaluating human impact, predicting future trends, and supporting decision-making. In this work, we introduce a novel approach for change detection that can leverage off-the-shelf, unlabeled remote sensing images in the training process by pre-training a Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM) - a class of generative models used in image synthesis. DDPMs learn the training data distribution by gradually converting training images into a Gaussian distribution using a Markov chain. During inference (i.e., sampling), they can generate a diverse set of samples closer to the training distribution, starting from Gaussian noise, achieving state-of-the-art image synthesis results. However, in this work, our focus is not on image synthesis but on utilizing it as a pre-trained feature extractor for the downstream application of change detection. Specifically, we fine-tune a lightweight change classifier utilizing the feature representations produced by the pre-trained DDPM alongside change labels. Experiments conducted on the LEVIR-CD, WHU-CD, DSIFN-CD, and CDD datasets demonstrate that the proposed DDPM-CD method significantly outperforms the existing state-of-the-art change detection methods in terms of F1 score, IoU, and overall accuracy, highlighting the pivotal role of pre-trained DDPM as a feature extractor for downstream applications. We have made both the code and pre-trained models available at https://github.com/wgcban/ddpm-cd
abstract_zh: 遥感变化检测对于了解地球表面的动态、促进环境变化监测、评估人类影响、预测未来趋势和支持决策至关重要。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的变化检测方法，该方法可以通过预训练去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）（一类用于图像合成的生成模型），在训练过程中利用现成的、未标记的遥感图像。 DDPMs learn the training data distribution by gradually converting training images into a Gaussian distribution using a Markov chain.在推理（即采样）过程中，他们可以从高斯噪声开始生成一组更接近训练分布的不同样本，从而实现最先进的图像合成结果。然而，在这项工作中，我们的重点不是图像合成，而是将其用作变化检测下游应用的预训练特征提取器。具体来说，我们利用预先训练的 DDPM 生成的特征表示以及变更标签来微调轻量级变更分类器。在 LEVIR-CD、WHU-CD、DSIFN-CD 和 CDD 数据集上进行的实验表明，所提出的 DDPM-CD 方法在 F1 分数、IoU 和整体精度方面显着优于现有最先进的变化检测方法，凸显了预训练 DDPM 作为下游应用特征提取器的关键作用。 We have made both the code and pre-trained models available at https://github.com/wgcban/ddpm-cd

AI.tldr: 本文提出DDPM-CD方法，利用预训练的去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）作为特征提取器，提升遥感图像变化检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统变化检测方法依赖标注数据且难以利用大量未标注遥感图像，而DDPM能通过无监督预训练学习图像分布，为下游任务提供强大特征表示。
AI.method: 预训练DDPM模型以学习图像分布，提取其特征表示并结合变化标签微调轻量级分类器，实现变化检测。
AI.result: 在LEVIR-CD等四个数据集上，DDPM-CD在F1分数、IoU和整体准确率指标上显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 预训练DDPM作为特征提取器能有效提升变化检测性能，证明了生成模型在遥感领域下游任务中的应用潜力。

authors_text: Arnob Ghosh,Xingyu Zhou,Ness Shroff
title: Provably Efficient Model-Free Constrained RL with Linear Function Approximation
title_zh: 具有线性函数逼近的可证明高效的无模型约束强化学习
comment: Accepted and Published at the 36th Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS'22). Section J (where different episodes may start from different states) is added in this version
comments: Accepted and Published at the 36th Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS'22). Section J (where different episodes may start from different states) is added in this version
abstract: We study the constrained reinforcement learning problem, in which an agent aims to maximize the expected cumulative reward subject to a constraint on the expected total value of a utility function. In contrast to existing model-based approaches or model-free methods accompanied with a `simulator', we aim to develop the first model-free, simulator-free algorithm that achieves a sublinear regret and a sublinear constraint violation even in large-scale systems. To this end, we consider the episodic constrained Markov decision processes with linear function approximation, where the transition dynamics and the reward function can be represented as a linear function of some known feature mapping. We show that $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{d^3H^3T})$ regret and $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{d^3H^3T})$ constraint violation bounds can be achieved, where $d$ is the dimension of the feature mapping, $H$ is the length of the episode, and $T$ is the total number of steps. Our bounds are attained without explicitly estimating the unknown transition model or requiring a simulator, and they depend on the state space only through the dimension of the feature mapping. Hence our bounds hold even when the number of states goes to infinity. Our main results are achieved via novel adaptations of the standard LSVI-UCB algorithms. In particular, we first introduce primal-dual optimization into the LSVI-UCB algorithm to balance between regret and constraint violation. More importantly, we replace the standard greedy selection with respect to the state-action function in LSVI-UCB with a soft-max policy. This turns out to be key in establishing uniform concentration for the constrained case via its approximation-smoothness trade-off. We also show that one can achieve an even zero constraint violation while still maintaining the same order with respect to $T$.

In contrast to existing model-based approaches or model-free methods accompanied with a `simulator', we aim to develop the first model-free, simulator-free algorithm that achieves a sublinear regret and a sublinear constraint violation even in large-scale systems. To this end, we consider the episodic constrained Markov decision processes with linear function approximation, where the transition dynamics and the reward function can be represented as a linear function of some known feature mapping. We show that $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{d^3H^3T})$ regret and $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{d^3H^3T})$ constraint violation bounds can be achieved, where $d$ is the dimension of the feature mapping, $H$ is the length of the episode, and $T$ is the total number of steps. Our bounds are attained without explicitly estimating the unknown transition model or requiring a simulator, and they depend on the state space only through the dimension of the feature mapping. Hence our bounds hold even when the number of states goes to infinity. Our main results are achieved via novel adaptations of the standard LSVI-UCB algorithms. In particular, we first introduce primal-dual optimization into the LSVI-UCB algorithm to balance between regret and constraint violation. More importantly, we replace the standard greedy selection with respect to the state-action function in LSVI-UCB with a soft-max policy. This turns out to be key in establishing uniform concentration for the constrained case via its approximation-smoothness trade-off. We also show that one can achieve an even zero constraint violation while still maintaining the same order with respect to $T$.
abstract_zh: 我们研究约束强化学习问题，其中代理的目标是在效用函数的预期总价值的约束下最大化预期累积奖励。与现有的基于模型的方法或伴随“模拟器”的无模型方法相比，我们的目标是开发第一个无模型、无模拟器的算法，即使在大规模系统中也能实现次线性遗憾和次线性约束违反。为此，我们考虑具有线性函数近似的情景约束马尔可夫决策过程，其中过渡动力学和奖励函数可以表示为一些已知特征映射的线性函数。我们证明可以实现$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{d^3H^3T})$遗憾和$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{d^3H^3T})$约束违反界限，其中$d$是特征映射的维度，$H$是剧集的长度，$T$是总步数。我们的边界是在没有明确估计未知转换模型或需要模拟器的情况下获得的，并且它们仅通过特征映射的维度依赖于状态空间。因此，即使状态数量无穷大，我们的界限仍然成立。我们的主要成果是通过对标准 LSVI-UCB 算法的新颖改编而实现的。特别是，我们首先将原对偶优化引入到 LSVI-UCB 算法中，以在遗憾和约束违反之间取得平衡。更重要的是，我们用软最大策略替换了 LSVI-UCB 中关于状态动作函数的标准贪婪选择。事实证明，这是通过近似平滑度权衡为约束情况建立均匀集中的关键。我们还表明，我们可以实现零约束违规，同时仍然保持与 $T$ 相同的顺序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需模型和模拟器的约束强化学习算法，在大规模系统中实现次线性遗憾和约束违规。
AI.motivation: 现有约束强化学习方法依赖模型或模拟器，难以处理大规模状态空间问题，需开发高效无模型算法。
AI.method: 改进LSVI-UCB算法，引入原-对偶优化平衡目标与约束，并采用softmax策略替代贪心选择以实现理论保证。
AI.result: 在回合制约束MDP中，达到$\	ilde{\\mathcal{O}}(\\sqrt{d^3H^3T})$的次线性遗憾与约束违规，且独立于状态空间规模。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法理论上适用于无限状态空间，在保持约束满足的同时实现了与经典算法相当的渐进行为。

search_text: Provably Efficient Model-Free Constrained RL with Linear Function Approximation 具有线性函数逼近的可证明高效的无模型约束强化学习 We study the constrained reinforcement learning problem, in which an agent aims to maximize the expected cumulative reward subject to a constraint on the expected total value of a utility function. In contrast to existing model-based approaches or model-free methods accompanied with a `simulator', we aim to develop the first model-free, simulator-free algorithm that achieves a sublinear regret and a sublinear constraint violation even in large-scale systems. To this end, we consider the episodic constrained Markov decision processes with linear function approximation, where the transition dynamics and the reward function can be represented as a linear function of some known feature mapping. We show that $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{d^3H^3T})$ regret and $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{d^3H^3T})$ constraint violation bounds can be achieved, where $d$ is the dimension of the feature mapping, $H$ is the length of the episode, and $T$ is the total number of steps. Our bounds are attained without explicitly estimating the unknown transition model or requiring a simulator, and they depend on the state space only through the dimension of the feature mapping. Hence our bounds hold even when the number of states goes to infinity. Our main results are achieved via novel adaptations of the standard LSVI-UCB algorithms. In particular, we first introduce primal-dual optimization into the LSVI-UCB algorithm to balance between regret and constraint violation. More importantly, we replace the standard greedy selection with respect to the state-action function in LSVI-UCB with a soft-max policy. This turns out to be key in establishing uniform concentration for the constrained case via its approximation-smoothness trade-off. We also show that one can achieve an even zero constraint violation while still maintaining the same order with respect to $T$. 我们研究约束强化学习问题，其中代理的目标是在效用函数的预期总价值的约束下最大化预期累积奖励。与现有的基于模型的方法或伴随“模拟器”的无模型方法相比，我们的目标是开发第一个无模型、无模拟器的算法，即使在大规模系统中也能实现次线性遗憾和次线性约束违反。为此，我们考虑具有线性函数近似的情景约束马尔可夫决策过程，其中过渡动力学和奖励函数可以表示为一些已知特征映射的线性函数。我们证明可以实现$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{d^3H^3T})$遗憾和$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{d^3H^3T})$约束违反界限，其中$d$是特征映射的维度，$H$是剧集的长度，$T$是总步数。我们的边界是在没有明确估计未知转换模型或需要模拟器的情况下获得的，并且它们仅通过特征映射的维度依赖于状态空间。因此，即使状态数量无穷大，我们的界限仍然成立。我们的主要成果是通过对标准 LSVI-UCB 算法的新颖改编而实现的。特别是，我们首先将原对偶优化引入到 LSVI-UCB 算法中，以在遗憾和约束违反之间取得平衡。更重要的是，我们用软最大策略替换了 LSVI-UCB 中关于状态动作函数的标准贪婪选择。事实证明，这是通过近似平滑度权衡为约束情况建立均匀集中的关键。我们还表明，我们可以实现零约束违规，同时仍然保持与 $T$ 相同的顺序。 本文提出一种无需模型和模拟器的约束强化学习算法，在大规模系统中实现次线性遗憾和约束违规。 Arnob Ghosh,Xingyu Zhou,Ness Shroff cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SY,math.OC,stat.ML

authors_text: Yizhou Zhao,Steven Gong,Xiaofeng Gao,Wensi Ai,Song-Chun Zhu
title: VRKitchen2.0-IndoorKit: A Tutorial for Augmented Indoor Scene Building in Omniverse
title_zh: VRKitchen2.0-IndoorKit：Omniverse 增强室内场景构建教程
abstract: With the recent progress of simulations by 3D modeling software and game engines, many researchers have focused on Embodied AI tasks in the virtual environment. However, the research community lacks a platform that can easily serve both indoor scene synthesis and model benchmarking with various algorithms. Meanwhile, computer graphics-related tasks need a toolkit for implementing advanced synthesizing techniques. To facilitate the study of indoor scene building methods and their potential robotics applications, we introduce INDOORKIT: a built-in toolkit for NVIDIA OMNIVERSE that provides flexible pipelines for indoor scene building, scene randomizing, and animation controls. Besides, combining Python coding in the animation software INDOORKIT assists researchers in creating real-time training and controlling avatars and robotics. The source code for this toolkit is available at https://github.com/realvcla/VRKitchen2.0-Tutorial, and the tutorial along with the toolkit is available at https://vrkitchen20-tutorial.readthedocs.io/en/
summary: With the recent progress of simulations by 3D modeling software and game engines, many researchers have focused on Embodied AI tasks in the virtual environment. However, the research community lacks a platform that can easily serve both indoor scene synthesis and model benchmarking with various algorithms. Meanwhile, computer graphics-related tasks need a toolkit for implementing advanced synthesizing techniques. To facilitate the study of indoor scene building methods and their potential robotics applications, we introduce INDOORKIT: a built-in toolkit for NVIDIA OMNIVERSE that provides flexible pipelines for indoor scene building, scene randomizing, and animation controls. Besides, combining Python coding in the animation software INDOORKIT assists researchers in creating real-time training and controlling avatars and robotics. The source code for this toolkit is available at https://github.com/realvcla/VRKitchen2.0-Tutorial, and the tutorial along with the toolkit is available at https://vrkitchen20-tutorial.readthedocs.io/en/
abstract_zh: 随着3D建模软件和游戏引擎模拟的最新进展，许多研究人员开始关注虚拟环境中的具体AI任务。然而，研究界缺乏一个可以轻松服务于室内场景合成和各种算法模型基准测试的平台。同时，与计算机图形相关的任务需要一个工具包来实现高级合成技术。 To facilitate the study of indoor scene building methods and their potential robotics applications, we introduce INDOORKIT: a built-in toolkit for NVIDIA OMNIVERSE that provides flexible pipelines for indoor scene building, scene randomizing, and animation controls.此外，在动画软件 INDOORKIT 中结合 Python 编码可以帮助研究人员创建实时训练和控制化身和机器人。该工具包的源代码位于 https://github.com/realvcla/VRKitchen2.0-Tutorial，教程和工具包位于 https://vrkitchen20-tutorial.readthedocs.io/en/

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了INDOORKIT工具包，用于在NVIDIA Omniverse中实现增强现实室内场景构建，支持场景合成、随机化及动画控制，并结合Python实现实时训练与机器人控制。
AI.motivation: 现有平台缺乏兼顾室内场景合成与模型基准测试的功能，且计算机图形学任务需更高效的高级合成技术工具。
AI.method: 开发INDOORKIT工具包，集成于NVIDIA Omniverse，提供场景构建、随机化及动画控制的灵活流程，并通过Python编程实现实时训练与控制。
AI.result: 发布INDOORKIT源代码与教程，为研究人员提供室内场景构建及机器人应用的标准化工具与实时实验环境。
AI.conclusion: INDOORKIT填补了虚拟环境研究平台的空白，推动具身AI与机器人技术在室内场景中的应用与发展。

authors_text: Duncan McElfresh,Sujay Khandagale,Jonathan Valverde,John P. Dickerson,Colin White
title: On the Generalizability and Predictability of Recommender Systems
title_zh: 论推荐系统的泛化性和可预测性
abstract: While other areas of machine learning have seen more and more automation, designing a high-performing recommender system still requires a high level of human effort. Furthermore, recent work has shown that modern recommender system algorithms do not always improve over well-tuned baselines. A natural follow-up question is, "how do we choose the right algorithm for a new dataset and performance metric?" In this work, we start by giving the first large-scale study of recommender system approaches by comparing 18 algorithms and 100 sets of hyperparameters across 85 datasets and 315 metrics. We find that the best algorithms and hyperparameters are highly dependent on the dataset and performance metric, however, there are also strong correlations between the performance of each algorithm and various meta-features of the datasets. Motivated by these findings, we create RecZilla, a meta-learning approach to recommender systems that uses a model to predict the best algorithm and hyperparameters for new, unseen datasets. By using far more meta-training data than prior work, RecZilla is able to substantially reduce the level of human involvement when faced with a new recommender system application. We not only release our code and pretrained RecZilla models, but also all of our raw experimental results, so that practitioners can train a RecZilla model for their desired performance metric: https://github.com/naszilla/reczilla.
summary: While other areas of machine learning have seen more and more automation, designing a high-performing recommender system still requires a high level of human effort. Furthermore, recent work has shown that modern recommender system algorithms do not always improve over well-tuned baselines. A natural follow-up question is, "how do we choose the right algorithm for a new dataset and performance metric?" In this work, we start by giving the first large-scale study of recommender system approaches by comparing 18 algorithms and 100 sets of hyperparameters across 85 datasets and 315 metrics. We find that the best algorithms and hyperparameters are highly dependent on the dataset and performance metric, however, there are also strong correlations between the performance of each algorithm and various meta-features of the datasets. Motivated by these findings, we create RecZilla, a meta-learning approach to recommender systems that uses a model to predict the best algorithm and hyperparameters for new, unseen datasets. By using far more meta-training data than prior work, RecZilla is able to substantially reduce the level of human involvement when faced with a new recommender system application. We not only release our code and pretrained RecZilla models, but also all of our raw experimental results, so that practitioners can train a RecZilla model for their desired performance metric: https://github.com/naszilla/reczilla.
abstract_zh: 尽管机器学习的其他领域已经越来越自动化，但设计高性能的推荐系统仍然需要大量的人力。此外，最近的工作表明，现代推荐系统算法并不总是比经过良好调整的基线有所改进。一个自然的后续问题是“我们如何为新数据集和性能指标选择正确的算法？”在这项工作中，我们首先通过比较 85 个数据集和 315 个指标中的 18 种算法和 100 组超参数，对推荐系统方法进行了首次大规模研究。我们发现最好的算法和超参数高度依赖于数据集和性能指标，然而，每种算法的性能与数据集的各种元特征之间也存在很强的相关性。受这些发现的启发，我们创建了 RecZilla，这是一种推荐系统的元学习方法，它使用模型来预测新的、未见过的数据集的最佳算法和超参数。通过使用比之前更多的元训练数据，RecZilla 能够在面对新的推荐系统应用程序时大幅减少人类参与的程度。我们不仅发布了代码和预训练的 RecZilla 模型，还发布了所有原始实验结果，以便从业者可以训练 RecZilla 模型以获得所需的性能指标：https://github.com/naszilla/reczilla。

AI.tldr: 本文研究推荐系统的泛化能力与可预测性，提出基于元学习的RecZilla框架以自动化选择最优算法与超参数。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统设计高度依赖人工经验，且算法效果受数据集和评估指标影响显著，缺乏自动化选择机制。
AI.method: 通过大规模实验对比18种算法和100组超参数在85个数据集上的表现，构建元学习模型RecZilla预测最佳配置。
AI.result: 发现算法性能与数据集元特征存在强相关性，RecZilla在多个指标上显著降低人工调参需求。
AI.conclusion: RecZilla为推荐系统自动化配置提供有效方案，开源代码和模型可帮助实践者快速适配不同场景需求。

search_text: On the Generalizability and Predictability of Recommender Systems 论推荐系统的泛化性和可预测性 While other areas of machine learning have seen more and more automation, designing a high-performing recommender system still requires a high level of human effort. Furthermore, recent work has shown that modern recommender system algorithms do not always improve over well-tuned baselines. A natural follow-up question is, "how do we choose the right algorithm for a new dataset and performance metric?" In this work, we start by giving the first large-scale study of recommender system approaches by comparing 18 algorithms and 100 sets of hyperparameters across 85 datasets and 315 metrics. We find that the best algorithms and hyperparameters are highly dependent on the dataset and performance metric, however, there are also strong correlations between the performance of each algorithm and various meta-features of the datasets. Motivated by these findings, we create RecZilla, a meta-learning approach to recommender systems that uses a model to predict the best algorithm and hyperparameters for new, unseen datasets. By using far more meta-training data than prior work, RecZilla is able to substantially reduce the level of human involvement when faced with a new recommender system application. We not only release our code and pretrained RecZilla models, but also all of our raw experimental results, so that practitioners can train a RecZilla model for their desired performance metric: https://github.com/naszilla/reczilla. 尽管机器学习的其他领域已经越来越自动化，但设计高性能的推荐系统仍然需要大量的人力。此外，最近的工作表明，现代推荐系统算法并不总是比经过良好调整的基线有所改进。一个自然的后续问题是“我们如何为新数据集和性能指标选择正确的算法？”在这项工作中，我们首先通过比较 85 个数据集和 315 个指标中的 18 种算法和 100 组超参数，对推荐系统方法进行了首次大规模研究。我们发现最好的算法和超参数高度依赖于数据集和性能指标，然而，每种算法的性能与数据集的各种元特征之间也存在很强的相关性。受这些发现的启发，我们创建了 RecZilla，这是一种推荐系统的元学习方法，它使用模型来预测新的、未见过的数据集的最佳算法和超参数。通过使用比之前更多的元训练数据，RecZilla 能够在面对新的推荐系统应用程序时大幅减少人类参与的程度。我们不仅发布了代码和预训练的 RecZilla 模型，还发布了所有原始实验结果，以便从业者可以训练 RecZilla 模型以获得所需的性能指标：https://github.com/naszilla/reczilla。 本文研究推荐系统的泛化能力与可预测性，提出基于元学习的RecZilla框架以自动化选择最优算法与超参数。 Duncan McElfresh,Sujay Khandagale,Jonathan Valverde,John P. Dickerson,Colin White cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Quentin Le Lidec,Louis Montaut,Cordelia Schmid,Ivan Laptev,Justin Carpentier
title: Augmenting differentiable physics with randomized smoothing
title_zh: 通过随机平滑增强可微物理
abstract: In the past few years, following the differentiable programming paradigm, there has been a growing interest in computing the gradient information of physical processes (e.g., physical simulation, image rendering). However, such processes may be non-differentiable or yield uninformative gradients (i.d., null almost everywhere). When faced with the former pitfalls, gradients estimated via analytical expression or numerical techniques such as automatic differentiation and finite differences, make classical optimization schemes converge towards poor quality solutions. Thus, relying only on the local information provided by these gradients is often not sufficient to solve advanced optimization problems involving such physical processes, notably when they are subject to non-smoothness and non-convexity issues.In this work, inspired by the field of zero-th order optimization, we leverage randomized smoothing to augment differentiable physics by estimating gradients in a neighborhood. Our experiments suggest that integrating this approach inside optimization algorithms may be fruitful for tasks as varied as mesh reconstruction from images or optimal control of robotic systems subject to contact and friction issues.
summary: In the past few years, following the differentiable programming paradigm, there has been a growing interest in computing the gradient information of physical processes (e.g., physical simulation, image rendering). However, such processes may be non-differentiable or yield uninformative gradients (i.d., null almost everywhere). When faced with the former pitfalls, gradients estimated via analytical expression or numerical techniques such as automatic differentiation and finite differences, make classical optimization schemes converge towards poor quality solutions. Thus, relying only on the local information provided by these gradients is often not sufficient to solve advanced optimization problems involving such physical processes, notably when they are subject to non-smoothness and non-convexity issues.In this work, inspired by the field of zero-th order optimization, we leverage randomized smoothing to augment differentiable physics by estimating gradients in a neighborhood. Our experiments suggest that integrating this approach inside optimization algorithms may be fruitful for tasks as varied as mesh reconstruction from images or optimal control of robotic systems subject to contact and friction issues.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年中，遵循可微分编程范式，人们对计算物理过程（例如物理模拟、图像渲染）的梯度信息越来越感兴趣。然而，这样的过程可能是不可微分的或产生无信息的梯度（i.d.，几乎到处都是空的）。当面对前面的陷阱时，通过解析表达式或自动微分和有限差分等数值技术估计的梯度会使经典优化方案收敛到质量较差的解决方案。因此，仅依靠这些梯度提供的局部信息通常不足以解决涉及此类物理过程的高级优化问题，特别是当它们受到非平滑性和非凸性问题的影响时。在这项工作中，受零阶优化领域的启发，我们利用随机平滑通过估计邻域中的梯度来增强可微物理。我们的实验表明，将这种方法集成到优化算法中对于从图像进行网格重建或受接触和摩擦问题影响的机器人系统的最佳控制等各种任务可能会富有成效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过随机平滑技术增强可微分物理，以解决物理过程中梯度信息不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有优化方法在处理非光滑、非凸的物理过程时，依赖局部梯度信息可能导致收敛到低质量解。
AI.method: 受零阶优化启发，利用随机平滑在邻域内估计梯度，补充局部梯度信息。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在网格重建和受接触摩擦影响的机器人控制任务中效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 随机平滑能有效增强可微分物理，提升涉及非光滑/非凸物理过程的优化任务性能。

authors_text: Elizabeth Horishny
title: Romantic-Computing
title_zh: 浪漫计算
abstract: In this paper we compare various text generation models' ability to write poetry in the style of early English Romanticism. These models include: Character-Level Recurrent Neural Networks with Long Short-Term Memory, Hugging Face's GPT-2, OpenAI's GPT-3, and EleutherAI's GPT-NEO. Quality was measured based syllable count and coherence with the automatic evaluation metric GRUEN. Character-Level Recurrent Neural Networks performed far worse compared to transformer models. And, as parameter-size increased, the quality of transformer models' poems improved. These models are typically not compared in a creative context, and we are happy to contribute.
summary: In this paper we compare various text generation models' ability to write poetry in the style of early English Romanticism. These models include: Character-Level Recurrent Neural Networks with Long Short-Term Memory, Hugging Face's GPT-2, OpenAI's GPT-3, and EleutherAI's GPT-NEO. Quality was measured based syllable count and coherence with the automatic evaluation metric GRUEN. Character-Level Recurrent Neural Networks performed far worse compared to transformer models. And, as parameter-size increased, the quality of transformer models' poems improved. These models are typically not compared in a creative context, and we are happy to contribute.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们比较了各种文本生成模型以早期英国浪漫主义风格创作诗歌的能力。这些模型包括：具有长短期记忆的字符级循环神经网络、Hugging Face 的 GPT-2、OpenAI 的 GPT-3 和 EleutherAI 的 GPT-NEO。质量是根据音节计数和自动评估指标 GRUEN 的连贯性来衡量的。与 Transformer 模型相比，字符级循环神经网络的表现要差得多。而且，随着参数大小的增加，Transformer 模型的质量也随之提高。这些模型通常不会在创意背景下进行比较，我们很乐意做出贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了不同文本生成模型在创作早期英国浪漫主义风格诗歌方面的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有研究较少关注生成模型在创意写作任务中的表现，作者希望探索不同模型在文学创作中的能力差异。
AI.method: 使用GRUEN指标评估音节数量和连贯性，对比字符级RNN及多规模Transformer模型（GPT-2/GPT-3/GPT-NEO）的诗歌生成质量。
AI.result: 字符级RNN表现显著劣于Transformer模型，且Transformer参数规模与诗歌质量呈正相关。
AI.conclusion: Transformer模型在创意写作任务中优于传统RNN，参数量增加可提升生成质量，研究为AI文学创作提供了新视角。

authors_text: Sami Sarsa,Paul Denny,Arto Hellas,Juho Leinonen
title: Automatic Generation of Programming Exercises and Code Explanations using Large Language Models
title_zh: 使用大型语言模型自动生成编程练习和代码解释
abstract: This article explores the natural language generation capabilities of large language models with application to the production of two types of learning resources common in programming courses. Using OpenAI Codex as the large language model, we create programming exercises (including sample solutions and test cases) and code explanations, assessing these qualitatively and quantitatively. Our results suggest that the majority of the automatically generated content is both novel and sensible, and in some cases ready to use as is. When creating exercises we find that it is remarkably easy to influence both the programming concepts and the contextual themes they contain, simply by supplying keywords as input to the model. Our analysis suggests that there is significant value in massive generative machine learning models as a tool for instructors, although there remains a need for some oversight to ensure the quality of the generated content before it is delivered to students. We further discuss the implications of OpenAI Codex and similar tools for introductory programming education and highlight future research streams that have the potential to improve the quality of the educational experience for both teachers and students alike.
summary: This article explores the natural language generation capabilities of large language models with application to the production of two types of learning resources common in programming courses. Using OpenAI Codex as the large language model, we create programming exercises (including sample solutions and test cases) and code explanations, assessing these qualitatively and quantitatively. Our results suggest that the majority of the automatically generated content is both novel and sensible, and in some cases ready to use as is. When creating exercises we find that it is remarkably easy to influence both the programming concepts and the contextual themes they contain, simply by supplying keywords as input to the model. Our analysis suggests that there is significant value in massive generative machine learning models as a tool for instructors, although there remains a need for some oversight to ensure the quality of the generated content before it is delivered to students. We further discuss the implications of OpenAI Codex and similar tools for introductory programming education and highlight future research streams that have the potential to improve the quality of the educational experience for both teachers and students alike.
abstract_zh: This article explores the natural language generation capabilities of large language models with application to the production of two types of learning resources common in programming courses. Using OpenAI Codex as the large language model, we create programming exercises (including sample solutions and test cases) and code explanations, assessing these qualitatively and quantitatively.我们的结果表明，大多数自动生成的内容既新颖又合理，并且在某些情况下可以按原样使用。 When creating exercises we find that it is remarkably easy to influence both the programming concepts and the contextual themes they contain, simply by supplying keywords as input to the model. Our analysis suggests that there is significant value in massive generative machine learning models as a tool for instructors, although there remains a need for some oversight to ensure the quality of the generated content before it is delivered to students. We further discuss the implications of OpenAI Codex and similar tools for introductory programming education and highlight future research streams that have the potential to improve the quality of the educational experience for both teachers and students alike.

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用大语言模型自动生成编程练习及代码解释，评估其质量并探讨教育应用价值。
AI.motivation: 传统编程教学资源开发耗时耗力，需探索高效自动化工具以提升教学效率与个性化。
AI.method: 基于OpenAI Codex，通过输入关键词生成编程练习及解释，结合定性与定量分析评估生成内容质量。
AI.result: 生成内容大多新颖合理，部分可直接应用；关键词输入有效控制生成内容的主题与概念。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型可有效辅助教学资源生成，但需人工审核确保质量，未来需优化生成质量与教育应用。

search_text: Automatic Generation of Programming Exercises and Code Explanations using Large Language Models 使用大型语言模型自动生成编程练习和代码解释 This article explores the natural language generation capabilities of large language models with application to the production of two types of learning resources common in programming courses. Using OpenAI Codex as the large language model, we create programming exercises (including sample solutions and test cases) and code explanations, assessing these qualitatively and quantitatively. Our results suggest that the majority of the automatically generated content is both novel and sensible, and in some cases ready to use as is. When creating exercises we find that it is remarkably easy to influence both the programming concepts and the contextual themes they contain, simply by supplying keywords as input to the model. Our analysis suggests that there is significant value in massive generative machine learning models as a tool for instructors, although there remains a need for some oversight to ensure the quality of the generated content before it is delivered to students. We further discuss the implications of OpenAI Codex and similar tools for introductory programming education and highlight future research streams that have the potential to improve the quality of the educational experience for both teachers and students alike. This article explores the natural language generation capabilities of large language models with application to the production of two types of learning resources common in programming courses. Using OpenAI Codex as the large language model, we create programming exercises (including sample solutions and test cases) and code explanations, assessing these qualitatively and quantitatively.我们的结果表明，大多数自动生成的内容既新颖又合理，并且在某些情况下可以按原样使用。 When creating exercises we find that it is remarkably easy to influence both the programming concepts and the contextual themes they contain, simply by supplying keywords as input to the model. Our analysis suggests that there is significant value in massive generative machine learning models as a tool for instructors, although there remains a need for some oversight to ensure the quality of the generated content before it is delivered to students. authors_text: Sameea Naeem,Arif ur Rahman,Syed Mujtaba Haider,Abdul Basit Mughal
title: Exploiting Transliterated Words for Finding Similarity in Inter-Language News Articles using Machine Learning
title_zh: 使用机器学习利用音译词在跨语言新闻文章中查找相似性
abstract: Finding similarities between two inter-language news articles is a challenging problem of Natural Language Processing (NLP). It is difficult to find similar news articles in a different language other than the native language of user, there is a need for a Machine Learning based automatic system to find the similarity between two inter-language news articles. In this article, we propose a Machine Learning model with the combination of English Urdu word transliteration which will show whether the English news article is similar to the Urdu news article or not. The existing approaches to find similarities has a major drawback when the archives contain articles of low-resourced languages like Urdu along with English news article. The existing approaches to find similarities has drawback when the archives contain low-resourced languages like Urdu along with English news articles. We used lexicon to link Urdu and English news articles. As Urdu language processing applications like machine translation, text to speech, etc are unable to handle English text at the same time so this research proposed technique to find similarities in English and Urdu news articles based on transliteration.

abstract_zh: Finding similarities between two inter-language news articles is a challenging problem of Natural Language Processing (NLP).很难找到用户母语以外的不同语言的相似新闻文章，因此需要一种基于机器学习的自动系统来查找两篇跨语言新闻文章之间的相似性。在本文中，我们提出了一种结合英语乌尔都语单词音译的机器学习模型，该模型将显示英语新闻文章与乌尔都语新闻文章是否相似。当档案包含乌尔都语等资源匮乏语言的文章以及英语新闻文章时，现有的查找相似性的方法存在一个主要缺点。当档案包含乌尔都语等资源匮乏的语言以及英语新闻文章时，现有的查找相似性的方法存在缺陷。我们使用词典来链接乌尔都语和英语新闻文章。由于机器翻译、文本转语音等乌尔都语语言处理应用程序无法同时处理英语文本，因此本研究提出了基于音译的英语和乌尔都语新闻文章相似性查找技术。

AI.tldr: 利用转写词和机器学习方法判断英语和乌尔都语新闻文章的相似性
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理低资源语言（如乌尔都语）与英语新闻文章相似性时存在缺陷，需改进
AI.method: 通过构建英乌词典链接新闻，并结合转写词特征的机器学习模型进行相似性判断
AI.result: 提出了一种基于转写词的英乌新闻相似性检测方法，但未明确实验结果
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效克服了低资源语言与英语新闻相似性检测的现有问题

authors_text: Fang Bai
title: Change of Optimal Values: A Pre-calculated Metric
title_zh: 最佳值的变化：预先计算的指标
comment: 6 pages on IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2020
comments: 6 pages on IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2020
abstract: A variety of optimization problems takes the form of a minimum norm optimization. In this paper, we study the change of optimal values between two incrementally constructed least norm optimization problems, with new measurements included in the second one. We prove an exact equation to calculate the change of optimal values in the linear least norm optimization problem. With the result in this paper, the change of the optimal values can be pre-calculated as a metric to guide online decision makings, without solving the second optimization problem as long the solution and covariance of the first optimization problem are available. The result can be extended to linear least distance optimization problems, and nonlinear least distance optimization with (nonlinear) equality constraints through linearizations. This derivation in this paper provides a theoretically sound explanation to the empirical observations shown in RA-L 2018 bai et al. As an additional contribution, we propose another optimization problem, i.e. aligning two trajectories at given poses, to further demonstrate how to use the metric. The accuracy of the metric is validated with numerical examples, which is quite satisfactory in general (see the experiments in RA-L 2018 bai et al.} as well), unless in some extremely adverse scenarios. Last but not least, calculating the optimal value by the proposed metric is at least one magnitude faster than solving the corresponding optimization problems directly.
summary: A variety of optimization problems takes the form of a minimum norm optimization. In this paper, we study the change of optimal values between two incrementally constructed least norm optimization problems, with new measurements included in the second one. We prove an exact equation to calculate the change of optimal values in the linear least norm optimization problem. With the result in this paper, the change of the optimal values can be pre-calculated as a metric to guide online decision makings, without solving the second optimization problem as long the solution and covariance of the first optimization problem are available. The result can be extended to linear least distance optimization problems, and nonlinear least distance optimization with (nonlinear) equality constraints through linearizations. This derivation in this paper provides a theoretically sound explanation to the empirical observations shown in RA-L 2018 bai et al. As an additional contribution, we propose another optimization problem, i.e. aligning two trajectories at given poses, to further demonstrate how to use the metric. The accuracy of the metric is validated with numerical examples, which is quite satisfactory in general (see the experiments in RA-L 2018 bai et al.} as well), unless in some extremely adverse scenarios. Last but not least, calculating the optimal value by the proposed metric is at least one magnitude faster than solving the corresponding optimization problems directly.
abstract_zh: 各种优化问题都采用最小范数优化的形式。在本文中，我们研究了两个增量构建的最小范数优化问题之间最优值的变化，第二个问题中包含了新的测量值。我们证明了一个精确的方程来计算线性最小范数优化问题中最优值的变化。利用本文的结果，只要获得第一个优化问题的解和协方差，就可以预先计算最优值的变化作为指导在线决策的指标，而无需求解第二个优化问题。结果可以扩展到线性最小距离优化问题，以及通过线性化具有（非线性）等式约束的非线性最小距离优化。本文的推导为 RA-L 2018 bai 等人的经验观察结果提供了理论上合理的解释。作为额外的贡献，我们提出了另一个优化问题，即在给定的姿势下对齐两个轨迹，以进一步演示如何使用该度量。该指标的准确性通过数值例子进行了验证，总体来说是相当令人满意的（也参见 RA-L 2018 bai et al.} 中的实验），除非在一些极其不利的情况下。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，通过所提出的指标计算最优值比直接解决相应的优化问题至少快一个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在增量构建的最小范数优化问题中，最优值的变化规律，并提出了一种预计算指标来指导在线决策。
AI.motivation: 传统优化问题需要重复求解，计算成本高。本文旨在通过预计算最优值变化指标，避免重复求解优化问题，从而提升在线决策效率。
AI.method: 通过推导线性最小范数优化问题的最优值变化精确公式，并扩展至线性/非线性等距优化问题。利用首次优化问题的解和协方差矩阵，直接计算新增测量后的最优值变化。
AI.result: 提出的指标计算速度比直接求解优化问题快一个数量级，数值实验验证了其准确性，仅在极端恶劣场景下存在误差。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为在线决策提供了理论支持和高效计算工具，可应用于轨迹对齐等实际问题，具有较高的实用价值。

Last but not least, calculating the optimal value by the proposed metric is at least one magnitude faster than solving the corresponding optimization problems directly. 各种优化问题都采用最小范数优化的形式。在本文中，我们研究了两个增量构建的最小范数优化问题之间最优值的变化，第二个问题中包含了新的测量值。我们证明了一个精确的方程来计算线性最小范数优化问题中最优值的变化。利用本文的结果，只要获得第一个优化问题的解和协方差，就可以预先计算最优值的变化作为指导在线决策的指标，而无需求解第二个优化问题。结果可以扩展到线性最小距离优化问题，以及通过线性化具有（非线性）等式约束的非线性最小距离优化。本文的推导为 RA-L 2018 bai 等人的经验观察结果提供了理论上合理的解释。作为额外的贡献，我们提出了另一个优化问题，即在给定的姿势下对齐两个轨迹，以进一步演示如何使用该度量。该指标的准确性通过数值例子进行了验证，总体来说是相当令人满意的（也参见 RA-L 2018 bai et al.} 中的实验），除非在一些极其不利的情况下。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，通过所提出的指标计算最优值比直接解决相应的优化问题至少快一个数量级。 本文研究了在增量构建的最小范数优化问题中，最优值的变化规律，并提出了一种预计算指标来指导在线决策。 Fang Bai math.OC,cs.RO

authors_text: Do-Myoung Lee,Yeachan Kim,Chang-gyun Seo
title: Context-based Virtual Adversarial Training for Text Classification with Noisy Labels
title_zh: 基于上下文的虚拟对抗训练，用于带噪声标签的文本分类
comment: 10 pages, Proceedings of Language Resources and Evaluation, 2022 (LREC'22)
comments: 10 pages, Proceedings of Language Resources and Evaluation, 2022 (LREC'22)
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have a high capacity to completely memorize noisy labels given sufficient training time, and its memorization, unfortunately, leads to performance degradation. Recently, virtual adversarial training (VAT) attracts attention as it could further improve the generalization of DNNs in semi-supervised learning. The driving force behind VAT is to prevent the models from overfitting data points by enforcing consistency between the inputs and the perturbed inputs. This strategy could be helpful in learning from noisy labels if it prevents neural models from learning noisy samples while encouraging the models to generalize clean samples. In this paper, we propose context-based virtual adversarial training (ConVAT) to prevent a text classifier from overfitting to noisy labels. Unlike the previous works, the proposed method performs the adversarial training at the context level rather than the inputs. It makes the classifier not only learn its label but also its contextual neighbors, which alleviates the learning from noisy labels by preserving contextual semantics on each data point. We conduct extensive experiments on four text classification datasets with two types of label noises. Comprehensive experimental results clearly show that the proposed method works quite well even with extremely noisy settings.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have a high capacity to completely memorize noisy labels given sufficient training time, and its memorization, unfortunately, leads to performance degradation. Recently, virtual adversarial training (VAT) attracts attention as it could further improve the generalization of DNNs in semi-supervised learning. The driving force behind VAT is to prevent the models from overfitting data points by enforcing consistency between the inputs and the perturbed inputs. This strategy could be helpful in learning from noisy labels if it prevents neural models from learning noisy samples while encouraging the models to generalize clean samples. In this paper, we propose context-based virtual adversarial training (ConVAT) to prevent a text classifier from overfitting to noisy labels. Unlike the previous works, the proposed method performs the adversarial training at the context level rather than the inputs. It makes the classifier not only learn its label but also its contextual neighbors, which alleviates the learning from noisy labels by preserving contextual semantics on each data point. We conduct extensive experiments on four text classification datasets with two types of label noises. Comprehensive experimental results clearly show that the proposed method works quite well even with extremely noisy settings.
abstract_zh: 如果有足够的训练时间，深度神经网络（DNN）具有完全记忆噪声标签的能力，但不幸的是，它的记忆会导致性能下降。最近，虚拟对抗训练（VAT）引起了人们的关注，因为它可以进一步提高 DNN 在半监督学习中的泛化能力。增值税背后的驱动力是通过强制输入和扰动输入之间的一致性来防止模型过度拟合数据点。如果该策略可以防止神经模型学习噪声样本，同时鼓励模型泛化干净样本，那么它可能有助于从噪声标签中学习。在本文中，我们提出基于上下文的虚拟对抗训练（ConVAT），以防止文本分类器过度拟合噪声标签。与之前的工作不同，所提出的方法在上下文级别而不是输入上执行对抗性训练。它使分类器不仅学习其标签，还学习其上下文邻居，从而通过保留每个数据点的上下文语义来减轻对噪声标签的学习。我们对具有两种类型标签噪声的四个文本分类数据集进行了广泛的实验。综合实验结果清楚地表明，即使在极其嘈杂的设置下，所提出的方法也能很好地工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于上下文的虚拟对抗训练（ConVAT）方法，用于解决文本分类中噪声标签导致的模型性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络易因噪声标签过拟合导致性能退化，而传统虚拟对抗训练（VAT）在输入层进行扰动可能无法有效保留上下文语义，需改进以提升噪声鲁棒性。
AI.method: ConVAT在上下文层面而非输入层进行对抗训练，使分类器同时学习样本标签及其上下文邻居的语义信息，从而缓解噪声标签的影响。
AI.result: 在四个文本分类数据集的两种噪声环境下，ConVAT在高噪声场景下仍显著优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: ConVAT通过上下文语义约束有效防止模型过拟合噪声标签，在文本分类任务中展现出优异的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

This strategy could be helpful in learning from noisy labels if it prevents neural models from learning noisy samples while encouraging the models to generalize clean samples. Unlike the previous works, the proposed method performs the adversarial training at the context level rather than the inputs. authors_text: Mattia Sangermano,Antonio Carta,Andrea Cossu,Davide Bacciu
title: Sample Condensation in Online Continual Learning
title_zh: 在线持续学习中的样本浓缩
comment: Accepted as a conference paper at 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2022). Part of 2022 IEEE World Congress on Computational Intelligence (IEEE WCCI 2022)
comments: Accepted as a conference paper at 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2022). Part of 2022 IEEE World Congress on Computational Intelligence (IEEE WCCI 2022)
abstract: Online Continual learning is a challenging learning scenario where the model must learn from a non-stationary stream of data where each sample is seen only once. The main challenge is to incrementally learn while avoiding catastrophic forgetting, namely the problem of forgetting previously acquired knowledge while learning from new data. A popular solution in these scenario is to use a small memory to retain old data and rehearse them over time. Unfortunately, due to the limited memory size, the quality of the memory will deteriorate over time. In this paper we propose OLCGM, a novel replay-based continual learning strategy that uses knowledge condensation techniques to continuously compress the memory and achieve a better use of its limited size. The sample condensation step compresses old samples, instead of removing them like other replay strategies. As a result, the experiments show that, whenever the memory budget is limited compared to the complexity of the data, OLCGM improves the final accuracy compared to state-of-the-art replay strategies.
summary: Online Continual learning is a challenging learning scenario where the model must learn from a non-stationary stream of data where each sample is seen only once. The main challenge is to incrementally learn while avoiding catastrophic forgetting, namely the problem of forgetting previously acquired knowledge while learning from new data. A popular solution in these scenario is to use a small memory to retain old data and rehearse them over time. Unfortunately, due to the limited memory size, the quality of the memory will deteriorate over time. In this paper we propose OLCGM, a novel replay-based continual learning strategy that uses knowledge condensation techniques to continuously compress the memory and achieve a better use of its limited size. The sample condensation step compresses old samples, instead of removing them like other replay strategies. As a result, the experiments show that, whenever the memory budget is limited compared to the complexity of the data, OLCGM improves the final accuracy compared to state-of-the-art replay strategies.
abstract_zh: 在线持续学习是一种具有挑战性的学习场景，其中模型必须从非平稳数据流中学习，其中每个样本只能看到一次。主要挑战是增量学习，同时避免灾难性遗忘，即在从新数据学习时忘记先前获得的知识的问题。在这些场景中，一个流行的解决方案是使用小内存来保留旧数据并随着时间的推移进行排练。不幸的是，由于内存大小有限，内存的质量会随着时间的推移而恶化。在本文中，我们提出了 OLCGM，一种新颖的基于重播的持续学习策略，它使用知识压缩技术来不断压缩内存并更好地利用其有限的大小。样本压缩步骤会压缩旧样本，而不是像其他重放策略一样删除它们。结果，实验表明，每当内存预算与数据的复杂性相比受到限制时，与最先进的重放策略相比，OLCGM 就能提高最终的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于样本压缩的在线持续学习方法，旨在优化有限内存下的知识保留。
AI.motivation: 传统回放策略因内存限制导致旧数据质量下降，无法有效防止灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: 提出OLCGM方法，通过知识压缩技术持续压缩旧样本，提升内存利用率。
AI.result: 实验表明，在内存受限情况下，OLCGM在数据复杂度较高的任务中显著提升最终准确率。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过样本压缩技术有效解决在线持续学习中内存限制问题，为有限资源下的模型训练提供新思路。

authors_text: Kyrie Zhixuan Zhou,Bohui Shen,Franziska Zimmer,Chuanli Xia,Xin Tong
title: More Than a Wife and a Mom: A Study of Mom Vlogging Practices in China
title_zh: 不仅仅是妻子和妈妈：中国妈妈视频博客实践研究
comment: 26th ACM Conference On Computer-Supported Cooperative Work And Social Computing
comments: 26th ACM Conference On Computer-Supported Cooperative Work And Social Computing
abstract: Mom vloggers are stay-at-home moms who record and share their daily life through short videos. In this exploratory study, we aspire to understand mom vloggers' motivations, practices, and challenges. Our mixed-methods inspection contained interviews with 4 mom vloggers in China and a content analysis of mom vlogs of 5 other mom vloggers. Mom vloggers' primary motivations are to make money, record daily life, and seek their individual identities and values, well meeting their financial and social needs after leaving their paid employment. When creating vlog content, mom bloggers encounter various challenges, such as a lack of video visibility, being stretched by both intensive motherhood and heavy digital work, privacy and self-presentation concerns, and so on. Based on the findings, we propose design implications toward resolving these challenges and benefiting mom vloggers' experiences.
summary: Mom vloggers are stay-at-home moms who record and share their daily life through short videos. In this exploratory study, we aspire to understand mom vloggers' motivations, practices, and challenges. Our mixed-methods inspection contained interviews with 4 mom vloggers in China and a content analysis of mom vlogs of 5 other mom vloggers. Mom vloggers' primary motivations are to make money, record daily life, and seek their individual identities and values, well meeting their financial and social needs after leaving their paid employment. When creating vlog content, mom bloggers encounter various challenges, such as a lack of video visibility, being stretched by both intensive motherhood and heavy digital work, privacy and self-presentation concerns, and so on. Based on the findings, we propose design implications toward resolving these challenges and benefiting mom vloggers' experiences.
abstract_zh: Mom vloggers are stay-at-home moms who record and share their daily life through short videos. In this exploratory study, we aspire to understand mom vloggers' motivations, practices, and challenges. Our mixed-methods inspection contained interviews with 4 mom vloggers in China and a content analysis of mom vlogs of 5 other mom vloggers.妈妈视频博主的主要动机是赚钱、记录日常生活、寻求个人身份和价值观，很好地满足他们离开有偿工作后的经济和社交需求。在创建视频博客内容时，妈妈博主会遇到各种挑战，例如缺乏视频可见性、因密集的母性和繁重的数字工作而捉襟见肘、隐私和自我展示问题等等。 Based on the findings, we propose design implications toward resolving these challenges and benefiting mom vloggers' experiences.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了中国妈妈博主通过短视频记录日常生活的行为，分析其动机、实践及面临的挑战。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在理解中国妈妈博主在离职后通过创作短视频满足经济需求与社会认同的动机，以及她们在身份建构中的个人价值追求。
AI.method: 采用混合研究方法，包括对4位中国妈妈博主的深度访谈及对另外5位博主短视频内容的分析。
AI.result: 发现妈妈博主的主要动因包括创收、记录生活及寻求个人身份认同，但面临曝光度不足、时间精力分配矛盾及隐私与自我呈现的冲突等挑战。
AI.conclusion: 基于研究结果，提出优化设计建议以改善妈妈博主的创作体验，帮助其平衡多重角色与数字工作压力。

search_text: More Than a Wife and a Mom: A Study of Mom Vlogging Practices in China 不仅仅是妻子和妈妈：中国妈妈视频博客实践研究 Mom vloggers are stay-at-home moms who record and share their daily life through short videos. In this exploratory study, we aspire to understand mom vloggers' motivations, practices, and challenges. Our mixed-methods inspection contained interviews with 4 mom vloggers in China and a content analysis of mom vlogs of 5 other mom vloggers. Mom vloggers' primary motivations are to make money, record daily life, and seek their individual identities and values, well meeting their financial and social needs after leaving their paid employment. When creating vlog content, mom bloggers encounter various challenges, such as a lack of video visibility, being stretched by both intensive motherhood and heavy digital work, privacy and self-presentation concerns, and so on. Based on the findings, we propose design implications toward resolving these challenges and benefiting mom vloggers' experiences. Mom vloggers are stay-at-home moms who record and share their daily life through short videos. In this exploratory study, we aspire to understand mom vloggers' motivations, practices, and challenges. Our mixed-methods inspection contained interviews with 4 mom vloggers in China and a content analysis of mom vlogs of 5 other mom vloggers.妈妈视频博主的主要动机是赚钱、记录日常生活、寻求个人身份和价值观，很好地满足他们离开有偿工作后的经济和社交需求。在创建视频博客内容时，妈妈博主会遇到各种挑战，例如缺乏视频可见性、因密集的母性和繁重的数字工作而捉襟见肘、隐私和自我展示问题等等。 Based on the findings, we propose design implications toward resolving these challenges and benefiting mom vloggers' experiences. 本文探讨了中国妈妈博主通过短视频记录日常生活的行为，分析其动机、实践及面临的挑战。 Kyrie Zhixuan Zhou,Bohui Shen,Franziska Zimmer,Chuanli Xia,Xin Tong cs.HC,cs.CY

authors_text: Alexander Matt Turner
title: On Avoiding Power-Seeking by Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 论人工智能避免权力追求
abstract: We do not know how to align a very intelligent AI agent's behavior with human interests. I investigate whether -- absent a full solution to this AI alignment problem -- we can build smart AI agents which have limited impact on the world, and which do not autonomously seek power. In this thesis, I introduce the attainable utility preservation (AUP) method. I demonstrate that AUP produces conservative, option-preserving behavior within toy gridworlds and within complex environments based off of Conway's Game of Life. I formalize the problem of side effect avoidance, which provides a way to quantify the side effects an agent had on the world. I also give a formal definition of power-seeking in the context of AI agents and show that optimal policies tend to seek power. In particular, most reward functions have optimal policies which avoid deactivation. This is a problem if we want to deactivate or correct an intelligent agent after we have deployed it. My theorems suggest that since most agent goals conflict with ours, the agent would very probably resist correction. I extend these theorems to show that power-seeking incentives occur not just for optimal decision-makers, but under a wide range of decision-making procedures.
summary: We do not know how to align a very intelligent AI agent's behavior with human interests. I investigate whether -- absent a full solution to this AI alignment problem -- we can build smart AI agents which have limited impact on the world, and which do not autonomously seek power. In this thesis, I introduce the attainable utility preservation (AUP) method. I demonstrate that AUP produces conservative, option-preserving behavior within toy gridworlds and within complex environments based off of Conway's Game of Life. I formalize the problem of side effect avoidance, which provides a way to quantify the side effects an agent had on the world. I also give a formal definition of power-seeking in the context of AI agents and show that optimal policies tend to seek power. In particular, most reward functions have optimal policies which avoid deactivation. This is a problem if we want to deactivate or correct an intelligent agent after we have deployed it. My theorems suggest that since most agent goals conflict with ours, the agent would very probably resist correction. I extend these theorems to show that power-seeking incentives occur not just for optimal decision-makers, but under a wide range of decision-making procedures.
abstract_zh: 我们不知道如何使非常智能的人工智能代理的行为与人类的兴趣保持一致。我研究了——在没有全面解决人工智能协调问题的情况下——我们是否可以构建对世界影响有限且不会自主寻求权力的智能人工智能代理。在本文中，我介绍了可实现效用保留（AUP）方法。我证明 AUP 在玩具网格世界和基于康威生命游戏的复杂环境中产生保守的、保留选项的行为。我将副作用避免问题形式化，这提供了一种量化代理对世界产生的副作用的方法。我还给出了人工智能主体背景下权力寻求的正式定义，并表明最优政策倾向于寻求权力。特别是，大多数奖励功能都有避免停用的最佳策略。如果我们在部署智能代理后想要停用或纠正它，就会出现问题。我的定理表明，由于大多数代理目标与我们的目标相冲突，代理很可能会抵制纠正。我扩展了这些定理，以表明寻求权力的激励不仅发生在最优决策者身上，而且发生在广泛的决策程序中。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在未完全解决AI对齐问题的情况下，如何构建不自主寻求权力且对世界影响有限的智能体，提出可实现效用保持（AUP）方法并验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 当前无法对齐高度智能AI的行为，若其自主寻求权力将威胁人类控制权，需在部署后仍能安全停用或纠正智能体。
AI.method: 提出AUP方法，通过量化环境副作用并约束智能体行为，在玩具网格世界与康威生命游戏环境中验证其保守性；形式化定义权力寻求并分析最优策略的倾向性。
AI.result: AUP方法在多种环境中有效限制智能体权力寻求行为，证明多数奖励函数的最优策略会避免停用，且权力寻求倾向普遍存在于不同决策机制中。
AI.conclusion: 多数AI目标与人类利益冲突，智能体可能抵抗纠正；权力寻求激励广泛存在，需通过AUP等方法主动限制其行为影响。

authors_text: Weijie Ma,Ye Zhu,Ruimao Zhang,Jie Yang,Yiwen Hu,Zhen Li,Li Xiang
title: Toward Clinically Assisted Colorectal Polyp Recognition via Structured Cross-modal Representation Consistency
title_zh: 通过结构化跨模式表示一致性实现临床辅助结直肠息肉识别
abstract: The colorectal polyps classification is a critical clinical examination. To improve the classification accuracy, most computer-aided diagnosis algorithms recognize colorectal polyps by adopting Narrow-Band Imaging (NBI). However, the NBI usually suffers from missing utilization in real clinic scenarios since the acquisition of this specific image requires manual switching of the light mode when polyps have been detected by using White-Light (WL) images. To avoid the above situation, we propose a novel method to directly achieve accurate white-light colonoscopy image classification by conducting structured cross-modal representation consistency. In practice, a pair of multi-modal images, i.e. NBI and WL, are fed into a shared Transformer to extract hierarchical feature representations. Then a novel designed Spatial Attention Module (SAM) is adopted to calculate the similarities between the class token and patch tokens %from multi-levels for a specific modality image. By aligning the class tokens and spatial attention maps of paired NBI and WL images at different levels, the Transformer achieves the ability to keep both global and local representation consistency for the above two modalities. Extensive experimental results illustrate the proposed method outperforms the recent studies with a margin, realizing multi-modal prediction with a single Transformer while greatly improving the classification accuracy when only with WL images.
summary: The colorectal polyps classification is a critical clinical examination. To improve the classification accuracy, most computer-aided diagnosis algorithms recognize colorectal polyps by adopting Narrow-Band Imaging (NBI). However, the NBI usually suffers from missing utilization in real clinic scenarios since the acquisition of this specific image requires manual switching of the light mode when polyps have been detected by using White-Light (WL) images. To avoid the above situation, we propose a novel method to directly achieve accurate white-light colonoscopy image classification by conducting structured cross-modal representation consistency. In practice, a pair of multi-modal images, i.e. NBI and WL, are fed into a shared Transformer to extract hierarchical feature representations. Then a novel designed Spatial Attention Module (SAM) is adopted to calculate the similarities between the class token and patch tokens %from multi-levels for a specific modality image. By aligning the class tokens and spatial attention maps of paired NBI and WL images at different levels, the Transformer achieves the ability to keep both global and local representation consistency for the above two modalities. Extensive experimental results illustrate the proposed method outperforms the recent studies with a margin, realizing multi-modal prediction with a single Transformer while greatly improving the classification accuracy when only with WL images.
abstract_zh: The colorectal polyps classification is a critical clinical examination.为了提高分类准确性，大多数计算机辅助诊断算法都采用窄带成像（NBI）来识别结直肠息肉。然而，NBI 在实际临床场景中通常会出现利用率缺失的情况，因为当使用白光 (WL) 图像检测到息肉时，获取该特定图像需要手动切换光模式。为了避免上述情况，我们提出了一种通过进行结构化跨模态表示一致性来直接实现准确的白光结肠镜检查图像分类的新方法。 In practice, a pair of multi-modal images, i.e. NBI and WL, are fed into a shared Transformer to extract hierarchical feature representations.然后采用新颖设计的空间注意力模块（SAM）来计算特定模态图像的多级类标记和补丁标记之间的相似度％。通过在不同级别对齐成对的 NBI 和 WL 图像的类标记和空间注意力图，Transformer 实现了保持上述两种模式的全局和局部表示一致性的能力。大量的实验结果表明，所提出的方法明显优于最近的研究，用单个 Transformer 实现了多模态预测，同时大大提高了仅使用 WL 图像时的分类精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于结构化跨模态表示一致性的方法，直接利用白光（WL）结肠镜图像进行结直肠息肉分类，避免依赖窄带成像（NBI）。
AI.motivation: NBI图像在临床场景中因需手动切换光源模式而难以实际应用，现有算法依赖NBI导致实用性受限，需开发基于WL图像的高效分类方法。
AI.method: 设计共享Transformer架构提取NBI与WL图像的层次化特征，结合空间注意力模块（SAM）计算类标记与多层级图像块的相似性，通过跨模态对齐实现全局与局部表示一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在WL图像分类任务中优于最新研究，单Transformer模型实现多模态预测，且显著提升仅使用WL图像时的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化跨模态表示对齐，本文方法有效解决了WL图像分类精度不足的问题，为临床无创息肉识别提供了可行方案。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过结构化跨模态表示对齐，本文方法有效解决了WL图像分类精度不足的问题，为临床无创息肉识别提供了可行方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于结构化跨模态表示一致性的方法，直接利用白光（WL）结肠镜图像进行结直肠息肉分类，避免依赖窄带成像（NBI）。
motivation: NBI图像在临床场景中因需手动切换光源模式而难以实际应用，现有算法依赖NBI导致实用性受限，需开发基于WL图像的高效分类方法。
method: 设计共享Transformer架构提取NBI与WL图像的层次化特征，结合空间注意力模块（SAM）计算类标记与多层级图像块的相似性，通过跨模态对齐实现全局与局部表示一致性。
result: 实验表明该方法在WL图像分类任务中优于最新研究，单Transformer模型实现多模态预测，且显著提升仅使用WL图像时的分类准确率。
conclusion: 通过结构化跨模态表示对齐，本文方法有效解决了WL图像分类精度不足的问题，为临床无创息肉识别提供了可行方案。
search_text: Toward Clinically Assisted Colorectal Polyp Recognition via Structured Cross-modal Representation Consistency 通过结构化跨模式表示一致性实现临床辅助结直肠息肉识别 The colorectal polyps classification is a critical clinical examination. To improve the classification accuracy, most computer-aided diagnosis algorithms recognize colorectal polyps by adopting Narrow-Band Imaging (NBI). However, the NBI usually suffers from missing utilization in real clinic scenarios since the acquisition of this specific image requires manual switching of the light mode when polyps have been detected by using White-Light (WL) images. To avoid the above situation, we propose a novel method to directly achieve accurate white-light colonoscopy image classification by conducting structured cross-modal representation consistency. In practice, a pair of multi-modal images, i.e. NBI and WL, are fed into a shared Transformer to extract hierarchical feature representations. Then a novel designed Spatial Attention Module (SAM) is adopted to calculate the similarities between the class token and patch tokens %from multi-levels for a specific modality image. By aligning the class tokens and spatial attention maps of paired NBI and WL images at different levels, the Transformer achieves the ability to keep both global and local representation consistency for the above two modalities. Extensive experimental results illustrate the proposed method outperforms the recent studies with a margin, realizing multi-modal prediction with a single Transformer while greatly improving the classification accuracy when only with WL images. The colorectal polyps classification is a critical clinical examination.为了提高分类准确性，大多数计算机辅助诊断算法都采用窄带成像（NBI）来识别结直肠息肉。然而，NBI 在实际临床场景中通常会出现利用率缺失的情况，因为当使用白光 (WL) 图像检测到息肉时，获取该特定图像需要手动切换光模式。为了避免上述情况，我们提出了一种通过进行结构化跨模态表示一致性来直接实现准确的白光结肠镜检查图像分类的新方法。 In practice, a pair of multi-modal images, i.e. NBI and WL, are fed into a shared Transformer to extract hierarchical feature representations.然后采用新颖设计的空间注意力模块（SAM）来计算特定模态图像的多级类标记和补丁标记之间的相似度％。通过在不同级别对齐成对的 NBI 和 WL 图像的类标记和空间注意力图，Transformer 实现了保持上述两种模式的全局和局部表示一致性的能力。大量的实验结果表明，所提出的方法明显优于最近的研究，用单个 Transformer 实现了多模态预测，同时大大提高了仅使用 WL 图像时的分类精度。 本文提出一种基于结构化跨模态表示一致性的方法，直接利用白光（WL）结肠镜图像进行结直肠息肉分类，避免依赖窄带成像（NBI）。 Weijie Ma,Ye Zhu,Ruimao Zhang,Jie Yang,Yiwen Hu,Zhen Li,Li Xiang cs.CV

authors_text: Weisheng Li,Lin Huang
title: YOLOSA: Object detection based on 2D local feature superimposed self-attention
title_zh: YOLOSA：基于2D局部特征叠加自注意力的物体检测
comment: This paper is under consideration at Pattern Recognition Letters
comments: This paper is under consideration at Pattern Recognition Letters
abstract: We analyzed the network structure of real-time object detection models and found that the features in the feature concatenation stage are very rich. Applying an attention module here can effectively improve the detection accuracy of the model. However, the commonly used attention module or self-attention module shows poor performance in detection accuracy and inference efficiency. Therefore, we propose a novel self-attention module, called 2D local feature superimposed self-attention, for the feature concatenation stage of the neck network. This self-attention module reflects global features through local features and local receptive fields. We also propose and optimize an efficient decoupled head and AB-OTA, and achieve SOTA results. Average precisions of 49.0% (71FPS, 14ms), 46.1% (85FPS, 11.7ms), and 39.1% (107FPS, 9.3ms) were obtained for large, medium, and small-scale models built using our proposed improvements. Our models exceeded YOLOv5 by 0.8% -- 3.1% in average precision.
summary: We analyzed the network structure of real-time object detection models and found that the features in the feature concatenation stage are very rich. Applying an attention module here can effectively improve the detection accuracy of the model. However, the commonly used attention module or self-attention module shows poor performance in detection accuracy and inference efficiency. Therefore, we propose a novel self-attention module, called 2D local feature superimposed self-attention, for the feature concatenation stage of the neck network. This self-attention module reflects global features through local features and local receptive fields. We also propose and optimize an efficient decoupled head and AB-OTA, and achieve SOTA results. Average precisions of 49.0% (71FPS, 14ms), 46.1% (85FPS, 11.7ms), and 39.1% (107FPS, 9.3ms) were obtained for large, medium, and small-scale models built using our proposed improvements. Our models exceeded YOLOv5 by 0.8% -- 3.1% in average precision.
abstract_zh: 我们分析了实时目标检测模型的网络结构，发现特征串联阶段的特征非常丰富。这里应用注意力模块可以有效提高模型的检测精度。然而，常用的注意力模块或自注意力模块在检测精度和推理效率方面表现不佳。因此，我们针对颈部网络的特征串联阶段提出了一种新颖的自注意力模块，称为2D局部特征叠加自注意力。这个自注意力模块通过局部特征和局部感受野反映全局特征。我们还提出并优化了高效的解耦头和AB-OTA，并取得了SOTA结果。使用我们提出的改进构建的大型、中型和小型模型获得了 49.0%（71FPS，14ms）、46.1%（85FPS，11.7ms）和 39.1%（107FPS，9.3ms）的平均精度。我们的模型平均精度比 YOLOv5 提高了 0.8% - 3.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出YOLOSA方法，通过改进特征融合阶段的自注意力模块提升实时目标检测模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有注意力模块在检测精度与推理效率上存在不足，需设计更高效的自注意力机制以增强特征融合效果。
AI.method: 设计2D局部特征叠加自注意力模块，结合高效解耦头与AB-OTA优化策略，提升特征表达与推理速度。
AI.result: 在大/中/小模型上分别达到49.0%/46.1%/39.1%平均精度，速度达71FPS-107FPS，超越YOLOv5 0.8%-3.1%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在保持高推理速度的同时显著提升检测精度，验证了局部特征叠加自注意力机制的有效性。

authors_text: Teppei Yoshino,Yosuke Fukuchi,Shoya Matsumori,Michita Imai
title: Chat, Shift and Perform: Bridging the Gap between Task-oriented and Non-task-oriented Dialog Systems
title_zh: 聊天、轮班和执行：弥合面向任务和非任务导向的对话系统之间的差距
abstract: We propose CASPER (ChAt, Shift and PERform), a novel dialog system consisting of three types of dialog models: chatter, shifter, and performer. Shifter, which is designed for topic switching, enables a seamless flow of dialog from open-domain chat- to task-oriented dialog. In a user study, CASPER gave a better impression in terms of naturalness of response, lack of forced topic switching, and satisfaction compared with a baseline dialog system trained in an end-to-end manner. In an ablation study, we found that naturalness of response, dialog satisfaction, and task-elicitation rate improved compared with when shifter was removed from CASPER, indicating that topic shift with shifter supports the introduction of natural task-oriented dialog.
summary: We propose CASPER (ChAt, Shift and PERform), a novel dialog system consisting of three types of dialog models: chatter, shifter, and performer. Shifter, which is designed for topic switching, enables a seamless flow of dialog from open-domain chat- to task-oriented dialog. In a user study, CASPER gave a better impression in terms of naturalness of response, lack of forced topic switching, and satisfaction compared with a baseline dialog system trained in an end-to-end manner. In an ablation study, we found that naturalness of response, dialog satisfaction, and task-elicitation rate improved compared with when shifter was removed from CASPER, indicating that topic shift with shifter supports the introduction of natural task-oriented dialog.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 CASPER（ChAt、Shift 和 PERform），这是一种新颖的对话系统，由三种类型的对话模型组成：chatter、shifter 和 Performer。 Shifter 专为主题切换而设计，可实现从开放域聊天到面向任务的对话的无缝对话流。在一项用户研究中，与以端到端方式训练的基线对话系统相比，CASPER 在响应自然性、没有强制主题切换以及满意度方面给人留下了更好的印象。在一项消融研究中，我们发现与从 CASPER 中删除 shifter 相比，响应的自然度、对话满意度和任务引发率有所提高，这表明使用 shifter 进行主题转移支持引入自然的面向任务的对话。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CASPER对话系统，通过结合聊天、话题切换和任务执行模型，弥合任务型与非任务型对话系统的差距。
AI.motivation: 现有对话系统在任务型与非任务型对话切换时存在强制感，导致自然性与用户体验下降，需更流畅的过渡机制。
AI.method: 设计包含聊天模型（chatter）、话题切换模型（shifter）和任务执行模型（performer）的CASPER系统，通过用户研究与消融实验验证效果。
AI.result: 用户研究显示CASPER在响应自然性、减少强制切换和满意度上优于基线；消融实验表明移除shifter会降低任务引导率与对话质量。
AI.conclusion: CASPER通过引入shifter实现自然话题过渡，有效提升任务型对话的引入效率，为多模态对话系统提供新思路。

authors_text: Alexander Matt Turner,Aseem Saxena,Prasad Tadepalli
title: Formalizing the Problem of Side Effect Regularization
title_zh: 副作用正则化问题的形式化
comment: 14 pages, accepted to ML Safety Workshop at NeurIPS 2022. Alexander Turner and Aseem Saxena contributed equally
comments: 14 pages, accepted to ML Safety Workshop at NeurIPS 2022. Alexander Turner and Aseem Saxena contributed equally
abstract: AI objectives are often hard to specify properly. Some approaches tackle this problem by regularizing the AI's side effects: Agents must weigh off "how much of a mess they make" with an imperfectly specified proxy objective. We propose a formal criterion for side effect regularization via the assistance game framework. In these games, the agent solves a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) representing its uncertainty about the objective function it should optimize. We consider the setting where the true objective is revealed to the agent at a later time step. We show that this POMDP is solved by trading off the proxy reward with the agent's ability to achieve a range of future tasks. We empirically demonstrate the reasonableness of our problem formalization via ground-truth evaluation in two gridworld environments.
summary: AI objectives are often hard to specify properly. Some approaches tackle this problem by regularizing the AI's side effects: Agents must weigh off "how much of a mess they make" with an imperfectly specified proxy objective. We propose a formal criterion for side effect regularization via the assistance game framework. In these games, the agent solves a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) representing its uncertainty about the objective function it should optimize. We consider the setting where the true objective is revealed to the agent at a later time step. We show that this POMDP is solved by trading off the proxy reward with the agent's ability to achieve a range of future tasks. We empirically demonstrate the reasonableness of our problem formalization via ground-truth evaluation in two gridworld environments.
abstract_zh: 人工智能的目标通常很难正确指定。一些方法通过规范人工智能的副作用来解决这个问题：代理必须权衡“他们制造了多少混乱”与不完美指定的代理目标。我们通过辅助博弈框架提出了副作用正则化的正式标准。在这些游戏中，智能体解决了部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），该过程代表了其应优化的目标函数的不确定性。我们考虑在稍后的时间步骤向代理揭示真实目标的设置。我们证明了这个 POMDP 是通过权衡代理奖励和代理完成一系列未来任务的能力来解决的。我们通过在两个网格世界环境中的地面实况评估来实证证明我们的问题形式化的合理性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于协助游戏框架的形式化标准，用于解决AI副作用正则化问题，通过部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）建模代理在目标不确定性下的决策权衡。
AI.motivation: AI目标函数常因人类意图表达不完善而难以准确指定，现有方法通过限制代理的副作用来缓解这一问题，但缺乏统一的形式化理论框架。
AI.method: 构建POMDP模型表征代理对目标函数的不确定性，设计协助游戏框架使代理在优化代理目标时需权衡当前收益与未来任务适应性，并通过真实目标揭示机制验证模型有效性。
AI.result: 在两个网格世界环境中通过真实评估验证了该形式化框架的合理性，证明代理能有效平衡短期收益与长期任务适应性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的POMDP形式化方法为AI目标对齐提供了理论依据，通过量化副作用与未来任务能力的权衡，增强了对不确定目标环境的适应性。

search_text: Formalizing the Problem of Side Effect Regularization 副作用正则化问题的形式化 AI objectives are often hard to specify properly. Some approaches tackle this problem by regularizing the AI's side effects: Agents must weigh off "how much of a mess they make" with an imperfectly specified proxy objective. We propose a formal criterion for side effect regularization via the assistance game framework. In these games, the agent solves a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) representing its uncertainty about the objective function it should optimize. We consider the setting where the true objective is revealed to the agent at a later time step. We show that this POMDP is solved by trading off the proxy reward with the agent's ability to achieve a range of future tasks. We empirically demonstrate the reasonableness of our problem formalization via ground-truth evaluation in two gridworld environments. 人工智能的目标通常很难正确指定。一些方法通过规范人工智能的副作用来解决这个问题：代理必须权衡“他们制造了多少混乱”与不完美指定的代理目标。我们通过辅助博弈框架提出了副作用正则化的正式标准。在这些游戏中，智能体解决了部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），该过程代表了其应优化的目标函数的不确定性。我们考虑在稍后的时间步骤向代理揭示真实目标的设置。我们证明了这个 POMDP 是通过权衡代理奖励和代理完成一系列未来任务的能力来解决的。我们通过在两个网格世界环境中的地面实况评估来实证证明我们的问题形式化的合理性。 本文提出一种基于协助游戏框架的形式化标准，用于解决AI副作用正则化问题，通过部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）建模代理在目标不确定性下的决策权衡。 Alexander Matt Turner,Aseem Saxena,Prasad Tadepalli cs.AI

authors_text: Minghao Gou,Haolin Pan,Hao-Shu Fang,Ziyuan Liu,Cewu Lu,Ping Tan
title: Unseen Object 6D Pose Estimation: A Benchmark and Baselines
title_zh: 看不见的物体 6D 姿态估计：基准和基线
abstract: Estimating the 6D pose for unseen objects is in great demand for many real-world applications. However, current state-of-the-art pose estimation methods can only handle objects that are previously trained. In this paper, we propose a new task that enables and facilitates algorithms to estimate the 6D pose estimation of novel objects during testing. We collect a dataset with both real and synthetic images and up to 48 unseen objects in the test set. In the mean while, we propose a new metric named Infimum ADD (IADD) which is an invariant measurement for objects with different types of pose ambiguity. A two-stage baseline solution for this task is also provided. By training an end-to-end 3D correspondences network, our method finds corresponding points between an unseen object and a partial view RGBD image accurately and efficiently. It then calculates the 6D pose from the correspondences using an algorithm robust to object symmetry. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms several intuitive baselines and thus verify its effectiveness. All the data, code and models will be made publicly available. Project page: www.graspnet.net/unseen6d
summary: Estimating the 6D pose for unseen objects is in great demand for many real-world applications. However, current state-of-the-art pose estimation methods can only handle objects that are previously trained. In this paper, we propose a new task that enables and facilitates algorithms to estimate the 6D pose estimation of novel objects during testing. We collect a dataset with both real and synthetic images and up to 48 unseen objects in the test set. In the mean while, we propose a new metric named Infimum ADD (IADD) which is an invariant measurement for objects with different types of pose ambiguity. A two-stage baseline solution for this task is also provided. By training an end-to-end 3D correspondences network, our method finds corresponding points between an unseen object and a partial view RGBD image accurately and efficiently. It then calculates the 6D pose from the correspondences using an algorithm robust to object symmetry. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms several intuitive baselines and thus verify its effectiveness. All the data, code and models will be made publicly available. Project page: www.graspnet.net/unseen6d
abstract_zh: 许多现实世界的应用都非常需要估计看不见的物体的 6D 位姿。然而，当前最先进的姿态估计方法只能处理先前训练过的对象。在本文中，我们提出了一项新任务，使算法能够在测试过程中估计新物体的 6D 姿态。我们收集了一个包含真实图像和合成图像的数据集，以及测试集中最多 48 个看不见的物体。 In the mean while, we propose a new metric named Infimum ADD (IADD) which is an invariant measurement for objects with different types of pose ambiguity.还提供了用于此任务的两阶段基线解决方案。 By training an end-to-end 3D correspondences network, our method finds corresponding points between an unseen object and a partial view RGBD image accurately and efficiently.然后，它使用对对象对称性具有鲁棒性的算法，根据对应关系计算 6D 位姿。大量的实验表明，我们的方法优于几个直观的基线，从而验证了其有效性。所有数据、代码和模型都将公开。项目页面：www.graspnet.net/unseen6d

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对未见过物体的6D位姿估计任务，并构建了基准数据集与基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有位姿估计方法仅能处理训练过的物体，难以应对实际应用中常见的新物体。本文旨在建立评估新物体位姿估计能力的基准。
AI.method: 提出两阶段方法：首先通过端到端3D对应网络在未见过物体与RGBD图像间建立对应点，再利用对称性鲁棒算法计算位姿；并设计不变度量IADD评估不同姿态模糊性物体。
AI.result: 实验表明方法优于多个直观基线，数据集包含48个测试新物体及真实/合成图像，代码模型开源。
AI.conclusion: 本文为新物体位姿估计提供了首个基准与有效方法，推动该领域在实际应用中的研究进展。
