authors_text: Alexander Bauer,Shinichi Nakajima,Klaus-Robert Müller
title: Self-Supervised Training with Autoencoders for Visual Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 使用自动编码器进行视觉异常检测的自我监督训练
abstract: We focus on a specific use case in anomaly detection where the distribution of normal samples is supported by a lower-dimensional manifold. Here, regularized autoencoders provide a popular approach by learning the identity mapping on the set of normal examples, while trying to prevent good reconstruction on points outside of the manifold. Typically, this goal is implemented by controlling the capacity of the model, either directly by reducing the size of the bottleneck layer or implicitly by imposing some sparsity (or contraction) constraints on parts of the corresponding network. However, neither of these techniques does explicitly penalize the reconstruction of anomalous signals often resulting in poor detection. We tackle this problem by adapting a self-supervised learning regime that exploits discriminative information during training but focuses on the submanifold of normal examples. Informally, our training objective regularizes the model to produce locally consistent reconstructions, while replacing irregularities by acting as a filter that removes anomalous patterns. To support this intuition, we perform a rigorous formal analysis of the proposed method and provide a number of interesting insights. In particular, we show that the resulting model resembles a non-linear orthogonal projection of partially corrupted images onto the submanifold of uncorrupted samples. On the other hand, we identify the orthogonal projection as an optimal solution for a number of regularized autoencoders including the contractive and denoising variants. We support our theoretical analysis by empirical evaluation of the resulting detection and localization performance of the proposed method. In particular, we achieve a new state-of-the-art result on the MVTec AD dataset -- a challenging benchmark for visual anomaly detection in the manufacturing domain.
summary: We focus on a specific use case in anomaly detection where the distribution of normal samples is supported by a lower-dimensional manifold. Here, regularized autoencoders provide a popular approach by learning the identity mapping on the set of normal examples, while trying to prevent good reconstruction on points outside of the manifold. Typically, this goal is implemented by controlling the capacity of the model, either directly by reducing the size of the bottleneck layer or implicitly by imposing some sparsity (or contraction) constraints on parts of the corresponding network. However, neither of these techniques does explicitly penalize the reconstruction of anomalous signals often resulting in poor detection. We tackle this problem by adapting a self-supervised learning regime that exploits discriminative information during training but focuses on the submanifold of normal examples. Informally, our training objective regularizes the model to produce locally consistent reconstructions, while replacing irregularities by acting as a filter that removes anomalous patterns. To support this intuition, we perform a rigorous formal analysis of the proposed method and provide a number of interesting insights. In particular, we show that the resulting model resembles a non-linear orthogonal projection of partially corrupted images onto the submanifold of uncorrupted samples. On the other hand, we identify the orthogonal projection as an optimal solution for a number of regularized autoencoders including the contractive and denoising variants. We support our theoretical analysis by empirical evaluation of the resulting detection and localization performance of the proposed method. In particular, we achieve a new state-of-the-art result on the MVTec AD dataset -- a challenging benchmark for visual anomaly detection in the manufacturing domain.
abstract_zh: 我们专注于异常检测中的特定用例，其中正常样本的分布由较低维流形支持。在这里，正则化自动编码器提供了一种流行的方法，通过学习正常示例集上的恒等映射，同时尝试防止流形外部点的良好重建。通常，这个目标是通过控制模型的容量来实现的，或者直接通过减少瓶颈层的大小，或者隐式地通过对相应网络的部分施加一些稀疏（或收缩）约束。然而，这些技术都没有明确惩罚通常导致检测不良的异常信号的重建。我们通过采用自我监督学习机制来解决这个问题，该机制在训练期间利用歧视性信息，但重点关注正常示例的子流形。非正式地，我们的训练目标对模型进行正则化以产生局部一致的重建，同时通过充当去除异常模式的过滤器来替换不规则性。为了支持这种直觉，我们对所提出的方法进行了严格的形式分析，并提供了许多有趣的见解。特别是，我们表明所得到的模型类似于部分损坏的图像到未损坏样本的子流形上的非线性正交投影。另一方面，我们将正交投影确定为许多正则化自动编码器（包括收缩和去噪变体）的最佳解决方案。我们通过对所提出方法的检测和定位性能进行实证评估来支持我们的理论分析。特别是，我们在 MVTec AD 数据集上取得了最新的结果，这是制造领域视觉异常检测的具有挑战性的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督学习的自编码器方法，用于检测视觉异常，通过在正常样本的子流形上进行训练以提高检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统自编码器在异常检测中因未显式惩罚异常信号重建而效果不佳，需改进模型以更有效地过滤异常模式。
AI.method: 采用自监督学习框架，在训练中利用判别信息并聚焦于正常样本的子流形，通过局部一致性正则化和异常模式过滤实现目标。
AI.result: 在MVTec AD数据集上实现了视觉异常检测领域的最新状态-of-the-art结果，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可视为非线性正交投影，为收缩和去噪自编码器提供了理论支持，展示了其在工业检测中的应用潜力。

We tackle this problem by adapting a self-supervised learning regime that exploits discriminative information during training but focuses on the submanifold of normal examples. Informally, our training objective regularizes the model to produce locally consistent reconstructions, while replacing irregularities by acting as a filter that removes anomalous patterns. To support this intuition, we perform a rigorous formal analysis of the proposed method and provide a number of interesting insights. In particular, we show that the resulting model resembles a non-linear orthogonal projection of partially corrupted images onto the submanifold of uncorrupted samples. On the other hand, we identify the orthogonal projection as an optimal solution for a number of regularized autoencoders including the contractive and denoising variants. We support our theoretical analysis by empirical evaluation of the resulting detection and localization performance of the proposed method. In particular, we achieve a new state-of-the-art result on the MVTec AD dataset -- a challenging benchmark for visual anomaly detection in the manufacturing domain. 我们专注于异常检测中的特定用例，其中正常样本的分布由较低维流形支持。在这里，正则化自动编码器提供了一种流行的方法，通过学习正常示例集上的恒等映射，同时尝试防止流形外部点的良好重建。通常，这个目标是通过控制模型的容量来实现的，或者直接通过减少瓶颈层的大小，或者隐式地通过对相应网络的部分施加一些稀疏（或收缩）约束。然而，这些技术都没有明确惩罚通常导致检测不良的异常信号的重建。我们通过采用自我监督学习机制来解决这个问题，该机制在训练期间利用歧视性信息，但重点关注正常示例的子流形。非正式地，我们的训练目标对模型进行正则化以产生局部一致的重建，同时通过充当去除异常模式的过滤器来替换不规则性。为了支持这种直觉，我们对所提出的方法进行了严格的形式分析，并提供了许多有趣的见解。特别是，我们表明所得到的模型类似于部分损坏的图像到未损坏样本的子流形上的非线性正交投影。另一方面，我们将正交投影确定为许多正则化自动编码器（包括收缩和去噪变体）的最佳解决方案。我们通过对所提出方法的检测和定位性能进行实证评估来支持我们的理论分析。特别是，我们在 MVTec AD 数据集上取得了最新的结果，这是制造领域视觉异常检测的具有挑战性的基准。 本文提出了一种基于自监督学习的自编码器方法，用于检测视觉异常，通过在正常样本的子流形上进行训练以提高检测性能。 Alexander Bauer,Shinichi Nakajima,Klaus-Robert Müller cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: José Antonio Hernández López,Martin Weyssow,Jesús Sánchez Cuadrado,Houari Sahraoui
title: AST-Probe: Recovering abstract syntax trees from hidden representations of pre-trained language models
title_zh: AST-Probe：从预训练语言模型的隐藏表示中恢复抽象语法树
abstract: The objective of pre-trained language models is to learn contextual representations of textual data. Pre-trained language models have become mainstream in natural language processing and code modeling. Using probes, a technique to study the linguistic properties of hidden vector spaces, previous works have shown that these pre-trained language models encode simple linguistic properties in their hidden representations. However, none of the previous work assessed whether these models encode the whole grammatical structure of a programming language. In this paper, we prove the existence of a syntactic subspace, lying in the hidden representations of pre-trained language models, which contain the syntactic information of the programming language. We show that this subspace can be extracted from the models' representations and define a novel probing method, the AST-Probe, that enables recovering the whole abstract syntax tree (AST) of an input code snippet. In our experimentations, we show that this syntactic subspace exists in five state-of-the-art pre-trained language models. In addition, we highlight that the middle layers of the models are the ones that encode most of the AST information. Finally, we estimate the optimal size of this syntactic subspace and show that its dimension is substantially lower than those of the models' representation spaces. This suggests that pre-trained language models use a small part of their representation spaces to encode syntactic information of the programming languages.
summary: The objective of pre-trained language models is to learn contextual representations of textual data. Pre-trained language models have become mainstream in natural language processing and code modeling. Using probes, a technique to study the linguistic properties of hidden vector spaces, previous works have shown that these pre-trained language models encode simple linguistic properties in their hidden representations. However, none of the previous work assessed whether these models encode the whole grammatical structure of a programming language. In this paper, we prove the existence of a syntactic subspace, lying in the hidden representations of pre-trained language models, which contain the syntactic information of the programming language. We show that this subspace can be extracted from the models' representations and define a novel probing method, the AST-Probe, that enables recovering the whole abstract syntax tree (AST) of an input code snippet. In our experimentations, we show that this syntactic subspace exists in five state-of-the-art pre-trained language models. In addition, we highlight that the middle layers of the models are the ones that encode most of the AST information. Finally, we estimate the optimal size of this syntactic subspace and show that its dimension is substantially lower than those of the models' representation spaces. This suggests that pre-trained language models use a small part of their representation spaces to encode syntactic information of the programming languages.
abstract_zh: 预训练语言模型的目标是学习文本数据的上下文表示。预训练语言模型已成为自然语言处理和代码建模的主流。使用探针（一种研究隐藏向量空间的语言特性的技术），之前的工作表明这些预先训练的语言模型在其隐藏表示中编码简单的语言特性。然而，之前的工作都没有评估这些模型是否编码编程语言的整个语法结构。在本文中，我们证明了句法子空间的存在，该句法子空间位于预训练语言模型的隐藏表示中，其中包含编程语言的句法信息。我们证明这个子空间可以从模型的表示中提取，并定义一种新颖的探测方法，即 AST-Probe，它可以恢复输入代码片段的整个抽象语法树（AST）。在我们的实验中，我们表明这个句法子空间存在于五种最先进的预训练语言模型中。此外，我们强调模型的中间层是编码大部分 AST 信息的层。最后，我们估计了该句法子空间的最佳大小，并表明其维度远低于模型表示空间的维度。这表明预训练的语言模型使用其表示空间的一小部分来编码编程语言的语法信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AST-Probe方法，从预训练语言模型的隐藏表示中恢复编程语言的抽象语法树（AST），证明其隐藏空间中存在语法子空间。
AI.motivation: 尽管预训练语言模型能编码简单语言属性，但此前未验证其是否编码编程语言的完整语法结构，这对理解模型表示机制和代码建模至关重要。
AI.method: 通过探针技术提取隐藏表示中的语法子空间，设计AST-Probe方法恢复输入代码的完整AST，并分析不同模型层的语法信息分布及子空间维度。
AI.result: 在五个主流预训练模型中验证了语法子空间的存在，发现中间层编码了大部分AST信息，且语法子空间维度远小于模型整体表示空间。
AI.conclusion: 预训练语言模型仅用少量表示空间编码编程语言语法，揭示了模型表示机制的高效性，为代码建模和语法分析提供新视角。

authors_text: Edi Muskardin,Martin Tappler,Bernhard K. Aichernig,Ingo Pill
title: Reinforcement Learning under Partial Observability Guided by Learned Environment Models
title_zh: 学习环境模型引导下的部分可观察性强化学习
abstract: In practical applications, we can rarely assume full observability of a system's environment, despite such knowledge being important for determining a reactive control system's precise interaction with its environment. Therefore, we propose an approach for reinforcement learning (RL) in partially observable environments. While assuming that the environment behaves like a partially observable Markov decision process with known discrete actions, we assume no knowledge about its structure or transition probabilities. Our approach combines Q-learning with IoAlergia, a method for learning Markov decision processes (MDP). By learning MDP models of the environment from episodes of the RL agent, we enable RL in partially observable domains without explicit, additional memory to track previous interactions for dealing with ambiguities stemming from partial observability. We instead provide RL with additional observations in the form of abstract environment states by simulating new experiences on learned environment models to track the explored states. In our evaluation, we report on the validity of our approach and its promising performance in comparison to six state-of-the-art deep RL techniques with recurrent neural networks and fixed memory.
summary: In practical applications, we can rarely assume full observability of a system's environment, despite such knowledge being important for determining a reactive control system's precise interaction with its environment. Therefore, we propose an approach for reinforcement learning (RL) in partially observable environments. While assuming that the environment behaves like a partially observable Markov decision process with known discrete actions, we assume no knowledge about its structure or transition probabilities. Our approach combines Q-learning with IoAlergia, a method for learning Markov decision processes (MDP). By learning MDP models of the environment from episodes of the RL agent, we enable RL in partially observable domains without explicit, additional memory to track previous interactions for dealing with ambiguities stemming from partial observability. We instead provide RL with additional observations in the form of abstract environment states by simulating new experiences on learned environment models to track the explored states. In our evaluation, we report on the validity of our approach and its promising performance in comparison to six state-of-the-art deep RL techniques with recurrent neural networks and fixed memory.
abstract_zh: 在实际应用中，我们很少可以假设系统环境的完全可观察性，尽管这些知识对于确定反应控制系统与其环境的精确交互很重要。因此，我们提出了一种在部分可观察环境中进行强化学习（RL）的方法。虽然假设环境的行为类似于具有已知离散动作的部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程，但我们假设不了解其结构或转移概率。我们的方法将 Q-learning 与 IoAlergia 相结合，IoAlergia 是一种学习马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 的方法。通过从 RL 代理的事件中学习环境的 MDP 模型，我们可以在部分可观察域中启用 RL，而无需显式的额外内存来跟踪先前的交互，从而处理部分可观察性引起的模糊性。相反，我们通过在学习的环境模型上模拟新经验来跟踪探索的状态，以抽象环境状态的形式为强化学习提供额外的观察结果。在我们的评估中，我们报告了我们的方法的有效性及其与六种最先进的具有循环神经网络和固定记忆的深度强化学习技术相比的有希望的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在部分可观测环境中进行强化学习的方法，通过结合Q学习与IoAlergia算法，利用学习到的环境模型生成抽象状态以替代显式记忆。
AI.motivation: 实际系统中环境通常无法完全可观测，而现有方法依赖显式记忆处理部分可观测性带来的模糊性，存在局限性。
AI.method: 将Q学习与IoAlergia结合，从RL智能体的轨迹中学习MDP模型，并通过模拟生成新经验提供抽象环境状态作为额外观测。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法的有效性，且在与六种基于循环神经网络和固定记忆的前沿深度RL技术对比中表现出竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为部分可观测环境下的强化学习提供了无需显式记忆的可行解决方案，展示了优于现有技术的潜力。

In our evaluation, we report on the validity of our approach and its promising performance in comparison to six state-of-the-art deep RL techniques with recurrent neural networks and fixed memory. 在实际应用中，我们很少可以假设系统环境的完全可观察性，尽管这些知识对于确定反应控制系统与其环境的精确交互很重要。因此，我们提出了一种在部分可观察环境中进行强化学习（RL）的方法。虽然假设环境的行为类似于具有已知离散动作的部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程，但我们假设不了解其结构或转移概率。我们的方法将 Q-learning 与 IoAlergia 相结合，IoAlergia 是一种学习马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 的方法。通过从 RL 代理的事件中学习环境的 MDP 模型，我们可以在部分可观察域中启用 RL，而无需显式的额外内存来跟踪先前的交互，从而处理部分可观察性引起的模糊性。相反，我们通过在学习的环境模型上模拟新经验来跟踪探索的状态，以抽象环境状态的形式为强化学习提供额外的观察结果。在我们的评估中，我们报告了我们的方法的有效性及其与六种最先进的具有循环神经网络和固定记忆的深度强化学习技术相比的有希望的性能。 本文提出了一种在部分可观测环境中进行强化学习的方法，通过结合Q学习与IoAlergia算法，利用学习到的环境模型生成抽象状态以替代显式记忆。 Edi Muskardin,Martin Tappler,Bernhard K. Aichernig,Ingo Pill cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Werner van der Merwe,Herman Kamper,Johan du Preez
title: A Temporal Extension of Latent Dirichlet Allocation for Unsupervised Acoustic Unit Discovery
title_zh: 用于无监督声学单元发现的潜在狄利克雷分配的时间扩展
abstract: Latent Dirichlet allocation (LDA) is widely used for unsupervised topic modelling on sets of documents. No temporal information is used in the model. However, there is often a relationship between the corresponding topics of consecutive tokens. In this paper, we present an extension to LDA that uses a Markov chain to model temporal information. We use this new model for acoustic unit discovery from speech. As input tokens, the model takes a discretised encoding of speech from a vector quantised (VQ) neural network with 512 codes. The goal is then to map these 512 VQ codes to 50 phone-like units (topics) in order to more closely resemble true phones. In contrast to the base LDA, which only considers how VQ codes co-occur within utterances (documents), the Markov chain LDA additionally captures how consecutive codes follow one another. This extension leads to an increase in cluster quality and phone segmentation results compared to the base LDA. Compared to a recent vector quantised neural network approach that also learns 50 units, the extended LDA model performs better in phone segmentation but worse in mutual information.
summary: Latent Dirichlet allocation (LDA) is widely used for unsupervised topic modelling on sets of documents. No temporal information is used in the model. However, there is often a relationship between the corresponding topics of consecutive tokens. In this paper, we present an extension to LDA that uses a Markov chain to model temporal information. We use this new model for acoustic unit discovery from speech. As input tokens, the model takes a discretised encoding of speech from a vector quantised (VQ) neural network with 512 codes. The goal is then to map these 512 VQ codes to 50 phone-like units (topics) in order to more closely resemble true phones. In contrast to the base LDA, which only considers how VQ codes co-occur within utterances (documents), the Markov chain LDA additionally captures how consecutive codes follow one another. This extension leads to an increase in cluster quality and phone segmentation results compared to the base LDA. Compared to a recent vector quantised neural network approach that also learns 50 units, the extended LDA model performs better in phone segmentation but worse in mutual information.
abstract_zh: 潜在狄利克雷分配 (LDA) 广泛用于文档集的无监督主题建模。模型中不使用时间信息。然而，连续标记的对应主题之间通常存在关系。在本文中，我们提出了 LDA 的扩展，它使用马尔可夫链来建模时间信息。我们使用这种新模型从语音中发现声学单元。作为输入标记，该模型采用来自具有 512 个代码的矢量量化 (VQ) 神经网络的离散语音编码。然后，目标是将这 512 个 VQ 代码映射到 50 个类似手机的单元（主题），以便更接近真实的手机。与仅考虑 VQ 代码如何在话语（文档）中同时出现的基本 LDA 不同，马尔可夫链 LDA 还捕获连续代码如何彼此跟随。与基本 LDA 相比，此扩展可提高集群质量和音素分割结果。与最近同样学习 50 个单元的矢量量化神经网络方法相比，扩展的 LDA 模型在电话分割方面表现更好，但在互信息方面表现较差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合马尔可夫链的LDA扩展方法，用于无监督声学单元发现，通过建模语音离散编码的时序关系提升聚类质量。
AI.motivation: 传统LDA未利用语音信号中连续音素的时序依赖关系，而这种关系对声学单元发现至关重要。
AI.method: 在LDA框架中引入马尔可夫链建模时序信息，使用512维VQ神经网络编码作为输入，将代码映射到50个类 phones 的主题分布。
AI.result: 相比基础LDA，时序扩展模型在聚类质量和音素分割上表现更优，但互信息指标弱于近期VQ神经网络方法。
AI.conclusion: 时序建模有效提升声学单元发现性能，但需权衡不同评价指标的优化效果。

authors_text: Lutz Oettershagen,Athanasios L. Konstantinidis,Giuseppe F. Italiano
title: Inferring Tie Strength in Temporal Networks
title_zh: 推断时态网络中的联系强度
abstract: Inferring tie strengths in social networks is an essential task in social network analysis. Common approaches classify the ties as wea} and strong ties based on the strong triadic closure (STC). The STC states that if for three nodes, $A$, $B$, and $C$, there are strong ties between $A$ and $B$, as well as $A$ and $C$, there has to be a (weak or strong) tie between $B$ and $C$. A variant of the STC called STC+ allows adding a few new weak edges to obtain improved solutions. So far, most works discuss the STC or STC+ in static networks. However, modern large-scale social networks are usually highly dynamic, providing user contacts and communications as streams of edge updates. Temporal networks capture these dynamics. To apply the STC to temporal networks, we first generalize the STC and introduce a weighted version such that empirical a priori knowledge given in the form of edge weights is respected by the STC. Similarly, we introduce a generalized weighted version of the STC+. The weighted STC is hard to compute, and our main contribution is an efficient 2-approximation (resp. 3-approximation) streaming algorithm for the weighted STC (resp. STC+) in temporal networks. As a technical contribution, we introduce a fully dynamic $k$-approximation for the minimum weighted vertex cover problem in hypergraphs with edges of size $k$, which is a crucial component of our streaming algorithms. An empirical evaluation shows that the weighted STC leads to solutions that better capture the a priori knowledge given by the edge weights than the non-weighted STC. Moreover, we show that our streaming algorithm efficiently approximates the weighted STC in real-world large-scale social networks.
summary: Inferring tie strengths in social networks is an essential task in social network analysis. Common approaches classify the ties as wea} and strong ties based on the strong triadic closure (STC). The STC states that if for three nodes, $A$, $B$, and $C$, there are strong ties between $A$ and $B$, as well as $A$ and $C$, there has to be a (weak or strong) tie between $B$ and $C$. A variant of the STC called STC+ allows adding a few new weak edges to obtain improved solutions. So far, most works discuss the STC or STC+ in static networks. However, modern large-scale social networks are usually highly dynamic, providing user contacts and communications as streams of edge updates. Temporal networks capture these dynamics. To apply the STC to temporal networks, we first generalize the STC and introduce a weighted version such that empirical a priori knowledge given in the form of edge weights is respected by the STC. Similarly, we introduce a generalized weighted version of the STC+. The weighted STC is hard to compute, and our main contribution is an efficient 2-approximation (resp. 3-approximation) streaming algorithm for the weighted STC (resp. STC+) in temporal networks. As a technical contribution, we introduce a fully dynamic $k$-approximation for the minimum weighted vertex cover problem in hypergraphs with edges of size $k$, which is a crucial component of our streaming algorithms. An empirical evaluation shows that the weighted STC leads to solutions that better capture the a priori knowledge given by the edge weights than the non-weighted STC. Moreover, we show that our streaming algorithm efficiently approximates the weighted STC in real-world large-scale social networks.
abstract_zh: 推断社交网络中的联系强度是社交网络分析中的一项基本任务。常见的方法根据强三元闭包 (STC) 将关系分类为弱关系和强关系。 STC 规定，如果对于三个节点 $A$、$B$ 和 $C$，$A$ 和 $B$ 之间以及 $A$ 和 $C$ 之间存在强关系，则 $B$ 和 $C$ 之间也必须存在（弱或强）关系。 STC 的一个变体称为 STC+，允许添加一些新的弱边缘以获得改进的解决方案。到目前为止，大多数著作都讨论静态网络中的STC或STC+。然而，现代大型社交网络通常是高度动态的，以边缘更新流的形式提供用户联系和通信。时间网络捕捉这些动态。为了将 STC 应用于时间网络，我们首先概括 STC 并引入加权版本，以便 STC 尊重以边权重形式给出的经验先验知识。同样，我们引入了 STC+ 的广义加权版本。加权 STC 很难计算，我们的主要贡献是针对时间网络中的加权 STC（或 STC+）的高效 2 近似（或 3 近似）流算法。作为技术贡献，我们为边尺寸为 $k$ 的超图中的最小加权顶点覆盖问题引入了完全动态的 $k$ 近似，这是我们的流算法的重要组成部分。实证评估表明，与非加权 STC 相比，加权 STC 产生的解决方案能够更好地捕获边缘权重给出的先验知识。此外，我们表明我们的流算法有效地近似了现实世界大规模社交网络中的加权 STC。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在将强三元闭包（STC）理论扩展到动态网络，提出加权STC及STC+的流算法以推断时间网络中的关系强度。
AI.motivation: 传统STC理论适用于静态网络，但现实中的大规模社交网络具有高度动态性，需处理边更新流数据，现有方法无法有效捕捉时间动态特性。
AI.method: 提出加权STC模型以整合边权重先验知识，设计2/3近似比的流算法，并引入超图最小顶点覆盖的动态近似方法作为核心组件。
AI.result: 实验表明加权STC比非加权版本更符合边权重先验，流算法在真实大规模网络中能高效近似求解加权STC。
AI.conclusion: 本文为动态网络中的关系强度推断提供了理论扩展与高效算法，提升了时间网络分析的准确性与可扩展性。

An empirical evaluation shows that the weighted STC leads to solutions that better capture the a priori knowledge given by the edge weights than the non-weighted STC. Moreover, we show that our streaming algorithm efficiently approximates the weighted STC in real-world large-scale social networks. 推断社交网络中的联系强度是社交网络分析中的一项基本任务。常见的方法根据强三元闭包 (STC) 将关系分类为弱关系和强关系。 STC 规定，如果对于三个节点 $A$、$B$ 和 $C$，$A$ 和 $B$ 之间以及 $A$ 和 $C$ 之间存在强关系，则 $B$ 和 $C$ 之间也必须存在（弱或强）关系。 STC 的一个变体称为 STC+，允许添加一些新的弱边缘以获得改进的解决方案。到目前为止，大多数著作都讨论静态网络中的STC或STC+。然而，现代大型社交网络通常是高度动态的，以边缘更新流的形式提供用户联系和通信。时间网络捕捉这些动态。为了将 STC 应用于时间网络，我们首先概括 STC 并引入加权版本，以便 STC 尊重以边权重形式给出的经验先验知识。同样，我们引入了 STC+ 的广义加权版本。加权 STC 很难计算，我们的主要贡献是针对时间网络中的加权 STC（或 STC+）的高效 2 近似（或 3 近似）流算法。作为技术贡献，我们为边尺寸为 $k$ 的超图中的最小加权顶点覆盖问题引入了完全动态的 $k$ 近似，这是我们的流算法的重要组成部分。实证评估表明，与非加权 STC 相比，加权 STC 产生的解决方案能够更好地捕获边缘权重给出的先验知识。此外，我们表明我们的流算法有效地近似了现实世界大规模社交网络中的加权 STC。 本文旨在将强三元闭包（STC）理论扩展到动态网络，提出加权STC及STC+的流算法以推断时间网络中的关系强度。 Lutz Oettershagen,Athanasios L. Konstantinidis,Giuseppe F. Italiano cs.SI,cs.DS

authors_text: Danilo de Oliveira,Tal Peer,Timo Gerkmann
title: Efficient Transformer-based Speech Enhancement Using Long Frames and STFT Magnitudes
title_zh: 使用长帧和 STFT 幅度进行基于 Transformer 的高效语音增强
abstract: The SepFormer architecture shows very good results in speech separation. Like other learned-encoder models, it uses short frames, as they have been shown to obtain better performance in these cases. This results in a large number of frames at the input, which is problematic; since the SepFormer is transformer-based, its computational complexity drastically increases with longer sequences. In this paper, we employ the SepFormer in a speech enhancement task and show that by replacing the learned-encoder features with a magnitude short-time Fourier transform (STFT) representation, we can use long frames without compromising perceptual enhancement performance. We obtained equivalent quality and intelligibility evaluation scores while reducing the number of operations by a factor of approximately 8 for a 10-second utterance.
summary: The SepFormer architecture shows very good results in speech separation. Like other learned-encoder models, it uses short frames, as they have been shown to obtain better performance in these cases. This results in a large number of frames at the input, which is problematic; since the SepFormer is transformer-based, its computational complexity drastically increases with longer sequences. In this paper, we employ the SepFormer in a speech enhancement task and show that by replacing the learned-encoder features with a magnitude short-time Fourier transform (STFT) representation, we can use long frames without compromising perceptual enhancement performance. We obtained equivalent quality and intelligibility evaluation scores while reducing the number of operations by a factor of approximately 8 for a 10-second utterance.
abstract_zh: SepFormer架构在语音分离方面表现出了非常好的效果。与其他学习编码器模型一样，它使用短帧，因为它们已被证明在这些情况下可以获得更好的性能。这会导致输入处出现大量帧，这是有问题的；由于 SepFormer 是基于 Transformer 的，因此其计算复杂度随着序列的延长而急剧增加。在本文中，我们在语音增强任务中采用了 SepFormer，并表明通过用幅度短时傅里叶变换（STFT）表示替换学习的编码器特征，我们可以使用长帧而不影响感知增强性能。我们获得了同等的质量和清晰度评估分数，同时将 10 秒话语的操作次数减少了大约 8 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于SepFormer的语音增强方法，通过使用长帧和STFT幅度表示来提高计算效率。
AI.motivation: SepFormer等模型因使用短帧导致计算复杂度高，限制了长序列处理效率，需寻找更高效的特征表示方式。
AI.method: 将SepFormer的编码器特征替换为STFT幅度表示，利用长帧进行语音增强，降低计算量。
AI.result: 在保持感知增强效果的前提下，将10秒语音的运算量减少约8倍。
AI.conclusion: STFT幅度表示能有效替代学习编码器特征，实现高效且高质量的语音增强。

authors_text: Zhengyang Chen,Bei Liu,Bing Han,Leying Zhang,Yanmin Qian
title: The SJTU X-LANCE Lab System for CNSRC 2022
title_zh: CNSRC 2022上海交通大学X-LANCE实验室系统
abstract: This technical report describes the SJTU X-LANCE Lab system for the three tracks in CNSRC 2022. In this challenge, we explored the speaker embedding modeling ability of deep ResNet (Deeper r-vector). All the systems are only trained on the Cnceleb training set and we use the same systems for the three tracks in CNSRC 2022. In this challenge, our system ranks the first place in the fixed track of speaker verification task. Our best single system and fusion system achieve 0.3164 and 0.2975 minDCF respectively. Besides, we submit the result of ResNet221 to the speaker retrieval track and achieve 0.4626 mAP. More importantly, we have helped the wespeaker [1] toolkit reproduce our result: https://github.com/wenet-e2e/wespeaker.
summary: This technical report describes the SJTU X-LANCE Lab system for the three tracks in CNSRC 2022. In this challenge, we explored the speaker embedding modeling ability of deep ResNet (Deeper r-vector). All the systems are only trained on the Cnceleb training set and we use the same systems for the three tracks in CNSRC 2022. In this challenge, our system ranks the first place in the fixed track of speaker verification task. Our best single system and fusion system achieve 0.3164 and 0.2975 minDCF respectively. Besides, we submit the result of ResNet221 to the speaker retrieval track and achieve 0.4626 mAP. More importantly, we have helped the wespeaker [1] toolkit reproduce our result: https://github.com/wenet-e2e/wespeaker.
abstract_zh: 本技术报告介绍了上海交通大学 X-LANCE Lab 系统在 CNSRC 2022 三个赛道上的表现。在本次挑战赛中，我们探索了深度 ResNet（Deeper r-vector）的说话人嵌入建模能力。所有系统仅在 Cnceleb 训练集上进行训练，并且我们在 CNSRC 2022 的三个赛道上使用相同的系统。在本次挑战中，我们的系统在说话人验证任务的固定赛道中排名第一。我们最好的单一系统和融合系统分别达到 0.3164 和 0.2975 minDCF。此外，我们将ResNet22​​1的结果提交到说话人检索轨道并达到0.4626 mAP。更重要的是，我们帮助 wespeaker [1] 工具包重现了我们的结果：https://github.com/wenet-e2e/wespeaker。

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了SJTU X-LANCE实验室在CNSRC 2022挑战赛中针对说话人验证和检索任务的系统设计与实现。
AI.motivation: 探索深度ResNet模型在说话人嵌入建模中的能力，以提升说话人识别任务的性能。
AI.method: 基于深度ResNet（Deeper r-vector）构建说话人嵌入模型，仅使用Cnceleb训练集进行训练，并在三个赛道中统一应用该模型。
AI.result: 在固定赛道中排名第一，单系统minDCF为0.3164，融合系统为0.2975；说话人检索赛道mAP为0.4626；成功帮助wespeaker工具包复现结果。
AI.conclusion: 深度ResNet模型在说话人验证和检索任务中表现优异，且通过开源复现促进了技术共享与验证。

authors_text: Jinjin Gu,Haoming Cai,Chao Dong,Jimmy S. Ren,Radu Timofte
title: NTIRE 2022 Challenge on Perceptual Image Quality Assessment
title_zh: NTIRE 2022 感知图像质量评估挑战赛
comment: This report has been published in CVPR 2022 NTIRE workshop. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2105.03072
comments: This report has been published in CVPR 2022 NTIRE workshop. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2105.03072
abstract: This paper reports on the NTIRE 2022 challenge on perceptual image quality assessment (IQA), held in conjunction with the New Trends in Image Restoration and Enhancement workshop (NTIRE) workshop at CVPR 2022. This challenge is held to address the emerging challenge of IQA by perceptual image processing algorithms. The output images of these algorithms have completely different characteristics from traditional distortions and are included in the PIPAL dataset used in this challenge. This challenge is divided into two tracks, a full-reference IQA track similar to the previous NTIRE IQA challenge and a new track that focuses on the no-reference IQA methods. The challenge has 192 and 179 registered participants for two tracks. In the final testing stage, 7 and 8 participating teams submitted their models and fact sheets. Almost all of them have achieved better results than existing IQA methods, and the winning method can demonstrate state-of-the-art performance.
summary: This paper reports on the NTIRE 2022 challenge on perceptual image quality assessment (IQA), held in conjunction with the New Trends in Image Restoration and Enhancement workshop (NTIRE) workshop at CVPR 2022. This challenge is held to address the emerging challenge of IQA by perceptual image processing algorithms. The output images of these algorithms have completely different characteristics from traditional distortions and are included in the PIPAL dataset used in this challenge. This challenge is divided into two tracks, a full-reference IQA track similar to the previous NTIRE IQA challenge and a new track that focuses on the no-reference IQA methods. The challenge has 192 and 179 registered participants for two tracks. In the final testing stage, 7 and 8 participating teams submitted their models and fact sheets. Almost all of them have achieved better results than existing IQA methods, and the winning method can demonstrate state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 本文报道了 NTIRE 2022 感知图像质量评估 (IQA) 挑战，该挑战与 CVPR 2022 上的图像恢复和增强新趋势研讨会 (NTIRE) 研讨会联合举办。该挑战旨在通过感知图像处理算法解决 IQA 的新挑战。这些算法的输出图像具有与传统失真完全不同的特征，并且包含在本次挑战赛中使用的 PIPAL 数据集中。本次挑战赛分为两个赛道，一个与之前的 NTIRE IQA 挑战赛类似的全参考 IQA 赛道，以及一个专注于无参考 IQA 方法的新赛道。此次挑战赛的两个赛道分别有 192 名和 179 名注册参与者。在最后的测试阶段，7个和8个参赛团队提交了他们的模型和情况说明书。几乎所有的方法都取得了比现有 IQA 方法更好的结果，获胜的方法可以展示出最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 该论文报告了NTIRE 2022感知图像质量评估挑战赛，旨在通过两种跟踪（全参考和无参考）评估感知图像处理算法生成图像的质量。
AI.motivation: 传统图像质量评估方法难以应对感知算法生成的新型图像特性，需通过挑战赛推动相关技术的发展。
AI.method: 挑战赛使用PIPAL数据集，包含感知算法生成的图像，分为全参考和无参考两个赛道，参与者提交模型及技术文档进行评估。
AI.result: 两赛道分别有7支和8支队伍提交最终模型，多数方法优于现有技术，冠军方法达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 挑战赛验证了感知图像质量评估领域的新方法有效性，促进了无参考评估技术的发展，并凸显了竞赛在推动研究中的作用。

tldr: 该论文报告了NTIRE 2022感知图像质量评估挑战赛，旨在通过两种跟踪（全参考和无参考）评估感知图像处理算法生成图像的质量。
motivation: 传统图像质量评估方法难以应对感知算法生成的新型图像特性，需通过挑战赛推动相关技术的发展。
method: 挑战赛使用PIPAL数据集，包含感知算法生成的图像，分为全参考和无参考两个赛道，参与者提交模型及技术文档进行评估。
result: 两赛道分别有7支和8支队伍提交最终模型，多数方法优于现有技术，冠军方法达到最先进水平。
conclusion: 挑战赛验证了感知图像质量评估领域的新方法有效性，促进了无参考评估技术的发展，并凸显了竞赛在推动研究中的作用。
search_text: NTIRE 2022 Challenge on Perceptual Image Quality Assessment NTIRE 2022 感知图像质量评估挑战赛 This paper reports on the NTIRE 2022 challenge on perceptual image quality assessment (IQA), held in conjunction with the New Trends in Image Restoration and Enhancement workshop (NTIRE) workshop at CVPR 2022. This challenge is held to address the emerging challenge of IQA by perceptual image processing algorithms. The output images of these algorithms have completely different characteristics from traditional distortions and are included in the PIPAL dataset used in this challenge. This challenge is divided into two tracks, a full-reference IQA track similar to the previous NTIRE IQA challenge and a new track that focuses on the no-reference IQA methods. The challenge has 192 and 179 registered participants for two tracks. In the final testing stage, 7 and 8 participating teams submitted their models and fact sheets. Almost all of them have achieved better results than existing IQA methods, and the winning method can demonstrate state-of-the-art performance. 本文报道了 NTIRE 2022 感知图像质量评估 (IQA) 挑战，该挑战与 CVPR 2022 上的图像恢复和增强新趋势研讨会 (NTIRE) 研讨会联合举办。该挑战旨在通过感知图像处理算法解决 IQA 的新挑战。这些算法的输出图像具有与传统失真完全不同的特征，并且包含在本次挑战赛中使用的 PIPAL 数据集中。本次挑战赛分为两个赛道，一个与之前的 NTIRE IQA 挑战赛类似的全参考 IQA 赛道，以及一个专注于无参考 IQA 方法的新赛道。此次挑战赛的两个赛道分别有 192 名和 179 名注册参与者。在最后的测试阶段，7个和8个参赛团队提交了他们的模型和情况说明书。几乎所有的方法都取得了比现有 IQA 方法更好的结果，获胜的方法可以展示出最先进的性能。 该论文报告了NTIRE 2022感知图像质量评估挑战赛，旨在通过两种跟踪（全参考和无参考）评估感知图像处理算法生成图像的质量。 Jinjin Gu,Haoming Cai,Chao Dong,Jimmy S. Ren,Radu Timofte cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Chenhao Li,Marin Vlastelica,Sebastian Blaes,Jonas Frey,Felix Grimminger,Georg Martius
title: Learning Agile Skills via Adversarial Imitation of Rough Partial Demonstrations
title_zh: 通过对粗糙部分演示的对抗性模仿来学习敏捷技能
abstract: Learning agile skills is one of the main challenges in robotics. To this end, reinforcement learning approaches have achieved impressive results. These methods require explicit task information in terms of a reward function or an expert that can be queried in simulation to provide a target control output, which limits their applicability. In this work, we propose a generative adversarial method for inferring reward functions from partial and potentially physically incompatible demonstrations for successful skill acquirement where reference or expert demonstrations are not easily accessible. Moreover, we show that by using a Wasserstein GAN formulation and transitions from demonstrations with rough and partial information as input, we are able to extract policies that are robust and capable of imitating demonstrated behaviors. Finally, the obtained skills such as a backflip are tested on an agile quadruped robot called Solo 8 and present faithful replication of hand-held human demonstrations.
summary: Learning agile skills is one of the main challenges in robotics. To this end, reinforcement learning approaches have achieved impressive results. These methods require explicit task information in terms of a reward function or an expert that can be queried in simulation to provide a target control output, which limits their applicability. In this work, we propose a generative adversarial method for inferring reward functions from partial and potentially physically incompatible demonstrations for successful skill acquirement where reference or expert demonstrations are not easily accessible. Moreover, we show that by using a Wasserstein GAN formulation and transitions from demonstrations with rough and partial information as input, we are able to extract policies that are robust and capable of imitating demonstrated behaviors. Finally, the obtained skills such as a backflip are tested on an agile quadruped robot called Solo 8 and present faithful replication of hand-held human demonstrations.
abstract_zh: 学习敏捷技能是机器人技术的主要挑战之一。为此，强化学习方法取得了令人瞩目的成果。这些方法需要奖励函数或专家方面的明确任务信息，可以在模拟中查询这些信息以提供目标控制输出，这限制了它们的适用性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种生成对抗方法，用于从部分和可能物理上不兼容的演示中推断奖励函数，以在不易获得参考或专家演示的情况下成功获得技能。此外，我们表明，通过使用 Wasserstein GAN 公式以及以粗略和部分信息作为输入的演示的转换，我们能够提取稳健且能够模仿演示行为的策略。最后，所获得的后空翻等技能在名为 Solo 8 的敏捷四足机器人上进行了测试，并忠实地复制了手持式人类演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗模仿学习的方法，通过粗糙的部分示范数据学习敏捷技能，无需依赖专家演示或明确奖励函数。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习方法依赖明确奖励函数或专家演示，但实际中这些信息难以获取，尤其对于复杂敏捷技能的机器人学习场景。
AI.method: 采用Wasserstein GAN框架，利用部分物理不兼容的示范数据作为输入，推断奖励函数并训练鲁棒策略以模仿人类演示行为。
AI.result: 在敏捷四足机器人Solo 8上成功复现了后空翻等复杂技能，验证了方法对粗糙示范数据的鲁棒性及有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新方法通过对抗学习有效解决了部分示范数据下的技能获取问题，为机器人自主学习复杂动作提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Lei Liu,Shansuo Liang,Li Ping
title: Capacity Optimality of OAMP in Coded Large Unitarily Invariant Systems
title_zh: 编码大型酉不变系统中 OAMP 的容量最优性
comment: Accepted by the 2022 IEEE International Symposium on Information Theory (ISIT). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.08503
comments: Accepted by the 2022 IEEE International Symposium on Information Theory (ISIT). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.08503
abstract: This paper investigates a large unitarily invariant system (LUIS) involving a unitarily invariant sensing matrix, an arbitrary fixed signal distribution, and forward error control (FEC) coding. Several area properties are established based on the state evolution of orthogonal approximate message passing (OAMP) in an un-coded LUIS. Under the assumptions that the state evolution for joint OAMP and FEC decoding is correct and the replica method is reliable, we analyze the achievable rate of OAMP. We prove that OAMP reaches the constrained capacity predicted by the replica method of the LUIS with an arbitrary signal distribution based on matched FEC coding. Meanwhile, we elaborate a constrained capacity-achieving coding principle for LUIS, based on which irregular low-density parity-check (LDPC) codes are optimized for binary signaling in the simulation results. We show that OAMP with the optimized codes has significant performance improvement over the un-optimized ones and the well-known Turbo linear MMSE algorithm. For quadrature phase-shift keying (QPSK) modulation, constrained capacity-approaching bit error rate (BER) performances are observed under various channel conditions.
summary: This paper investigates a large unitarily invariant system (LUIS) involving a unitarily invariant sensing matrix, an arbitrary fixed signal distribution, and forward error control (FEC) coding. Several area properties are established based on the state evolution of orthogonal approximate message passing (OAMP) in an un-coded LUIS. Under the assumptions that the state evolution for joint OAMP and FEC decoding is correct and the replica method is reliable, we analyze the achievable rate of OAMP. We prove that OAMP reaches the constrained capacity predicted by the replica method of the LUIS with an arbitrary signal distribution based on matched FEC coding. Meanwhile, we elaborate a constrained capacity-achieving coding principle for LUIS, based on which irregular low-density parity-check (LDPC) codes are optimized for binary signaling in the simulation results. We show that OAMP with the optimized codes has significant performance improvement over the un-optimized ones and the well-known Turbo linear MMSE algorithm. For quadrature phase-shift keying (QPSK) modulation, constrained capacity-approaching bit error rate (BER) performances are observed under various channel conditions.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了一个大型酉不变系统 (LUIS)，涉及酉不变传感矩阵、任意固定信号分布和前向错误控制 (FEC) 编码。多个区域属性是基于未编码 LUIS 中正交近似消息传递 (OAMP) 的状态演化而建立的。在OAMP和FEC联合解码的状态演化正确且副本方法可靠的假设下，我们分析了OAMP的可实现速率。我们证明 OAMP 达到了由 LUIS 的副本方法预测的约束容量，具有基于匹配 FEC 编码的任意信号分布。同时，我们阐述了 LUIS 的受限容量实现编码原理，在此基础上，在仿真结果中针对二进制信令优化了不规则低密度奇偶校验（LDPC）码。我们表明，经过优化代码的 OAMP 比未优化代码和著名的 Turbo 线性 MMSE 算法具有显着的性能改进。对于正交相移键控 (QPSK) 调制，在各种信道条件下观察到接近受限容量的误码率 (BER) 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在编码的大单位不变系统（LUIS）中正交近似消息传递（OAMP）的容量最优性，分析其通过联合解码实现的信道容量。
AI.motivation: 在大规模通信系统中，如何通过优化编码与解码算法提升信息传输效率是关键问题，尤其需要结合前向纠错（FEC）编码与OAMP算法实现容量逼近。
AI.method: 基于无编码LUIS中OAMP的状态演化分析，结合复制法理论，建立联合OAMP-FEC解码的面积特性，并优化非规则低密度奇偶校验（LDPC）码设计。
AI.result: 证明OAMP在匹配FEC编码下可达到复制法预测的约束容量，优化后的LDPC码显著优于未优化方案及Turbo线性MMSE算法，QPSK调制下误码率性能接近理论极限。
AI.conclusion: 通过设计约束容量实现的编码原则，OAMP算法在编码LUIS中可高效逼近信道容量，为未来高可靠通信系统提供理论支持与实现方案。

authors_text: Ivan Grishchenko,Valentin Bazarevsky,Andrei Zanfir,Eduard Gabriel Bazavan,Mihai Zanfir,Richard Yee,Karthik Raveendran,Matsvei Zhdanovich,Matthias Grundmann,Cristian Sminchisescu
title: BlazePose GHUM Holistic: Real-time 3D Human Landmarks and Pose Estimation
title_zh: BlazePose GHUM Holistic：实时 3D 人体标志和姿势估计
comment: 4 pages, 4 figures; CVPR Workshop on Computer Vision for Augmented and Virtual Reality, New Orleans, LA, 2022
comments: 4 pages, 4 figures; CVPR Workshop on Computer Vision for Augmented and Virtual Reality, New Orleans, LA, 2022
abstract: We present BlazePose GHUM Holistic, a lightweight neural network pipeline for 3D human body landmarks and pose estimation, specifically tailored to real-time on-device inference. BlazePose GHUM Holistic enables motion capture from a single RGB image including avatar control, fitness tracking and AR/VR effects. Our main contributions include i) a novel method for 3D ground truth data acquisition, ii) updated 3D body tracking with additional hand landmarks and iii) full body pose estimation from a monocular image.
summary: We present BlazePose GHUM Holistic, a lightweight neural network pipeline for 3D human body landmarks and pose estimation, specifically tailored to real-time on-device inference. BlazePose GHUM Holistic enables motion capture from a single RGB image including avatar control, fitness tracking and AR/VR effects. Our main contributions include i) a novel method for 3D ground truth data acquisition, ii) updated 3D body tracking with additional hand landmarks and iii) full body pose estimation from a monocular image.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 BlazePose GHUM Holistic，这是一种用于 3D 人体地标和姿势估计的轻量级神经网络管道，专门针对实时设备上推理而定制。 BlazePose GHUM Holistic 可从单个 RGB 图像中进行动作捕捉，包括头像控制、健身跟踪和 AR/VR 效果。我们的主要贡献包括 i) 一种用于 3D 地面实况数据采集的新颖方法，ii) 使用额外的手部标志更新了 3D 身体跟踪，以及 iii) 从单目图像估计全身姿势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BlazePose GHUM Holistic，一种轻量级神经网络管道，用于实时设备端的3D人体地标和姿态估计，支持运动捕捉、虚拟形象控制等应用。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在实时性、设备端推理效率或3D姿态估计精度上存在不足，需开发更轻量且高效的解决方案以满足AR/VR、健身追踪等场景需求。
AI.method: 提出新型3D真实数据采集方法，改进3D人体追踪模型以包含手部地标，并实现基于单目图像的全身姿态估计，整体架构优化以支持实时设备端推理。
AI.result: 实现了轻量级实时3D人体姿态估计模型，可应用于单目图像下的全身动作捕捉、虚拟形象控制及AR/VR效果生成。
AI.conclusion: 通过创新数据采集方法与模型优化，BlazePose GHUM Holistic为设备端实时3D人体姿态估计提供了高效解决方案，推动了相关应用场景的发展。

search_text: BlazePose GHUM Holistic: Real-time 3D Human Landmarks and Pose Estimation BlazePose GHUM Holistic：实时 3D 人体标志和姿势估计 We present BlazePose GHUM Holistic, a lightweight neural network pipeline for 3D human body landmarks and pose estimation, specifically tailored to real-time on-device inference. BlazePose GHUM Holistic enables motion capture from a single RGB image including avatar control, fitness tracking and AR/VR effects. authors_text: Lei Liu,Shunqi Huang,Brian M. Kurkoski
title: Sufficient Statistic Memory Approximate Message Passing
title_zh: 足够的统计内存近似消息传递
comment: Accepted by the 2022 IEEE International Symposium on Information Theory (ISIT). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2112.15327
comments: Accepted by the 2022 IEEE International Symposium on Information Theory (ISIT). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2112.15327
abstract: Approximate message passing (AMP) type algorithms have been widely used in the signal reconstruction of certain large random linear systems. A key feature of the AMP-type algorithms is that their dynamics can be correctly described by state evolution. However, state evolution does not necessarily guarantee the convergence of iterative algorithms. To solve the convergence problem of AMP-type algorithms in principle, this paper proposes a memory AMP (MAMP) under a sufficient statistic condition, named sufficient statistic MAMP (SS-MAMP). We show that the covariance matrices of SS-MAMP are L-banded and convergent. Given an arbitrary MAMP, we can construct the SS-MAMP by damping, which not only ensures the convergence, but also preserves the orthogonality, i.e., its dynamics can be correctly described by state evolution.
summary: Approximate message passing (AMP) type algorithms have been widely used in the signal reconstruction of certain large random linear systems. A key feature of the AMP-type algorithms is that their dynamics can be correctly described by state evolution. However, state evolution does not necessarily guarantee the convergence of iterative algorithms. To solve the convergence problem of AMP-type algorithms in principle, this paper proposes a memory AMP (MAMP) under a sufficient statistic condition, named sufficient statistic MAMP (SS-MAMP). We show that the covariance matrices of SS-MAMP are L-banded and convergent. Given an arbitrary MAMP, we can construct the SS-MAMP by damping, which not only ensures the convergence, but also preserves the orthogonality, i.e., its dynamics can be correctly described by state evolution.
abstract_zh: 近似消息传递（AMP）型算法已广泛应用于某些大型随机线性系统的信号重构中。 AMP 类型算法的一个关键特征是它们的动态可以通过状态演化来正确描述。然而，状态演化并不一定保证迭代算法的收敛。为了从原理上解决AMP类算法的收敛问题，本文提出了一种充分统计条件下的记忆AMP（MAMP），命名为充分统计MAMP（SS-MAMP）。我们证明 SS-MAMP 的协方差矩阵是 L 带状且收敛的。给定一个任意的MAMP，我们可以通过阻尼构造SS-MAMP，这不仅保证了收敛性，而且还保留了正交性，即它的动力学可以通过状态演化来正确描述。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于充分统计量的记忆近似消息传递算法（SS-MAMP），以解决传统AMP算法在收敛性上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有AMP类算法虽能通过状态演化描述动态，但无法保证迭代收敛，需在理论上解决收敛性问题。
AI.method: 通过引入记忆机制与充分统计量条件，构建SS-MAMP算法，并利用阻尼技术确保收敛性同时保持正交性。
AI.result: 证明SS-MAMP的协方差矩阵具有L-带状结构且收敛，且其动态可被状态演化准确描述。
AI.conclusion: SS-MAMP在保证收敛性的同时保留了AMP的正交性优势，为大规模线性系统信号重建提供理论保障。

authors_text: Manmeet Singh,Vaisakh S B,Nachiketa Acharya,Aditya Grover,Suryachandra A Rao,Bipin Kumar,Zong-Liang Yang,Dev Niyogi
title: Short-range forecasts of global precipitation using deep learning-augmented numerical weather prediction
title_zh: 使用深度学习增强数值天气预报对全球降水进行短期预测
comment: Accepted at Tackling Climate Change with Machine Learning: workshop at NeurIPS 2022
comments: Accepted at Tackling Climate Change with Machine Learning: workshop at NeurIPS 2022
abstract: Precipitation governs Earth's hydroclimate, and its daily spatiotemporal fluctuations have major socioeconomic effects. Advances in Numerical weather prediction (NWP) have been measured by the improvement of forecasts for various physical fields such as temperature and pressure; however, large biases exist in precipitation prediction. We augment the output of the well-known NWP model CFSv2 with deep learning to create a hybrid model that improves short-range global precipitation at 1-, 2-, and 3-day lead times. To hybridise, we address the sphericity of the global data by using modified DLWP-CS architecture which transforms all the fields to cubed-sphere projection. Dynamical model precipitation and surface temperature outputs are fed into a modified DLWP-CS (UNET) to forecast ground truth precipitation. While CFSv2's average bias is +5 to +7 mm/day over land, the multivariate deep learning model decreases it to within -1 to +1 mm/day. Hurricane Katrina in 2005, Hurricane Ivan in 2004, China floods in 2010, India floods in 2005, and Myanmar storm Nargis in 2008 are used to confirm the substantial enhancement in the skill for the hybrid dynamical-deep learning model. CFSv2 typically shows a moderate to large bias in the spatial pattern and overestimates the precipitation at short-range time scales. The proposed deep learning augmented NWP model can address these biases and vastly improve the spatial pattern and magnitude of predicted precipitation. Deep learning enhanced CFSv2 reduces mean bias by 8x over important land regions for 1 day lead compared to CFSv2. The spatio-temporal deep learning system opens pathways to further the precision and accuracy in global short-range precipitation forecasts.

While CFSv2's average bias is +5 to +7 mm/day over land, the multivariate deep learning model decreases it to within -1 to +1 mm/day. CFSv2 typically shows a moderate to large bias in the spatial pattern and overestimates the precipitation at short-range time scales. abstract_zh: 降水控制着地球的水文气候，其每日时空波动具有重大的社会经济影响。数值天气预报（NWP）的进步是通过对温度和压力等各种物理场的预报的改进来衡量的；然而，降水预测存在较大偏差。我们通过深度学习增强了著名的 NWP 模型 CFSv2 的输出，创建了一个混合模型，可以在 1 天、2 天和 3 天的交付时间内改善短期全球降水。为了进行混合，我们通过使用修改后的 DLWP-CS 架构来解决全局数据的球形问题，该架构将所有字段转换为立方球投影。动态模型降水和地表温度输出被输入到改进的 DLWP-CS (UNET) 中，以预测地面真实降水。虽然 CFSv2 在陆地上的平均偏差为 +5 至 +7 毫米/天，但多元深度学习模型将其降低至 -1 至 +1 毫米/天以内。 2005年卡特里娜飓风、2004年伊万飓风、2010年中国洪水、2005年印度洪水和2008年缅甸风暴纳尔吉斯都被用来证实混合动态-深度学习模型技能的大幅提高。 CFSv2 通常在空间格局中表现出中等到大的偏差，并且高估了短程时间尺度的降水量。所提出的深度学习增强数值天气预报模型可以解决这些偏差，并极大地改善预测降水的空间格局和强度。与 CFSv2 相比，深度学习增强型 CFSv2 将重要陆地区域的平均偏差减少了 8 倍，领先 1 天。时空深度学习系统为提高全球短期降水预报的精度和准确性开辟了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合深度学习与数值天气预报（NWP）的混合模型，用于改进全球短时降水预测。
AI.motivation: 传统数值天气预报模型（如CFSv2）在降水预测中存在显著偏差，影响社会经济相关领域，需通过深度学习技术提升预测精度。
AI.method: 采用改进的DLWP-CS架构，将全球数据转换为立方体投影以处理球面特性，利用UNET网络融合动力模型输出的降水和地表温度数据进行预测。
AI.result: 混合模型将CFSv2在陆地地区的平均偏差从+5至+7 mm/day降至-1至+1 mm/day，且在多个极端天气事件中验证了预测能力的显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习增强的NWP模型有效降低了降水预测偏差，为全球短时降水预报的精度和准确性提供了新路径。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 深度学习增强的NWP模型有效降低了降水预测偏差，为全球短时降水预报的精度和准确性提供了新路径。

tldr: 本文提出了一种结合深度学习与数值天气预报（NWP）的混合模型，用于改进全球短时降水预测。
motivation: 传统数值天气预报模型（如CFSv2）在降水预测中存在显著偏差，影响社会经济相关领域，需通过深度学习技术提升预测精度。
method: 采用改进的DLWP-CS架构，将全球数据转换为立方体投影以处理球面特性，利用UNET网络融合动力模型输出的降水和地表温度数据进行预测。
result: 混合模型将CFSv2在陆地地区的平均偏差从+5至+7 mm/day降至-1至+1 mm/day，且在多个极端天气事件中验证了预测能力的显著提升。
conclusion: 深度学习增强的NWP模型有效降低了降水预测偏差，为全球短时降水预报的精度和准确性提供了新路径。
search_text: Short-range forecasts of global precipitation using deep learning-augmented numerical weather prediction 使用深度学习增强数值天气预报对全球降水进行短期预测 Precipitation governs Earth's hydroclimate, and its daily spatiotemporal fluctuations have major socioeconomic effects. Advances in Numerical weather prediction (NWP) have been measured by the improvement of forecasts for various physical fields such as temperature and pressure; however, large biases exist in precipitation prediction. We augment the output of the well-known NWP model CFSv2 with deep learning to create a hybrid model that improves short-range global precipitation at 1-, 2-, and 3-day lead times. To hybridise, we address the sphericity of the global data by using modified DLWP-CS architecture which transforms all the fields to cubed-sphere projection. Dynamical model precipitation and surface temperature outputs are fed into a modified DLWP-CS (UNET) to forecast ground truth precipitation. While CFSv2's average bias is +5 to +7 mm/day over land, the multivariate deep learning model decreases it to within -1 to +1 mm/day. Hurricane Katrina in 2005, Hurricane Ivan in 2004, China floods in 2010, India floods in 2005, and Myanmar storm Nargis in 2008 are used to confirm the substantial enhancement in the skill for the hybrid dynamical-deep learning model. CFSv2 typically shows a moderate to large bias in the spatial pattern and overestimates the precipitation at short-range time scales. The proposed deep learning augmented NWP model can address these biases and vastly improve the spatial pattern and magnitude of predicted precipitation. Deep learning enhanced CFSv2 reduces mean bias by 8x over important land regions for 1 day lead compared to CFSv2. The spatio-temporal deep learning system opens pathways to further the precision and accuracy in global short-range precipitation forecasts. 降水控制着地球的水文气候，其每日时空波动具有重大的社会经济影响。数值天气预报（NWP）的进步是通过对温度和压力等各种物理场的预报的改进来衡量的；然而，降水预测存在较大偏差。我们通过深度学习增强了著名的 NWP 模型 CFSv2 的输出，创建了一个混合模型，可以在 1 天、2 天和 3 天的交付时间内改善短期全球降水。为了进行混合，我们通过使用修改后的 DLWP-CS 架构来解决全局数据的球形问题，该架构将所有字段转换为立方球投影。动态模型降水和地表温度输出被输入到改进的 DLWP-CS (UNET) 中，以预测地面真实降水。虽然 CFSv2 在陆地上的平均偏差为 +5 至 +7 毫米/天，但多元深度学习模型将其降低至 -1 至 +1 毫米/天以内。 2005年卡特里娜飓风、2004年伊万飓风、2010年中国洪水、2005年印度洪水和2008年缅甸风暴纳尔吉斯都被用来证实混合动态-深度学习模型技能的大幅提高。 CFSv2 通常在空间格局中表现出中等到大的偏差，并且高估了短程时间尺度的降水量。所提出的深度学习增强数值天气预报模型可以解决这些偏差，并极大地改善预测降水的空间格局和强度。与 CFSv2 相比，深度学习增强型 CFSv2 将重要陆地区域的平均偏差减少了 8 倍，领先 1 天。时空深度学习系统为提高全球短期降水预报的精度和准确性开辟了道路。 本文提出了一种结合深度学习与数值天气预报（NWP）的混合模型，用于改进全球短时降水预测。 Manmeet Singh,Vaisakh S B,Nachiketa Acharya,Aditya Grover,Suryachandra A Rao,Bipin Kumar,Zong-Liang Yang,Dev Niyogi physics.ao-ph,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Xinrui Zhan,Yang Li,Wenyu Liu,Jianke Zhu
title: Warped Convolutional Networks: Bridge Homography to sl(3) algebra by Group Convolution
title_zh: 扭曲卷积网络：通过群卷积将单应性桥接到 sl(3) 代数
abstract: Homography has an essential relationship with the special linear group and the embedding Lie algebra structure. Although the Lie algebra representation is elegant, few researchers have established the connection between homography and algebra expression in neural networks. In this paper, we propose Warped Convolution Networks (WCN) to effectively learn and represent the homography by SL(3) group and sl(3) algebra with group convolution. To this end, six commutative subgroups within the SL(3) group are composed to form a homography. For each subgroup, a warping function is proposed to bridge the Lie algebra structure to its corresponding parameters in homography. By taking advantage of the warped convolution, homography learning is formulated into several simple pseudo-translation regressions. By walking along the Lie topology, our proposed WCN is able to learn the features that are invariant to homography. Moreover, it can be easily plugged into other popular CNN-based methods. Extensive experiments on the POT benchmark, S-COCO-Proj, and MNIST-Proj dataset show that our proposed method is effective for planar object tracking, homography estimation, and classification.
summary: Homography has an essential relationship with the special linear group and the embedding Lie algebra structure. Although the Lie algebra representation is elegant, few researchers have established the connection between homography and algebra expression in neural networks. In this paper, we propose Warped Convolution Networks (WCN) to effectively learn and represent the homography by SL(3) group and sl(3) algebra with group convolution. To this end, six commutative subgroups within the SL(3) group are composed to form a homography. For each subgroup, a warping function is proposed to bridge the Lie algebra structure to its corresponding parameters in homography. By taking advantage of the warped convolution, homography learning is formulated into several simple pseudo-translation regressions. By walking along the Lie topology, our proposed WCN is able to learn the features that are invariant to homography. Moreover, it can be easily plugged into other popular CNN-based methods. Extensive experiments on the POT benchmark, S-COCO-Proj, and MNIST-Proj dataset show that our proposed method is effective for planar object tracking, homography estimation, and classification.
abstract_zh: 单应性与特殊线性群和嵌入李代数结构有着本质的关系。尽管李代数表示很优雅，但很少有研究人员建立单应性和神经网络中代数表达之间的联系。在本文中，我们提出了扭曲卷积网络（WCN），通过 SL(3) 群和具有群卷积的 sl(3) 代数来有效地学习和表示单应性。为此，SL(3)群内的六个交换子群被组合起来形成单应性。对于每个子群，提出了一个扭曲函数来将李代数结构桥接到单应性中相应的参数。通过利用扭曲卷积，单应性学习被表述为几个简单的伪翻译回归。通过沿着李拓扑行走，我们提出的 WCN 能够学习单应性不变的特征。此外，它可以轻松插入其他流行的基于 CNN 的方法中。在 POT 基准、S-COCO-Proj 和 MNIST-Proj 数据集上的大量实验表明，我们提出的方法对于平面对象跟踪、单应性估计和分类是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过SL(3)群和sl(3)代数的群卷积来有效学习和表示单应性的卷积网络——Warped Convolution Networks (WCN)。
AI.motivation: 单应性与特殊线性群及嵌入李代数结构存在本质联系，但现有研究尚未在神经网络中建立单应性与代数表达的连接，需探索更有效的学习方法。
AI.method: 通过组合SL(3)群内的六个交换子群构建单应性，并为每个子群设计扭曲函数，将李代数结构映射到单应性参数。利用扭曲卷积将单应性学习转化为简单的伪平移回归问题。
AI.result: 在POT、S-COCO-Proj和MNIST-Proj数据集上的实验表明，该方法在平面目标跟踪、单应性估计和分类任务中均表现有效。
AI.conclusion: WCN能够通过李群拓扑学习单应性不变特征，并可无缝集成到主流CNN方法中，为几何感知的深度学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Laxman Dhulipala,David Eisenstat,Jakub Łącki,Vahab Mirronki,Jessica Shi
title: Hierarchical Agglomerative Graph Clustering in Poly-Logarithmic Depth
title_zh: 多对数深度的层次凝聚图聚类
abstract: Obtaining scalable algorithms for hierarchical agglomerative clustering (HAC) is of significant interest due to the massive size of real-world datasets. At the same time, efficiently parallelizing HAC is difficult due to the seemingly sequential nature of the algorithm. In this paper, we address this issue and present ParHAC, the first efficient parallel HAC algorithm with sublinear depth for the widely-used average-linkage function. In particular, we provide a $(1+ε)$-approximation algorithm for this problem on $m$ edge graphs using $\tilde{O}(m)$ work and poly-logarithmic depth. Moreover, we show that obtaining similar bounds for exact average-linkage HAC is not possible under standard complexity-theoretic assumptions. We complement our theoretical results with a comprehensive study of the ParHAC algorithm in terms of its scalability, performance, and quality, and compare with several state-of-the-art sequential and parallel baselines. On a broad set of large publicly-available real-world datasets, we find that ParHAC obtains a 50.1x speedup on average over the best sequential baseline, while achieving quality similar to the exact HAC algorithm. We also show that ParHAC can cluster one of the largest publicly available graph datasets with 124 billion edges in a little over three hours using a commodity multicore machine.
summary: Obtaining scalable algorithms for hierarchical agglomerative clustering (HAC) is of significant interest due to the massive size of real-world datasets. At the same time, efficiently parallelizing HAC is difficult due to the seemingly sequential nature of the algorithm. In this paper, we address this issue and present ParHAC, the first efficient parallel HAC algorithm with sublinear depth for the widely-used average-linkage function. In particular, we provide a $(1+ε)$-approximation algorithm for this problem on $m$ edge graphs using $\tilde{O}(m)$ work and poly-logarithmic depth. Moreover, we show that obtaining similar bounds for exact average-linkage HAC is not possible under standard complexity-theoretic assumptions. We complement our theoretical results with a comprehensive study of the ParHAC algorithm in terms of its scalability, performance, and quality, and compare with several state-of-the-art sequential and parallel baselines. On a broad set of large publicly-available real-world datasets, we find that ParHAC obtains a 50.1x speedup on average over the best sequential baseline, while achieving quality similar to the exact HAC algorithm. We also show that ParHAC can cluster one of the largest publicly available graph datasets with 124 billion edges in a little over three hours using a commodity multicore machine.
abstract_zh: 由于现实世界数据集的规模巨大，获得层次凝聚聚类 (HAC) 的可扩展算法引起了人们的极大兴趣。同时，由于算法看似顺序的性质，高效并行 HAC 很困难。在本文中，我们解决了这个问题并提出了 ParHAC，这是第一个针对广泛使用的平均联动函数具有次线性深度的高效并行 HAC 算法。特别是，我们使用 $\tilde{O}(m)$ 工作和多对数深度，在 $m$ 边图上为该问题提供了 $(1+ε)$ 近似算法。此外，我们表明，在标准复杂性理论假设下，不可能获得精确平均链接 HAC 的类似界限。我们通过对 ParHAC 算法在可扩展性、性能和质量方面的全面研究来补充我们的理论结果，并与几个最先进的顺序和并行基线进行比较。在大量公开可用的真实世界数据集上，我们发现 ParHAC 比最佳顺序基线平均加速了 50.1 倍，同时实现了与精确 HAC 算法类似的质量。我们还表明，ParHAC 可以使用商用多核机器在三个多小时内对最大的公开可用图数据集之一（具有 1240 亿条边）进行聚类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ParHAC的高效并行层次聚合图聚类算法，能够在亚线性深度内处理大规模数据集。
AI.motivation: 层次聚合聚类（HAC）在处理大规模现实数据时面临可扩展性和并行化困难，尤其是平均链函数的计算难以高效并行。
AI.method: 设计ParHAC算法，基于(1+ε)近似方案，使用O(m)工作量和多项式对数深度，并证明在标准复杂度假设下无法实现精确平均链HAC的类似界。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上，ParHAC相比最佳顺序基线平均加速50.1倍，且质量接近精确HAC，可处理1240亿边的超大规模图数据。
AI.conclusion: ParHAC为大规模图聚类提供了可扩展的并行解决方案，在速度与质量间取得平衡，具有实际应用价值。

result: 在多个真实数据集上，ParHAC相比最佳顺序基线平均加速50.1倍，且质量接近精确HAC，可处理1240亿边的超大规模图数据。
conclusion: ParHAC为大规模图聚类提供了可扩展的并行解决方案，在速度与质量间取得平衡，具有实际应用价值。
search_text: Hierarchical Agglomerative Graph Clustering in Poly-Logarithmic Depth 多对数深度的层次凝聚图聚类 Obtaining scalable algorithms for hierarchical agglomerative clustering (HAC) is of significant interest due to the massive size of real-world datasets. At the same time, efficiently parallelizing HAC is difficult due to the seemingly sequential nature of the algorithm. In this paper, we address this issue and present ParHAC, the first efficient parallel HAC algorithm with sublinear depth for the widely-used average-linkage function. In particular, we provide a $(1+ε)$-approximation algorithm for this problem on $m$ edge graphs using $\tilde{O}(m)$ work and poly-logarithmic depth. Moreover, we show that obtaining similar bounds for exact average-linkage HAC is not possible under standard complexity-theoretic assumptions. We complement our theoretical results with a comprehensive study of the ParHAC algorithm in terms of its scalability, performance, and quality, and compare with several state-of-the-art sequential and parallel baselines. On a broad set of large publicly-available real-world datasets, we find that ParHAC obtains a 50.1x speedup on average over the best sequential baseline, while achieving quality similar to the exact HAC algorithm. We also show that ParHAC can cluster one of the largest publicly available graph datasets with 124 billion edges in a little over three hours using a commodity multicore machine. 由于现实世界数据集的规模巨大，获得层次凝聚聚类 (HAC) 的可扩展算法引起了人们的极大兴趣。同时，由于算法看似顺序的性质，高效并行 HAC 很困难。在本文中，我们解决了这个问题并提出了 ParHAC，这是第一个针对广泛使用的平均联动函数具有次线性深度的高效并行 HAC 算法。特别是，我们使用 $\tilde{O}(m)$ 工作和多对数深度，在 $m$ 边图上为该问题提供了 $(1+ε)$ 近似算法。此外，我们表明，在标准复杂性理论假设下，不可能获得精确平均链接 HAC 的类似界限。我们通过对 ParHAC 算法在可扩展性、性能和质量方面的全面研究来补充我们的理论结果，并与几个最先进的顺序和并行基线进行比较。在大量公开可用的真实世界数据集上，我们发现 ParHAC 比最佳顺序基线平均加速了 50.1 倍，同时实现了与精确 HAC 算法类似的质量。我们还表明，ParHAC 可以使用商用多核机器在三个多小时内对最大的公开可用图数据集之一（具有 1240 亿条边）进行聚类。 本文提出了一种名为ParHAC的高效并行层次聚合图聚类算法，能够在亚线性深度内处理大规模数据集。 Laxman Dhulipala,David Eisenstat,Jakub Łącki,Vahab Mirronki,Jessica Shi cs.DS,cs.DC

authors_text: Chaofan Zheng,Xinyu Lyu,Yuyu Guo,Pengpeng Zeng,Jingkuan Song,Lianli Gao
title: Learning To Generate Scene Graph from Head to Tail
title_zh: 学习从头到尾生成场景图
abstract: Scene Graph Generation (SGG) represents objects and their interactions with a graph structure. Recently, many works are devoted to solving the imbalanced problem in SGG. However, underestimating the head predicates in the whole training process, they wreck the features of head predicates that provide general features for tail ones. Besides, assigning excessive attention to the tail predicates leads to semantic deviation. Based on this, we propose a novel SGG framework, learning to generate scene graphs from Head to Tail (SGG-HT), containing Curriculum Re-weight Mechanism (CRM) and Semantic Context Module (SCM). CRM learns head/easy samples firstly for robust features of head predicates and then gradually focuses on tail/hard ones. SCM is proposed to relieve semantic deviation by ensuring the semantic consistency between the generated scene graph and the ground truth in global and local representations. Experiments show that SGG-HT significantly alleviates the biased problem and chieves state-of-the-art performances on Visual Genome.
summary: Scene Graph Generation (SGG) represents objects and their interactions with a graph structure. Recently, many works are devoted to solving the imbalanced problem in SGG. However, underestimating the head predicates in the whole training process, they wreck the features of head predicates that provide general features for tail ones. Besides, assigning excessive attention to the tail predicates leads to semantic deviation. Based on this, we propose a novel SGG framework, learning to generate scene graphs from Head to Tail (SGG-HT), containing Curriculum Re-weight Mechanism (CRM) and Semantic Context Module (SCM). CRM learns head/easy samples firstly for robust features of head predicates and then gradually focuses on tail/hard ones. SCM is proposed to relieve semantic deviation by ensuring the semantic consistency between the generated scene graph and the ground truth in global and local representations. Experiments show that SGG-HT significantly alleviates the biased problem and chieves state-of-the-art performances on Visual Genome.
abstract_zh: 场景图生成（SGG）表示对象及其与图结构的交互。最近，许多工作致力于解决 SGG 中的不平衡问题。然而，在整个训练过程中低估了头部谓词，它们破坏了为尾部谓词提供一般特征的头部谓词的特征。此外，过度关注尾部谓词会导致语义偏差。基于此，我们提出了一种新颖的SGG框架，学习从头到尾生成场景图（SGG-HT），包含课程重权机制（CRM）和语义上下文模块（SCM）。 CRM 首先学习头部/简单样本，以获得头部谓词的稳健特征，然后逐渐关注尾部/困难样本。 SCM 的提出是为了通过确保生成的场景图与全局和局部表示中的真实情况之间的语义一致性来减轻语义偏差。实验表明，SGG-HT 显着缓解了偏差问题，并在视觉基因组上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 解决场景图生成中的头尾预测词不平衡问题，提出从头到尾生成场景图的框架
AI.motivation: 现有方法在解决不平衡问题时低估头预测词特征，过度关注尾预测词导致语义偏差，需新框架平衡两者
AI.method: 提出SGG-HT框架，包含课程重加权机制（CRM）和语义上下文模块（SCM），分阶段学习头/简单样本并确保语义一致性
AI.result: 显著缓解偏差问题，在Visual Genome数据集上达到最先进的性能
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效解决头尾预测词不平衡问题，提升场景图生成性能

authors_text: Junhao Xu,Shoukang Hu,Xunying Liu,Helen Meng
title: Towards Green ASR: Lossless 4-bit Quantization of a Hybrid TDNN System on the 300-hr Switchboard Corpus
title_zh: 迈向绿色 ASR：300 小时交换机语料库上混合 TDNN 系统的无损 4 位量化
comment: Interspeech 2022 Accepted. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2111.14479
comments: Interspeech 2022 Accepted. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2111.14479
abstract: State of the art time automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems are becoming increasingly complex and expensive for practical applications. This paper presents the development of a high performance and low-footprint 4-bit quantized LF-MMI trained factored time delay neural networks (TDNNs) based ASR system on the 300-hr Switchboard corpus. A key feature of the overall system design is to account for the fine-grained, varying performance sensitivity at different model components to quantization errors. To this end, a set of neural architectural compression and mixed precision quantization approaches were used to facilitate hidden layer level auto-configuration of optimal factored TDNN weight matrix subspace dimensionality and quantization bit-widths. The proposed techniques were also used to produce 2-bit mixed precision quantized Transformer language models. Experiments conducted on the Switchboard data suggest that the proposed neural architectural compression and mixed precision quantization techniques consistently outperform the uniform precision quantised baseline systems of comparable bit-widths in terms of word error rate (WER). An overall "lossless" compression ratio of 13.6 was obtained over the baseline full precision system including both the TDNN and Transformer components while incurring no statistically significant WER increase.
summary: State of the art time automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems are becoming increasingly complex and expensive for practical applications. This paper presents the development of a high performance and low-footprint 4-bit quantized LF-MMI trained factored time delay neural networks (TDNNs) based ASR system on the 300-hr Switchboard corpus. A key feature of the overall system design is to account for the fine-grained, varying performance sensitivity at different model components to quantization errors. To this end, a set of neural architectural compression and mixed precision quantization approaches were used to facilitate hidden layer level auto-configuration of optimal factored TDNN weight matrix subspace dimensionality and quantization bit-widths. The proposed techniques were also used to produce 2-bit mixed precision quantized Transformer language models. Experiments conducted on the Switchboard data suggest that the proposed neural architectural compression and mixed precision quantization techniques consistently outperform the uniform precision quantised baseline systems of comparable bit-widths in terms of word error rate (WER). An overall "lossless" compression ratio of 13.6 was obtained over the baseline full precision system including both the TDNN and Transformer components while incurring no statistically significant WER increase.
abstract_zh: 对于实际应用来说，最先进的自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统变得越来越复杂和昂贵。本文介绍了基于 300 小时 Switchboard 语料库的基于 ASR 系统的高性能、低占用空间的 4 位量化 LF-MMI 训练因子时间延迟神经网络 (TDNN) 的开发。整个系统设计的一个关键特征是考虑不同模型组件对量化误差的细粒度、不同的性能敏感性。为此，使用了一组神经架构压缩和混合精度量化方法来促进最佳分解 TDNN 权重矩阵子空间维数和量化位宽的隐藏层级自动配置。所提出的技术还用于生成 2 位混合精度量化 Transformer 语言模型。对 Switchboard 数据进行的实验表明，所提出的神经架构压缩和混合精度量化技术在字错误率 (WER) 方面始终优于可比位宽的统一精度量化基线系统。与包括 TDNN 和 Transformer 组件在内的基准全精度系统相比，获得了 13.6 的总体“无损”压缩比，同时没有出现统计上显着的 WER 增加。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混合时延神经网络（TDNN）系统的无损4位量化方法，旨在开发高性能且低资源占用的自动语音识别（ASR）系统。
AI.motivation: 当前最先进的ASR系统因复杂性和高昂成本难以实际应用，需探索更高效的模型压缩技术以降低计算资源消耗。
AI.method: 采用神经架构压缩与混合精度量化技术，针对模型不同组件对量化误差的敏感性进行精细化调整，并自动配置TDNN权重矩阵子空间维度及量化位宽。
AI.result: 在Switchboard数据集上实现13.6倍的无损压缩比，同时保持与全精度基线系统相当的词错误率（WER）。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了模型压缩与识别精度，为实用化低功耗ASR系统提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Antonio Giganti,Luca Cuccovillo,Paolo Bestagini,Patrick Aichroth,Stefano Tubaro
title: Speaker-Independent Microphone Identification in Noisy Conditions
title_zh: 噪声条件下独立于扬声器的麦克风识别
comment: ef:in European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO), Belgrade, Serbia, 2022, pp. 1047-1051
comments: ef:in European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO), Belgrade, Serbia, 2022, pp. 1047-1051
abstract: This work proposes a method for source device identification from speech recordings that applies neural-network-based denoising, to mitigate the impact of counter-forensics attacks using noise injection. The method is evaluated by comparing the impact of denoising on three state-of-the-art features for microphone classification, determining their discriminating power with and without denoising being applied. The proposed framework achieves a significant performance increase for noisy material, and more generally, validates the usefulness of applying denoising prior to device identification for noisy recordings.
summary: This work proposes a method for source device identification from speech recordings that applies neural-network-based denoising, to mitigate the impact of counter-forensics attacks using noise injection. The method is evaluated by comparing the impact of denoising on three state-of-the-art features for microphone classification, determining their discriminating power with and without denoising being applied. The proposed framework achieves a significant performance increase for noisy material, and more generally, validates the usefulness of applying denoising prior to device identification for noisy recordings.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种从语音记录中识别源设备的方法，该方法应用基于神经网络的去噪，以减轻使用噪声注入的反取证攻击的影响。通过比较去噪对麦克风分类的三种最先进特征的影响来评估该方法，确定它们在应用和不应用去噪的情况下的区分能力。所提出的框架显着提高了噪声材料的性能，并且更广泛地验证了在噪声录音的设备识别之前应用去噪的有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的降噪方法，用于在噪声环境下实现与说话者无关的麦克风识别，以应对对抗性攻击。
AI.motivation: 对抗性攻击通过注入噪声干扰麦克风识别，需有效方法提升噪声环境下的识别准确性。
AI.method: 采用神经网络降噪技术，对比三种麦克风分类特征在有无降噪情况下的判别能力。
AI.result: 框架在噪声材料上显著提升性能，验证了降噪预处理对设备识别的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 降噪预处理能有效增强噪声录音中的麦克风识别性能，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Speaker-Independent Microphone Identification in Noisy Conditions 噪声条件下独立于扬声器的麦克风识别 This work proposes a method for source device identification from speech recordings that applies neural-network-based denoising, to mitigate the impact of counter-forensics attacks using noise injection. The method is evaluated by comparing the impact of denoising on three state-of-the-art features for microphone classification, determining their discriminating power with and without denoising being applied. The proposed framework achieves a significant performance increase for noisy material, and more generally, validates the usefulness of applying denoising prior to device identification for noisy recordings. 这项工作提出了一种从语音记录中识别源设备的方法，该方法应用基于神经网络的去噪，以减轻使用噪声注入的反取证攻击的影响。通过比较去噪对麦克风分类的三种最先进特征的影响来评估该方法，确定它们在应用和不应用去噪的情况下的区分能力。所提出的框架显着提高了噪声材料的性能，并且更广泛地验证了在噪声录音的设备识别之前应用去噪的有用性。 本文提出一种基于神经网络的降噪方法，用于在噪声环境下实现与说话者无关的麦克风识别，以应对对抗性攻击。 Antonio Giganti,Luca Cuccovillo,Paolo Bestagini,Patrick Aichroth,Stefano Tubaro eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Yosi Shrem,Felix Kreuk,Joseph Keshet
title: Formant Estimation and Tracking using Probabilistic Heat-Maps
title_zh: 使用概率热图进行共振峰估计和跟踪
abstract: Formants are the spectral maxima that result from acoustic resonances of the human vocal tract, and their accurate estimation is among the most fundamental speech processing problems. Recent work has been shown that those frequencies can accurately be estimated using deep learning techniques. However, when presented with a speech from a different domain than that in which they have been trained on, these methods exhibit a decline in performance, limiting their usage as generic tools. The contribution of this paper is to propose a new network architecture that performs well on a variety of different speaker and speech domains. Our proposed model is composed of a shared encoder that gets as input a spectrogram and outputs a domain-invariant representation. Then, multiple decoders further process this representation, each responsible for predicting a different formant while considering the lower formant predictions. An advantage of our model is that it is based on heatmaps that generate a probability distribution over formant predictions. Results suggest that our proposed model better represents the signal over various domains and leads to better formant frequency tracking and estimation.
summary: Formants are the spectral maxima that result from acoustic resonances of the human vocal tract, and their accurate estimation is among the most fundamental speech processing problems. Recent work has been shown that those frequencies can accurately be estimated using deep learning techniques. However, when presented with a speech from a different domain than that in which they have been trained on, these methods exhibit a decline in performance, limiting their usage as generic tools. The contribution of this paper is to propose a new network architecture that performs well on a variety of different speaker and speech domains. Our proposed model is composed of a shared encoder that gets as input a spectrogram and outputs a domain-invariant representation. Then, multiple decoders further process this representation, each responsible for predicting a different formant while considering the lower formant predictions. An advantage of our model is that it is based on heatmaps that generate a probability distribution over formant predictions. Results suggest that our proposed model better represents the signal over various domains and leads to better formant frequency tracking and estimation.
abstract_zh: 共振峰是人类声道声学共振产生的频谱最大值，其准确估计是最基本的语音处理问题之一。最近的工作表明，可以使用深度学习技术准确地估计这些频率。然而，当来自与他们接受训练的领域不同的领域的演讲时，这些方法表现出性能下降，限制了它们作为通用工具的使用。本文的贡献是提出了一种新的网络架构，该架构在各种不同的说话者和语音域上表现良好。我们提出的模型由一个共享编码器组成，该编码器获取频谱图作为输入并输出域不变表示。然后，多个解码器进一步处理该表示，每个解码器负责预测不同的共振峰，同时考虑较低的共振峰预测。我们模型的一个优点是它基于热图，可以生成共振峰预测的概率分布。结果表明，我们提出的模型更好地表示了各个域的信号，并导致更好的共振峰频率跟踪和估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率热图的共振峰估计与跟踪方法，通过共享编码器和多解码器结构提升跨领域语音处理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习共振峰估计方法在跨领域语音数据上表现下降，缺乏通用性，需设计适应多领域场景的模型架构。
AI.method: 构建包含共享编码器和多任务解码器的网络，编码器生成领域不变特征表示，解码器通过热图生成概率分布预测共振峰频率。
AI.result: 实验表明模型在不同说话人和语音领域均能保持稳定性能，显著优于传统方法的共振峰跟踪与估计效果。
AI.conclusion: 基于概率热图的跨领域架构有效解决了共振峰估计的通用性问题，为语音处理提供更鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Zi-En Fan,Feng Lian,Jia-Ni Quan
title: Global Sensing and Measurements Reuse for Image Compressed Sensing
title_zh: 图像压缩传感的全局传感和测量重用
abstract: Recently, deep network-based image compressed sensing methods achieved high reconstruction quality and reduced computational overhead compared with traditional methods. However, existing methods obtain measurements only from partial features in the network and use them only once for image reconstruction. They ignore there are low, mid, and high-level features in the network\cite{zeiler2014visualizing} and all of them are essential for high-quality reconstruction. Moreover, using measurements only once may not be enough for extracting richer information from measurements. To address these issues, we propose a novel Measurements Reuse Convolutional Compressed Sensing Network (MR-CCSNet) which employs Global Sensing Module (GSM) to collect all level features for achieving an efficient sensing and Measurements Reuse Block (MRB) to reuse measurements multiple times on multi-scale. Finally, experimental results on three benchmark datasets show that our model can significantly outperform state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Recently, deep network-based image compressed sensing methods achieved high reconstruction quality and reduced computational overhead compared with traditional methods. However, existing methods obtain measurements only from partial features in the network and use them only once for image reconstruction. They ignore there are low, mid, and high-level features in the network\cite{zeiler2014visualizing} and all of them are essential for high-quality reconstruction. Moreover, using measurements only once may not be enough for extracting richer information from measurements. To address these issues, we propose a novel Measurements Reuse Convolutional Compressed Sensing Network (MR-CCSNet) which employs Global Sensing Module (GSM) to collect all level features for achieving an efficient sensing and Measurements Reuse Block (MRB) to reuse measurements multiple times on multi-scale. Finally, experimental results on three benchmark datasets show that our model can significantly outperform state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 最近，与传统方法相比，基于深度网络的图像压缩感知方法实现了较高的重建质量并减少了计算开销。然而，现有方法仅从网络中的部分特征获取测量值，并且仅将它们用于图像重建一次。他们忽略了网络中的低、中、高级特征\cite{zeiler2014visualizing}，而所有这些特征对于高质量重建都是必不可少的。此外，仅使用一次测量可能不足以从测量中提取更丰富的信息。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的测量重用卷积压缩感知网络（MR-CCSNet），它采用全局传感模块（GSM）来收集所有级别的特征，以实现高效的传感和测量重用块（MRB）以在多尺度上多次重用测量。最后，三个基准数据集的实验结果表明，我们的模型可以显着优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于全局感知和测量复用的图像压缩感知网络MR-CCSNet，通过多尺度特征提取和测量复用提升图像重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有压缩感知方法仅利用网络部分特征且单次使用测量数据，未能充分利用低、中、高层特征及测量信息的多尺度潜力，导致重建质量受限。
AI.method: 设计全局感知模块（GSM）融合全层级特征，并引入测量复用块（MRB）在多尺度上重复利用测量数据以提取更丰富信息。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上实验表明，该模型显著优于现有最先进方法，重建质量大幅提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过全局特征感知与测量复用机制，MR-CCSNet有效提升了压缩感知的图像重建性能，为该领域提供新思路。

ai_content.result: 在三个基准数据集上实验表明，该模型显著优于现有最先进方法，重建质量大幅提升。
