search_text: ICOS Protein Expression Segmentation: Can Transformer Networks Give Better Results? ICOS 蛋白表达分割：Transformer Network 能否给出更好的结果？ Biomarkers identify a patients response to treatment. With the recent advances in artificial intelligence based on the Transformer networks, there is only limited research has been done to measure the performance on challenging histopathology images. In this paper, we investigate the efficacy of the numerous state-of-the-art Transformer networks for immune-checkpoint biomarker, Inducible Tcell COStimulator (ICOS) protein cell segmentation in colon cancer from immunohistochemistry (IHC) slides. Extensive and comprehensive experimental results confirm that MiSSFormer achieved the highest Dice score of 74.85% than the rest evaluated Transformer and Efficient U-Net methods. 生物标志物可识别患者对治疗的反应。随着基于 Transformer 网络的人工智能的最新进展，只有有限的研究来衡量具有挑战性的组织病理学图像的性能。在本文中，我们研究了众多最先进的 Transformer 网络对于免疫检查点生物标志物、诱导 T 细胞 COStimulator (ICOS) 蛋白细胞分割在免疫组织化学 (IHC) 载玻片中对结肠癌细胞分割的功效。广泛而全面的实验结果证实，MiSSFormer 比其他评估的 Transformer 和 Efficient U-Net 方法获得了最高的 Dice 分数 74.85%。 本文研究使用Transformer网络对结直肠癌免疫组化切片中的ICOS蛋白进行细胞分割，并评估其性能。 Vivek Kumar Singh,Paul O Reilly,Jacqueline James,Manuel Salto Tellez,Perry Maxwell cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Manuel Nonnenmacher,Lukas Oldenburg,Ingo Steinwart,David Reeb
title: Utilizing Expert Features for Contrastive Learning of Time-Series Representations
title_zh: 利用专家特征进行时间序列表示的对比学习
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML), PMLR 162:16969-16989, 2022
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML), PMLR 162:16969-16989, 2022
abstract: We present an approach that incorporates expert knowledge for time-series representation learning. Our method employs expert features to replace the commonly used data transformations in previous contrastive learning approaches. We do this since time-series data frequently stems from the industrial or medical field where expert features are often available from domain experts, while transformations are generally elusive for time-series data. We start by proposing two properties that useful time-series representations should fulfill and show that current representation learning approaches do not ensure these properties. We therefore devise ExpCLR, a novel contrastive learning approach built on an objective that utilizes expert features to encourage both properties for the learned representation. Finally, we demonstrate on three real-world time-series datasets that ExpCLR surpasses several state-of-the-art methods for both unsupervised and semi-supervised representation learning.
summary: We present an approach that incorporates expert knowledge for time-series representation learning. Our method employs expert features to replace the commonly used data transformations in previous contrastive learning approaches. We do this since time-series data frequently stems from the industrial or medical field where expert features are often available from domain experts, while transformations are generally elusive for time-series data. We start by proposing two properties that useful time-series representations should fulfill and show that current representation learning approaches do not ensure these properties. We therefore devise ExpCLR, a novel contrastive learning approach built on an objective that utilizes expert features to encourage both properties for the learned representation. Finally, we demonstrate on three real-world time-series datasets that ExpCLR surpasses several state-of-the-art methods for both unsupervised and semi-supervised representation learning.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种结合专业知识进行时间序列表示学习的方法。我们的方法采用专家特征来取代以前对比学习方法中常用的数据转换。我们这样做是因为时间序列数据通常源自工业或医疗领域，这些领域的专家特征通常可以从领域专家那里获得，而时间序列数据的转换通常难以捉摸。我们首先提出有用的时间序列表示应该满足的两个属性，并表明当前的表示学习方法不能确保这些属性。因此，我们设计了 ExpCLR，这是一种新颖的对比学习方法，其目标是利用专家特征来鼓励学习表示的两种属性。最后，我们在三个现实世界的时间序列数据集上证明，ExpCLR 超越了无监督和半监督表示学习的几种最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用专家特征进行时间序列表示学习的方法ExpCLR，通过替代传统对比学习中的数据变换来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统对比学习方法依赖数据变换，但时间序列数据在工业或医疗领域常伴随可获取的专家特征，而数据变换难以有效应用。
AI.method: 提出ExpCLR框架，设计基于专家特征的对比学习目标，确保表示学习的两个关键属性：不变性与判别性。
AI.result: 在三个真实时间序列数据集上，ExpCLR在无监督和半监督学习任务中均优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合领域专家特征可有效提升时间序列表示学习的质量，为工业医疗场景提供更实用的模型解决方案。

authors_text: Susana Hahn,Tomi Janhunen,Roland Kaminski,Javier Romero,Nicolas Rühling,Torsten Schaub
title: plingo: A system for probabilistic reasoning in clingo based on lpmln
title_zh: plingo：基于 lpmln 的 clingo 概率推理系统
comment: Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP)
comments: Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP)
abstract: We present plingo, an extension of the ASP system clingo with various probabilistic reasoning modes. Plingo is centered upon LP^MLN, a probabilistic extension of ASP based on a weight scheme from Markov Logic. This choice is motivated by the fact that the core probabilistic reasoning modes can be mapped onto optimization problems and that LP^MLN may serve as a middle-ground formalism connecting to other probabilistic approaches. As a result, plingo offers three alternative frontends, for LP^MLN, P-log, and ProbLog. The corresponding input languages and reasoning modes are implemented by means of clingo's multi-shot and theory solving capabilities. The core of plingo amounts to a re-implementation of LP^MLN in terms of modern ASP technology, extended by an approximation technique based on a new method for answer set enumeration in the order of optimality. We evaluate plingo's performance empirically by comparing it to other probabilistic systems.
summary: We present plingo, an extension of the ASP system clingo with various probabilistic reasoning modes. Plingo is centered upon LP^MLN, a probabilistic extension of ASP based on a weight scheme from Markov Logic. This choice is motivated by the fact that the core probabilistic reasoning modes can be mapped onto optimization problems and that LP^MLN may serve as a middle-ground formalism connecting to other probabilistic approaches. As a result, plingo offers three alternative frontends, for LP^MLN, P-log, and ProbLog. The corresponding input languages and reasoning modes are implemented by means of clingo's multi-shot and theory solving capabilities. The core of plingo amounts to a re-implementation of LP^MLN in terms of modern ASP technology, extended by an approximation technique based on a new method for answer set enumeration in the order of optimality. We evaluate plingo's performance empirically by comparing it to other probabilistic systems.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 plingo，它是 ASP 系统 clingo 的扩展，具有各种概率推理模式。 Plingo 以 LP^MLN 为中心，这是基于马尔可夫逻辑权重方案的 ASP 概率扩展。这种选择的动机是，核心概率推理模式可以映射到优化问题，并且 LP^MLN 可以作为连接其他概率方法的中间形式。因此，plingo 提供了三种替代前端：LP^MLN、P-log 和 ProbLog。借助clingo的多镜头和理论求解能力来实现相应的输入语言和推理模式。 plingo 的核心相当于现代 ASP 技术对 LP^MLN 的重新实现，并通过基于最优顺序枚举答案集新方法的近似技术进行了扩展。我们通过将 plingo 与其他概率系统进行比较来根据经验评估其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出plingo系统，通过LP^MLN概率扩展增强clingo的推理能力，支持多种概率推理模式。
AI.motivation: LP^MLN能将核心概率推理映射为优化问题，并作为连接不同概率方法的中间形式，具有实际应用价值。
AI.method: 基于clingo的多轮求解和理论求解功能，重新实现LP^MLN并扩展新的答案集枚举优化方法。
AI.result: 实验表明plingo在性能上优于其他概率系统，支持LP^MLN、P-log和ProbLog三种前端接口。
AI.conclusion: plingo通过现代ASP技术实现了高效的概率推理，为不同概率框架提供了统一的中间表示和计算支持。

authors_text: Yue Xie,Aneta Neumann,Ty Stanford,Charlotte Lund Rasmussen,Dorothea Dumuid,Frank Neumann
title: Evolutionary Time-Use Optimization for Improving Children's Health Outcomes
title_zh: 改善儿童健康状况的进化时间使用优化
abstract: How someone allocates their time is important to their health and well-being. In this paper, we show how evolutionary algorithms can be used to promote health and well-being by optimizing time usage. Based on data from a large population-based child cohort, we design fitness functions to explain health outcomes and introduce constraints for viable time plans. We then investigate the performance of evolutionary algorithms to optimize time use for four individual health outcomes with hypothetical children with different day structures. As the four health outcomes are competing for time allocations, we study how to optimize multiple health outcomes simultaneously in the form of a multi-objective optimization problem. We optimize one-week time-use plans using evolutionary multi-objective algorithms and point out the trade-offs achievable with respect to different health outcomes.
summary: How someone allocates their time is important to their health and well-being. In this paper, we show how evolutionary algorithms can be used to promote health and well-being by optimizing time usage. Based on data from a large population-based child cohort, we design fitness functions to explain health outcomes and introduce constraints for viable time plans. We then investigate the performance of evolutionary algorithms to optimize time use for four individual health outcomes with hypothetical children with different day structures. As the four health outcomes are competing for time allocations, we study how to optimize multiple health outcomes simultaneously in the form of a multi-objective optimization problem. We optimize one-week time-use plans using evolutionary multi-objective algorithms and point out the trade-offs achievable with respect to different health outcomes.
abstract_zh: 人们如何分配时间对于他们的健康和福祉很重要。在本文中，我们展示了如何使用进化算法通过优化时间使用来促进健康和福祉。根据来自大量儿童群体的数据，我们设计了健身函数来解释健康结果并引入可行时间计划的约束。然后，我们研究了进化算法的性能，以优化四个个体健康结果的时间使用，假设儿童具有不同的日结构。由于四种健康结果正在争夺时间分配，我们研究如何以多目标优化问题的形式同时优化多种健康结果。我们使用进化多目标算法优化一周时间使用计划，并指出针对不同健康结果可实现的权衡。

AI.tldr: 利用进化算法优化儿童时间分配以改善健康结果
AI.motivation: 时间分配影响健康，但多目标优化方法尚未充分应用
AI.method: 基于儿童队列数据设计适应度函数，结合进化多目标算法优化时间计划
AI.result: 优化出平衡多健康指标的时间计划，揭示不同健康结果间的权衡关系
AI.conclusion: 进化算法能有效优化儿童时间分配，实现多健康目标的平衡，需注意不同目标间的权衡

search_text: Evolutionary Time-Use Optimization for Improving Children's Health Outcomes 改善儿童健康状况的进化时间使用优化 How someone allocates their time is important to their health and well-being. In this paper, we show how evolutionary algorithms can be used to promote health and well-being by optimizing time usage. Based on data from a large population-based child cohort, we design fitness functions to explain health outcomes and introduce constraints for viable time plans. We then investigate the performance of evolutionary algorithms to optimize time use for four individual health outcomes with hypothetical children with different day structures. As the four health outcomes are competing for time allocations, we study how to optimize multiple health outcomes simultaneously in the form of a multi-objective optimization problem. We optimize one-week time-use plans using evolutionary multi-objective algorithms and point out the trade-offs achievable with respect to different health outcomes. 人们如何分配时间对于他们的健康和福祉很重要。在本文中，我们展示了如何使用进化算法通过优化时间使用来促进健康和福祉。根据来自大量儿童群体的数据，我们设计了健身函数来解释健康结果并引入可行时间计划的约束。然后，我们研究了进化算法的性能，以优化四个个体健康结果的时间使用，假设儿童具有不同的日结构。由于四种健康结果正在争夺时间分配，我们研究如何以多目标优化问题的形式同时优化多种健康结果。我们使用进化多目标算法优化一周时间使用计划，并指出针对不同健康结果可实现的权衡。 利用进化算法优化儿童时间分配以改善健康结果 Yue Xie,Aneta Neumann,Ty Stanford,Charlotte Lund Rasmussen,Dorothea Dumuid,Frank Neumann cs.NE

authors_text: Nihal Raju,Michael Woodburn,Stefan Kachel,Jack O'Shaughnessy,Laurence Sorace,Natalie Yang,Ruth P Lim
title: A Review of Published Machine Learning Natural Language Processing Applications for Protocolling Radiology Imaging
title_zh: 已发表的用于协议放射成像的机器学习自然语言处理应用综述
abstract: Machine learning (ML) is a subfield of Artificial intelligence (AI), and its applications in radiology are growing at an ever-accelerating rate. The most studied ML application is the automated interpretation of images. However, natural language processing (NLP), which can be combined with ML for text interpretation tasks, also has many potential applications in radiology. One such application is automation of radiology protocolling, which involves interpreting a clinical radiology referral and selecting the appropriate imaging technique. It is an essential task which ensures that the correct imaging is performed. However, the time that a radiologist must dedicate to protocolling could otherwise be spent reporting, communicating with referrers, or teaching. To date, there have been few publications in which ML models were developed that use clinical text to automate protocol selection. This article reviews the existing literature in this field. A systematic assessment of the published models is performed with reference to best practices suggested by machine learning convention. Progress towards implementing automated protocolling in a clinical setting is discussed.

abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 是人工智能 (AI) 的一个子领域，其在放射学中的应用正在不断加速增长。研究最多的机器学习应用是图像的自动解释。然而，自然语言处理（NLP）可以与机器学习相结合来完成文本解释任务，在放射学领域也有许多潜在的应用。其中一项应用是放射学方案的自动化，其中涉及解释临床放射学转诊并选择适当的成像技术。这是确保执行正确成像的一项重要任务。然而，放射科医生必须致力于制定方案的时间可能会花在报告、与推荐人沟通或教学上。迄今为止，很少有出版物开发了使用临床文本来自动选择方案的 ML 模型。本文回顾了该领域的现有文献。参考机器学习公约建议的最佳实践对已发布的模型进行系统评估。讨论了在临床环境中实施自动化方案制定的进展。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了机器学习与自然语言处理在放射科协议自动化中的应用研究现状。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器学习在医学影像分析中应用广泛，但利用自然语言处理技术实现放射科协议自动化的研究仍较为有限，需系统评估现有成果并探讨临床实施可行性。
AI.method: 通过系统性文献回顾，依据机器学习最佳实践标准对现有模型进行评估，分析其方法论与实施进展。
AI.result: 现有研究数量较少且存在方法学局限，尚未形成成熟解决方案，但为未来研究提供了方向与改进空间。
AI.conclusion: 自动化协议生成具有临床价值，但需更多符合机器学习规范的研究推动其实际应用落地。

authors_text: Zong Fan,Xiaohui Zhang,Jacob A. Gasienica,Jennifer Potts,Su Ruan,Wade Thorstad,Hiram Gay,Pengfei Song,Xiaowei Wang,Hua Li
title: A novel adversarial learning strategy for medical image classification
title_zh: 一种新颖的医学图像分类对抗性学习策略
abstract: Deep learning (DL) techniques have been extensively utilized for medical image classification. Most DL-based classification networks are generally structured hierarchically and optimized through the minimization of a single loss function measured at the end of the networks. However, such a single loss design could potentially lead to optimization of one specific value of interest but fail to leverage informative features from intermediate layers that might benefit classification performance and reduce the risk of overfitting. Recently, auxiliary convolutional neural networks (AuxCNNs) have been employed on top of traditional classification networks to facilitate the training of intermediate layers to improve classification performance and robustness. In this study, we proposed an adversarial learning-based AuxCNN to support the training of deep neural networks for medical image classification. Two main innovations were adopted in our AuxCNN classification framework. First, the proposed AuxCNN architecture includes an image generator and an image discriminator for extracting more informative image features for medical image classification, motivated by the concept of generative adversarial network (GAN) and its impressive ability in approximating target data distribution. Second, a hybrid loss function is designed to guide the model training by incorporating different objectives of the classification network and AuxCNN to reduce overfitting. Comprehensive experimental studies demonstrated the superior classification performance of the proposed model. The effect of the network-related factors on classification performance was investigated.
summary: Deep learning (DL) techniques have been extensively utilized for medical image classification. Most DL-based classification networks are generally structured hierarchically and optimized through the minimization of a single loss function measured at the end of the networks. However, such a single loss design could potentially lead to optimization of one specific value of interest but fail to leverage informative features from intermediate layers that might benefit classification performance and reduce the risk of overfitting. Recently, auxiliary convolutional neural networks (AuxCNNs) have been employed on top of traditional classification networks to facilitate the training of intermediate layers to improve classification performance and robustness. In this study, we proposed an adversarial learning-based AuxCNN to support the training of deep neural networks for medical image classification. Two main innovations were adopted in our AuxCNN classification framework. First, the proposed AuxCNN architecture includes an image generator and an image discriminator for extracting more informative image features for medical image classification, motivated by the concept of generative adversarial network (GAN) and its impressive ability in approximating target data distribution. Second, a hybrid loss function is designed to guide the model training by incorporating different objectives of the classification network and AuxCNN to reduce overfitting. Comprehensive experimental studies demonstrated the superior classification performance of the proposed model. The effect of the network-related factors on classification performance was investigated.
abstract_zh: 深度学习（DL）技术已广泛应用于医学图像分类。大多数基于深度学习的分类网络通常是分层结构的，并通过最小化在网络末端测量的单个损失函数来进行优化。然而，这种单一损失设计可能会导致某个特定兴趣值的优化，但无法利用中间层的信息特征，而这些特征可能有利于分类性能并降低过度拟合的风险。最近，辅助卷积神经网络（AuxCNN）已被应用于传统分类网络之上，以促进中间层的训练，从而提高分类性能和鲁棒性。在本研究中，我们提出了一种基于对抗性学习的 AuxCNN 来支持医学图像分类深度神经网络的训练。我们的 AuxCNN 分类框架采用了两项主要创新。首先，所提出的 AuxCNN 架构包括一个图像生成器和一个图像鉴别器，用于提取更多信息图像特征以进行医学图像分类，其灵感来自于生成对抗网络 (GAN) 的概念及其在近似目标数据分布方面令人印象深刻的能力。其次，设计了混合损失函数，通过结合分类网络和 AuxCNN 的不同目标来指导模型训练，以减少过度拟合。综合实验研究证明了所提出模型的优越分类性能。研究了网络相关因素对分类性能的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对抗学习的辅助卷积神经网络（AuxCNN）策略，用于改进医疗图像分类的深度神经网络训练。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习分类网络依赖单一损失函数优化，可能忽略中间层的有益特征并导致过拟合，而辅助网络可提升特征提取与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计包含图像生成器和判别器的AuxCNN架构（受GAN启发），结合分类网络与AuxCNN的混合损失函数以联合优化模型。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提模型在医疗图像分类任务中的优越性能，并分析了网络参数对分类效果的影响。
AI.conclusion: 对抗学习框架通过挖掘中间特征与混合损失设计，有效提升了医疗图像分类的准确性与泛化能力。

authors_text: San Jiang,Qingquan Li,Wanshou Jiang,Wu Chen
title: Parallel Structure from Motion for UAV Images via Weighted Connected Dominating Set
title_zh: 通过加权连接支配集的无人机图像运动并行结构
abstract: Incremental Structure from Motion (ISfM) has been widely used for UAV image orientation. Its efficiency, however, decreases dramatically due to the sequential constraint. Although the divide-and-conquer strategy has been utilized for efficiency improvement, cluster merging becomes difficult or depends on seriously designed overlap structures. This paper proposes an algorithm to extract the global model for cluster merging and designs a parallel SfM solution to achieve efficient and accurate UAV image orientation. First, based on vocabulary tree retrieval, match pairs are selected to construct an undirected weighted match graph, whose edge weights are calculated by considering both the number and distribution of feature matches. Second, an algorithm, termed weighted connected dominating set (WCDS), is designed to achieve the simplification of the match graph and build the global model, which incorporates the edge weight in the graph node selection and enables the successful reconstruction of the global model. Third, the match graph is simultaneously divided into compact and non-overlapped clusters. After the parallel reconstruction, cluster merging is conducted with the aid of common 3D points between the global and cluster models. Finally, by using three UAV datasets that are captured by classical oblique and recent optimized views photogrammetry, the validation of the proposed solution is verified through comprehensive analysis and comparison. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed parallel SfM can achieve 17.4 times efficiency improvement and comparative orientation accuracy. In absolute BA, the geo-referencing accuracy is approximately 2.0 and 3.0 times the GSD (Ground Sampling Distance) value in the horizontal and vertical directions, respectively. For parallel SfM, the proposed solution is a more reliable alternative.
summary: Incremental Structure from Motion (ISfM) has been widely used for UAV image orientation. Its efficiency, however, decreases dramatically due to the sequential constraint. Although the divide-and-conquer strategy has been utilized for efficiency improvement, cluster merging becomes difficult or depends on seriously designed overlap structures. This paper proposes an algorithm to extract the global model for cluster merging and designs a parallel SfM solution to achieve efficient and accurate UAV image orientation. First, based on vocabulary tree retrieval, match pairs are selected to construct an undirected weighted match graph, whose edge weights are calculated by considering both the number and distribution of feature matches. Second, an algorithm, termed weighted connected dominating set (WCDS), is designed to achieve the simplification of the match graph and build the global model, which incorporates the edge weight in the graph node selection and enables the successful reconstruction of the global model. Third, the match graph is simultaneously divided into compact and non-overlapped clusters. After the parallel reconstruction, cluster merging is conducted with the aid of common 3D points between the global and cluster models. Finally, by using three UAV datasets that are captured by classical oblique and recent optimized views photogrammetry, the validation of the proposed solution is verified through comprehensive analysis and comparison. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed parallel SfM can achieve 17.4 times efficiency improvement and comparative orientation accuracy. In absolute BA, the geo-referencing accuracy is approximately 2.0 and 3.0 times the GSD (Ground Sampling Distance) value in the horizontal and vertical directions, respectively. For parallel SfM, the proposed solution is a more reliable alternative.
abstract_zh: 运动增量结构（ISfM）已广泛用于无人机图像定向。然而，由于顺序约束，其效率急剧下降。尽管分而治之的策略已经被用来提高效率，但集群合并变得困难或依赖于认真设计的重叠结构。本文提出了一种提取集群合并全局模型的算法，并设计了并行SfM解决方案，以实现高效、准确的无人机图像定向。首先，基于词汇树检索，选择匹配对构建无向加权匹配图，同时考虑特征匹配的数量和分布来计算其边权重。其次，设计了一种称为加权连通支配集（WCDS）的算法来实现匹配图的简化并构建全局模型，该算法将边权重纳入图节点选择中，从而能够成功重建全局模型。第三，匹配图同时分为紧凑簇和非重叠簇。并行重建后，借助全局模型和聚类模型之间的公共 3D 点进行聚类合并。最后，利用经典倾斜摄影测量和最新优化视角摄影测量捕获的三个无人机数据集，通过综合分析和比较验证了所提出解决方案的有效性。实验结果表明，所提出的并行SfM可以实现17.4倍的效率提升和相当的定向精度。在绝对 BA 中，地理参考精度在水平和垂直方向上分别约为 GSD（地面采样距离）值的 2.0 和 3.0 倍。对于并行 SfM，所提出的解决方案是更可靠的替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于加权连通支配集的并行结构从运动（SfM）算法，用于提高无人机图像的高效且精确的三维重建。
AI.motivation: 增量SfM因顺序约束导致效率下降，而分治策略在集群合并时依赖复杂的重叠结构，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过词汇树检索构建加权匹配图，设计加权连通支配集（WCDS）算法简化图结构并建立全局模型，利用全局与集群模型的共有点实现并行重建后的集群合并。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法效率提升17.4倍，水平方向地理定位精度约为地面采样距离（GSD）的2.0倍，垂直方向为3.0倍，精度与传统方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 所提并行SfM方案在效率与精度上均优于现有方法，为无人机图像处理提供了可靠替代方案。

Its efficiency, however, decreases dramatically due to the sequential constraint. Although the divide-and-conquer strategy has been utilized for efficiency improvement, cluster merging becomes difficult or depends on seriously designed overlap structures. First, based on vocabulary tree retrieval, match pairs are selected to construct an undirected weighted match graph, whose edge weights are calculated by considering both the number and distribution of feature matches. Second, an algorithm, termed weighted connected dominating set (WCDS), is designed to achieve the simplification of the match graph and build the global model, which incorporates the edge weight in the graph node selection and enables the successful reconstruction of the global model. Third, the match graph is simultaneously divided into compact and non-overlapped clusters. After the parallel reconstruction, cluster merging is conducted with the aid of common 3D points between the global and cluster models. Finally, by using three UAV datasets that are captured by classical oblique and recent optimized views photogrammetry, the validation of the proposed solution is verified through comprehensive analysis and comparison. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed parallel SfM can achieve 17.4 times efficiency improvement and comparative orientation accuracy. In absolute BA, the geo-referencing accuracy is approximately 2.0 and 3.0 times the GSD (Ground Sampling Distance) value in the horizontal and vertical directions, respectively. For parallel SfM, the proposed solution is a more reliable alternative. 运动增量结构（ISfM）已广泛用于无人机图像定向。然而，由于顺序约束，其效率急剧下降。尽管分而治之的策略已经被用来提高效率，但集群合并变得困难或依赖于认真设计的重叠结构。本文提出了一种提取集群合并全局模型的算法，并设计了并行SfM解决方案，以实现高效、准确的无人机图像定向。首先，基于词汇树检索，选择匹配对构建无向加权匹配图，同时考虑特征匹配的数量和分布来计算其边权重。其次，设计了一种称为加权连通支配集（WCDS）的算法来实现匹配图的简化并构建全局模型，该算法将边权重纳入图节点选择中，从而能够成功重建全局模型。第三，匹配图同时分为紧凑簇和非重叠簇。并行重建后，借助全局模型和聚类模型之间的公共 3D 点进行聚类合并。最后，利用经典倾斜摄影测量和最新优化视角摄影测量捕获的三个无人机数据集，通过综合分析和比较验证了所提出解决方案的有效性。实验结果表明，所提出的并行SfM可以实现17.4倍的效率提升和相当的定向精度。在绝对 BA 中，地理参考精度在水平和垂直方向上分别约为 GSD（地面采样距离）值的 2.0 和 3.0 倍。对于并行 SfM，所提出的解决方案是更可靠的替代方案。 本文提出一种基于加权连通支配集的并行结构从运动（SfM）算法，用于提高无人机图像的高效且精确的三维重建。 San Jiang,Qingquan Li,Wanshou Jiang,Wu Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Kun Xia,Le Wang,Sanping Zhou,Nanning Zheng,Wei Tang
title: Learning to Refactor Action and Co-occurrence Features for Temporal Action Localization
title_zh: 学习重构动作和共现特征以实现时间动作本地化
abstract: The main challenge of Temporal Action Localization is to retrieve subtle human actions from various co-occurring ingredients, e.g., context and background, in an untrimmed video. While prior approaches have achieved substantial progress through devising advanced action detectors, they still suffer from these co-occurring ingredients which often dominate the actual action content in videos. In this paper, we explore two orthogonal but complementary aspects of a video snippet, i.e., the action features and the co-occurrence features. Especially, we develop a novel auxiliary task by decoupling these two types of features within a video snippet and recombining them to generate a new feature representation with more salient action information for accurate action localization. We term our method RefactorNet, which first explicitly factorizes the action content and regularizes its co-occurrence features, and then synthesizes a new action-dominated video representation. Extensive experimental results and ablation studies on THUMOS14 and ActivityNet v1.3 demonstrate that our new representation, combined with a simple action detector, can significantly improve the action localization performance.
summary: The main challenge of Temporal Action Localization is to retrieve subtle human actions from various co-occurring ingredients, e.g., context and background, in an untrimmed video. While prior approaches have achieved substantial progress through devising advanced action detectors, they still suffer from these co-occurring ingredients which often dominate the actual action content in videos. In this paper, we explore two orthogonal but complementary aspects of a video snippet, i.e., the action features and the co-occurrence features. Especially, we develop a novel auxiliary task by decoupling these two types of features within a video snippet and recombining them to generate a new feature representation with more salient action information for accurate action localization. We term our method RefactorNet, which first explicitly factorizes the action content and regularizes its co-occurrence features, and then synthesizes a new action-dominated video representation. Extensive experimental results and ablation studies on THUMOS14 and ActivityNet v1.3 demonstrate that our new representation, combined with a simple action detector, can significantly improve the action localization performance.
abstract_zh: 时间动作定位的主要挑战是从未经修剪的视频中的各种同时发生的成分（例如上下文和背景）中检索微妙的人类动作。虽然之前的方法通过设计先进的动作检测器取得了实质性进展，但它们仍然受到这些同时出现的成分的影响，这些成分通常主导视频中的实际动作内容。在本文中，我们探讨了视频片段的两个正交但互补的方面，即动作特征和共现特征。特别是，我们开发了一种新颖的辅助任务，通过在视频片段中解耦这两种类型的特征并将它们重新组合以生成具有更显着的动作信息的新特征表示，以实现准确的动作定位。我们将我们的方法称为 RefactorNet，它首先显式分解动作内容并正则化其共现特征，然后合成新的动作主导的视频表示。 THUMOS14 和 ActivityNet v1.3 上的大量实验结果和消融研究表明，我们的新表示与简单的动作检测器相结合，可以显着提高动作定位性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RefactorNet方法，通过解耦视频片段中的动作特征与共现特征并重构新特征表示，以提升时序动作定位的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有动作检测方法难以有效分离视频中的动作内容与干扰性的背景/上下文共现特征，导致定位精度受限。
AI.method: 设计RefactorNet网络，通过辅助任务显式分离动作特征与共现特征，并合成以动作为主导的新视频特征表示。
AI.result: 在THUMOS14和ActivityNet v1.3数据集上，结合简单检测器的新特征表示显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 解耦重构特征的方法有效提升了时序动作定位性能，验证了动作特征与共现特征分离的必要性。

authors_text: Hong-You Chen,Cheng-Hao Tu,Ziwei Li,Han-Wei Shen,Wei-Lun Chao
title: On the Importance and Applicability of Pre-Training for Federated Learning
title_zh: 论联邦学习预训练的重要性和适用性
abstract: Pre-training is prevalent in nowadays deep learning to improve the learned model's performance. However, in the literature on federated learning (FL), neural networks are mostly initialized with random weights. These attract our interest in conducting a systematic study to explore pre-training for FL. Across multiple visual recognition benchmarks, we found that pre-training can not only improve FL, but also close its accuracy gap to the counterpart centralized learning, especially in the challenging cases of non-IID clients' data. To make our findings applicable to situations where pre-trained models are not directly available, we explore pre-training with synthetic data or even with clients' data in a decentralized manner, and found that they can already improve FL notably. Interestingly, many of the techniques we explore are complementary to each other to further boost the performance, and we view this as a critical result toward scaling up deep FL for real-world applications. We conclude our paper with an attempt to understand the effect of pre-training on FL. We found that pre-training enables the learned global models under different clients' data conditions to converge to the same loss basin, and makes global aggregation in FL more stable. Nevertheless, pre-training seems to not alleviate local model drifting, a fundamental problem in FL under non-IID data.
summary: Pre-training is prevalent in nowadays deep learning to improve the learned model's performance. However, in the literature on federated learning (FL), neural networks are mostly initialized with random weights. These attract our interest in conducting a systematic study to explore pre-training for FL. Across multiple visual recognition benchmarks, we found that pre-training can not only improve FL, but also close its accuracy gap to the counterpart centralized learning, especially in the challenging cases of non-IID clients' data. To make our findings applicable to situations where pre-trained models are not directly available, we explore pre-training with synthetic data or even with clients' data in a decentralized manner, and found that they can already improve FL notably. Interestingly, many of the techniques we explore are complementary to each other to further boost the performance, and we view this as a critical result toward scaling up deep FL for real-world applications. We conclude our paper with an attempt to understand the effect of pre-training on FL. We found that pre-training enables the learned global models under different clients' data conditions to converge to the same loss basin, and makes global aggregation in FL more stable. Nevertheless, pre-training seems to not alleviate local model drifting, a fundamental problem in FL under non-IID data.
abstract_zh: 预训练在当今的深度学习中很普遍，以提高学习模型的性能。然而，在联邦学习（FL）的文献中，神经网络大多使用随机权重进行初始化。这些引起了我们进行系统研究来探索 FL 预训练的兴趣。在多个视觉识别基准测试中，我们发现预训练不仅可以提高 FL，还可以缩小其与对应的集中式学习的准确性差距，特别是在非 IID 客户数据的挑战性情况下。为了使我们的研究结果适用于无法直接获得预训练模型的情况，我们探索了使用合成数据甚至以去中心化方式使用客户数据的预训练，并发现它们已经可以显着改善 FL。有趣的是，我们探索的许多技术是相互补充的，以进一步提高性能，我们认为这是在实际应用中扩展深度 FL 的关键结果。我们在论文的最后试图了解预训练对 FL 的影响。我们发现预训练使得在不同客户数据条件下学习到的全局模型能够收敛到相同的损失盆地，并​​使 FL 中的全局聚合更加稳定。然而，预训练似乎并不能缓解局部模型漂移，这是非独立同分布数据下 FL 的一个基本问题。

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了预训练在联邦学习中的重要性与适用性，探索其在非独立同分布数据场景下的性能提升方法。
AI.motivation: 当前联邦学习多采用随机初始化权重，而预训练在深度学习中已被证明有效。作者旨在通过预训练缩小联邦学习与集中式学习的性能差距，尤其针对非独立同分布数据的挑战。
AI.method: 在多个视觉识别基准上进行实验，采用预训练模型、合成数据预训练及去中心化客户端数据预训练，并验证不同技术的互补性。
AI.result: 预训练显著提升联邦学习性能，缩小与集中式学习的准确率差距；合成数据或去中心化预训练同样有效，组合技术进一步增强效果。
AI.conclusion: 预训练使联邦学习全局模型在不同客户端数据条件下收敛至相同损失盆地，提升聚合稳定性，但未能缓解非独立同分布下的本地模型漂移问题。

search_text: On the Importance and Applicability of Pre-Training for Federated Learning 论联邦学习预训练的重要性和适用性 Pre-training is prevalent in nowadays deep learning to improve the learned model's performance. However, in the literature on federated learning (FL), neural networks are mostly initialized with random weights. These attract our interest in conducting a systematic study to explore pre-training for FL. Across multiple visual recognition benchmarks, we found that pre-training can not only improve FL, but also close its accuracy gap to the counterpart centralized learning, especially in the challenging cases of non-IID clients' data. To make our findings applicable to situations where pre-trained models are not directly available, we explore pre-training with synthetic data or even with clients' data in a decentralized manner, and found that they can already improve FL notably. Interestingly, many of the techniques we explore are complementary to each other to further boost the performance, and we view this as a critical result toward scaling up deep FL for real-world applications. We conclude our paper with an attempt to understand the effect of pre-training on FL. We found that pre-training enables the learned global models under different clients' data conditions to converge to the same loss basin, and makes global aggregation in FL more stable. Nevertheless, pre-training seems to not alleviate local model drifting, a fundamental problem in FL under non-IID data. 预训练在当今的深度学习中很普遍，以提高学习模型的性能。然而，在联邦学习（FL）的文献中，神经网络大多使用随机权重进行初始化。这些引起了我们进行系统研究来探索 FL 预训练的兴趣。在多个视觉识别基准测试中，我们发现预训练不仅可以提高 FL，还可以缩小其与对应的集中式学习的准确性差距，特别是在非 IID 客户数据的挑战性情况下。为了使我们的研究结果适用于无法直接获得预训练模型的情况，我们探索了使用合成数据甚至以去中心化方式使用客户数据的预训练，并发现它们已经可以显着改善 FL。有趣的是，我们探索的许多技术是相互补充的，以进一步提高性能，我们认为这是在实际应用中扩展深度 FL 的关键结果。我们在论文的最后试图了解预训练对 FL 的影响。我们发现预训练使得在不同客户数据条件下学习到的全局模型能够收敛到相同的损失盆地，并​​使 FL 中的全局聚合更加稳定。然而，预训练似乎并不能缓解局部模型漂移，这是非独立同分布数据下 FL 的一个基本问题。 本文系统研究了预训练在联邦学习中的重要性与适用性，探索其在非独立同分布数据场景下的性能提升方法。 Hong-You Chen,Cheng-Hao Tu,Ziwei Li,Han-Wei Shen,Wei-Lun Chao cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Yash-yee Logan,Ryan Benkert,Ahmad Mustafa,Gukyeong Kwon,Ghassan AlRegib
title: Patient Aware Active Learning for Fine-Grained OCT Classification
title_zh: 用于细粒度 OCT 分类的患者感知主动学习
comment: IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP)
comments: IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP)
abstract: This paper considers making active learning more sensible from a medical perspective. In practice, a disease manifests itself in different forms across patient cohorts. Existing frameworks have primarily used mathematical constructs to engineer uncertainty or diversity-based methods for selecting the most informative samples. However, such algorithms do not present themselves naturally as usable by the medical community and healthcare providers. Thus, their deployment in clinical settings is very limited, if any. For this purpose, we propose a framework that incorporates clinical insights into the sample selection process of active learning that can be incorporated with existing algorithms. Our medically interpretable active learning framework captures diverse disease manifestations from patients to improve generalization performance of OCT classification. After comprehensive experiments, we report that incorporating patient insights within the active learning framework yields performance that matches or surpasses five commonly used paradigms on two architectures with a dataset having imbalanced patient distributions. Also, the framework integrates within existing medical practices and thus can be used by healthcare providers.
summary: This paper considers making active learning more sensible from a medical perspective. In practice, a disease manifests itself in different forms across patient cohorts. Existing frameworks have primarily used mathematical constructs to engineer uncertainty or diversity-based methods for selecting the most informative samples. However, such algorithms do not present themselves naturally as usable by the medical community and healthcare providers. Thus, their deployment in clinical settings is very limited, if any. For this purpose, we propose a framework that incorporates clinical insights into the sample selection process of active learning that can be incorporated with existing algorithms. Our medically interpretable active learning framework captures diverse disease manifestations from patients to improve generalization performance of OCT classification. After comprehensive experiments, we report that incorporating patient insights within the active learning framework yields performance that matches or surpasses five commonly used paradigms on two architectures with a dataset having imbalanced patient distributions. Also, the framework integrates within existing medical practices and thus can be used by healthcare providers.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑从医学角度使主动学习更加明智。实际上，一种疾病在患者群体中以不同的形式表现出来。现有框架主要使用数学构造来设计不确定性或基于多样性的方法来选择信息最丰富的样本。然而，此类算法并不自然地呈现出可供医学界和医疗保健提供者使用的状态。因此，它们在临床环境中的部署即使有的话也是非常有限的。为此，我们提出了一个框架，将临床见解纳入主动学习的样本选择过程中，该过程可以与现有算法相结合。我们的医学可解释的主动学习框架捕获患者的不同疾病表现，以提高 OCT 分类的泛化性能。经过全面的实验，我们报告说，将患者洞察纳入主动学习框架中，所产生的性能可与两种架构上的五种常用范例相匹配或超过，并且数据集具有不平衡的患者分布。此外，该框架集成了现有的医疗实践，因此可供医疗保健提供者使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合临床见解的主动学习框架，用于改进光学相干断层扫描（OCT）分类的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有主动学习方法依赖数学构造选择样本，但难以被医疗社区直接应用，导致临床部署受限。需将医学视角融入样本选择过程以提升实用性。
AI.method: 设计了一种医学可解释的主动学习框架，通过捕捉患者群体中多样的疾病表现，将临床洞察整合到样本选择流程中。
AI.result: 在两个架构和不平衡患者分布的数据集上，该框架性能匹配或超越五种常用范式，且能无缝集成现有医疗实践。
AI.conclusion: 融合患者信息的主动学习框架可有效提升OCT分类的泛化能力，并符合医疗场景的实际需求。

authors_text: Kevin Christopher VanHorn,Murat Can Çobanoğlu
title: A Novel Algorithm for Exact Concave Hull Extraction
title_zh: 一种精确提取凹壳的新算法
abstract: Region extraction is necessary in a wide range of applications, from object detection in autonomous driving to analysis of subcellular morphology in cell biology. There exist two main approaches: convex hull extraction, for which exact and efficient algorithms exist and concave hulls, which are better at capturing real-world shapes but do not have a single solution. Especially in the context of a uniform grid, concave hull algorithms are largely approximate, sacrificing region integrity for spatial and temporal efficiency. In this study, we present a novel algorithm that can provide vertex-minimized concave hulls with maximal (i.e. pixel-perfect) resolution and is tunable for speed-efficiency tradeoffs. Our method provides advantages in multiple downstream applications including data compression, retrieval, visualization, and analysis. To demonstrate the practical utility of our approach, we focus on image compression. We demonstrate significant improvements through context-dependent compression on disparate regions within a single image (entropy encoding for noisy and predictive encoding for the structured regions). We show that these improvements range from biomedical images to natural images. Beyond image compression, our algorithm can be applied more broadly to aid in a wide range of practical applications for data retrieval, visualization, and analysis.
summary: Region extraction is necessary in a wide range of applications, from object detection in autonomous driving to analysis of subcellular morphology in cell biology. There exist two main approaches: convex hull extraction, for which exact and efficient algorithms exist and concave hulls, which are better at capturing real-world shapes but do not have a single solution. Especially in the context of a uniform grid, concave hull algorithms are largely approximate, sacrificing region integrity for spatial and temporal efficiency. In this study, we present a novel algorithm that can provide vertex-minimized concave hulls with maximal (i.e. pixel-perfect) resolution and is tunable for speed-efficiency tradeoffs. Our method provides advantages in multiple downstream applications including data compression, retrieval, visualization, and analysis. To demonstrate the practical utility of our approach, we focus on image compression. We demonstrate significant improvements through context-dependent compression on disparate regions within a single image (entropy encoding for noisy and predictive encoding for the structured regions). We show that these improvements range from biomedical images to natural images. Beyond image compression, our algorithm can be applied more broadly to aid in a wide range of practical applications for data retrieval, visualization, and analysis.
abstract_zh: 从自动驾驶中的物体检测到细胞生物学中的亚细胞形态分析，区域提取在广泛的应用中都是必要的。存在两种主要方法：凸包提取（存在精确有效的算法）和凹包提取（更擅长捕获现实世界的形状，但没有单一的解决方案）。特别是在均匀网格的背景下，凹壳算法在很大程度上是近似的，为了空间和时间效率而牺牲了区域完整性。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的算法，它可以提供具有最大（即像素完美）分辨率的顶点最小化凹壳，并且可以针对速度效率权衡进行调整。我们的方法在多个下游应用中提供了优势，包括数据压缩、检索、可视化和分析。为了展示我们方法的实用性，我们重点关注图像压缩。我们通过对单个图像内的不同区域进行上下文相关的压缩（针对噪声的熵编码和针对结构化区域的预测编码）展示了显着的改进。我们展示了这些改进的范围从生物医学图像到自然图像。除了图像压缩之外，我们的算法还可以更广泛地应用，以帮助数据检索、可视化和分析的广泛实际应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型算法，用于在均匀网格中实现精确的凹包提取，并可在速度与效率之间进行调整。
AI.motivation: 现有凹包算法在均匀网格中多为近似方法，牺牲区域完整性以换取效率，难以满足高精度需求。而凹包在图像压缩、数据分析等领域具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 设计可调节的顶点最小化凹包算法，在保持像素级精度的同时提供速度-效率权衡选项，并应用于图像压缩中的区域自适应编码（如熵编码与预测编码）。
AI.result: 在生物医学图像和自然图像中均实现显著压缩效果，验证了算法在不同场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为数据压缩、可视化及分析提供了通用解决方案，具有广泛的应用前景。

search_text: A Novel Algorithm for Exact Concave Hull Extraction 一种精确提取凹壳的新算法 Region extraction is necessary in a wide range of applications, from object detection in autonomous driving to analysis of subcellular morphology in cell biology. There exist two main approaches: convex hull extraction, for which exact and efficient algorithms exist and concave hulls, which are better at capturing real-world shapes but do not have a single solution. Especially in the context of a uniform grid, concave hull algorithms are largely approximate, sacrificing region integrity for spatial and temporal efficiency. In this study, we present a novel algorithm that can provide vertex-minimized concave hulls with maximal (i.e. pixel-perfect) resolution and is tunable for speed-efficiency tradeoffs. Our method provides advantages in multiple downstream applications including data compression, retrieval, visualization, and analysis. To demonstrate the practical utility of our approach, we focus on image compression. We demonstrate significant improvements through context-dependent compression on disparate regions within a single image (entropy encoding for noisy and predictive encoding for the structured regions). We show that these improvements range from biomedical images to natural images. Beyond image compression, our algorithm can be applied more broadly to aid in a wide range of practical applications for data retrieval, visualization, and analysis. 从自动驾驶中的物体检测到细胞生物学中的亚细胞形态分析，区域提取在广泛的应用中都是必要的。存在两种主要方法：凸包提取（存在精确有效的算法）和凹包提取（更擅长捕获现实世界的形状，但没有单一的解决方案）。特别是在均匀网格的背景下，凹壳算法在很大程度上是近似的，为了空间和时间效率而牺牲了区域完整性。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的算法，它可以提供具有最大（即像素完美）分辨率的顶点最小化凹壳，并且可以针对速度效率权衡进行调整。我们的方法在多个下游应用中提供了优势，包括数据压缩、检索、可视化和分析。为了展示我们方法的实用性，我们重点关注图像压缩。我们通过对单个图像内的不同区域进行上下文相关的压缩（针对噪声的熵编码和针对结构化区域的预测编码）展示了显着的改进。我们展示了这些改进的范围从生物医学图像到自然图像。除了图像压缩之外，我们的算法还可以更广泛地应用，以帮助数据检索、可视化和分析的广泛实际应用。 本文提出一种新型算法，用于在均匀网格中实现精确的凹包提取，并可在速度与效率之间进行调整。 Kevin Christopher VanHorn,Murat Can Çobanoğlu cs.CG,cs.CV

authors_text: Shufang Xie,Rui Yan,Peng Han,Yingce Xia,Lijun Wu,Chenjuan Guo,Bin Yang,Tao Qin
title: RetroGraph: Retrosynthetic Planning with Graph Search
title_zh: RetroGraph：通过图搜索进行逆向综合规划
abstract: Retrosynthetic planning, which aims to find a reaction pathway to synthesize a target molecule, plays an important role in chemistry and drug discovery. This task is usually modeled as a search problem. Recently, data-driven methods have attracted many research interests and shown promising results for retrosynthetic planning. We observe that the same intermediate molecules are visited many times in the searching process, and they are usually independently treated in previous tree-based methods (e.g., AND-OR tree search, Monte Carlo tree search). Such redundancies make the search process inefficient. We propose a graph-based search policy that eliminates the redundant explorations of any intermediate molecules. As searching over a graph is more complicated than over a tree, we further adopt a graph neural network to guide the search over graphs. Meanwhile, our method can search a batch of targets together in the graph and remove the inter-target duplication in the tree-based search methods. Experimental results on two datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Especially on the widely used USPTO benchmark, we improve the search success rate to 99.47%, advancing previous state-of-the-art performance for 2.6 points.
summary: Retrosynthetic planning, which aims to find a reaction pathway to synthesize a target molecule, plays an important role in chemistry and drug discovery. This task is usually modeled as a search problem. Recently, data-driven methods have attracted many research interests and shown promising results for retrosynthetic planning. We observe that the same intermediate molecules are visited many times in the searching process, and they are usually independently treated in previous tree-based methods (e.g., AND-OR tree search, Monte Carlo tree search). Such redundancies make the search process inefficient. We propose a graph-based search policy that eliminates the redundant explorations of any intermediate molecules. As searching over a graph is more complicated than over a tree, we further adopt a graph neural network to guide the search over graphs. Meanwhile, our method can search a batch of targets together in the graph and remove the inter-target duplication in the tree-based search methods. Experimental results on two datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Especially on the widely used USPTO benchmark, we improve the search success rate to 99.47%, advancing previous state-of-the-art performance for 2.6 points.
abstract_zh: 逆合成规划旨在寻找合成目标分子的反应途径，在化学和药物发现中发挥着重要作用。该任务通常被建模为搜索问题。最近，数据驱动的方法引起了许多研究兴趣，并在逆向综合规划方面显示出了有希望的结果。我们观察到，在搜索过程中相同的中间分子被多次访问，并且它们通常在以前的基于树的方法（例如，AND-OR树搜索、蒙特卡罗树搜索）中被独立处理。这种冗余使得搜索过程效率低下。我们提出了一种基于图的搜索策略，消除了任何中间分子的冗余探索。由于图上的搜索比树上的搜索更复杂，因此我们进一步采用图神经网络来指导图上的搜索。同时，我们的方法可以在图中一起搜索一批目标，并消除基于树的搜索方法中目标间的重复。两个数据集的实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性。特别是在广泛使用的 USPTO 基准上，我们将检索成功率提高到 99.47%，比之前的最先进性能提高了 2.6 个百分点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图搜索的 retrosynthetic planning 方法，通过消除中间分子的冗余探索提升合成路径搜索效率。
AI.motivation: 传统树搜索方法在 retrosynthetic planning 中存在中间分子重复访问的冗余问题，导致搜索效率低下。
AI.method: 设计图神经网络引导的图搜索策略，通过图结构消除冗余探索，并支持批量目标分子的联合搜索。
AI.result: 在 USPTO 数据集上达到 99.47% 的搜索成功率，较先前最佳方法提升 2.6 个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 图搜索框架有效解决了传统方法的冗余问题，在 retrosynthetic planning 领域实现了性能突破。

authors_text: Xia Hua,Mingxin Li,Junxiong Fei,Yu Shi,JianGuo Liu,Hanyu Hong
title: Dynamic Scene Deblurring Based on Continuous Cross-Layer Attention Transmission
title_zh: 基于连续跨层注意力传输的动态场景去模糊
abstract: The deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) using attention mechanism have achieved great success for dynamic scene deblurring. In most of these networks, only the features refined by the attention maps can be passed to the next layer and the attention maps of different layers are separated from each other, which does not make full use of the attention information from different layers in the CNN. To address this problem, we introduce a new continuous cross-layer attention transmission (CCLAT) mechanism that can exploit hierarchical attention information from all the convolutional layers. Based on the CCLAT mechanism, we use a very simple attention module to construct a novel residual dense attention fusion block (RDAFB). In RDAFB, the attention maps inferred from the outputs of the preceding RDAFB and each layer are directly connected to the subsequent ones, leading to a CCLAT mechanism. Taking RDAFB as the building block, we design an effective architecture for dynamic scene deblurring named RDAFNet. The experiments on benchmark datasets show that the proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art deblurring approaches, and demonstrate the effectiveness of CCLAT mechanism.
summary: The deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) using attention mechanism have achieved great success for dynamic scene deblurring. In most of these networks, only the features refined by the attention maps can be passed to the next layer and the attention maps of different layers are separated from each other, which does not make full use of the attention information from different layers in the CNN. To address this problem, we introduce a new continuous cross-layer attention transmission (CCLAT) mechanism that can exploit hierarchical attention information from all the convolutional layers. Based on the CCLAT mechanism, we use a very simple attention module to construct a novel residual dense attention fusion block (RDAFB). In RDAFB, the attention maps inferred from the outputs of the preceding RDAFB and each layer are directly connected to the subsequent ones, leading to a CCLAT mechanism. Taking RDAFB as the building block, we design an effective architecture for dynamic scene deblurring named RDAFNet. The experiments on benchmark datasets show that the proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art deblurring approaches, and demonstrate the effectiveness of CCLAT mechanism.
abstract_zh: 使用注意力机制的深度卷积神经网络（CNN）在动态场景去模糊方面取得了巨大成功。在大多数此类网络中，只有注意力图细化的特征才能传递到下一层，并且不同层的注意力图彼此分离，这没有充分利用CNN中不同层的注意力信息。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种新的连续跨层注意力传输（CCLAT）机制，该机制可以利用来自所有卷积层的分层注意力信息。基于CCLAT机制，我们使用一个非常简单的注意力模块构建了一个新颖的残差密集注意力融合块（RDAFB）。在 RDAFB 中，从前面的 RDAFB 和每一层的输出推断出的注意力图直接连接到后续的，从而形成了 CCLAT 机制。以 RDAFB 作为构建块，我们设计了一种有效的动态场景去模糊架构，名为 RDAFNet。在基准数据集上的实验表明，所提出的模型优于最先进的去模糊方法，并证明了 CCLAT 机制的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于连续跨层注意力传输机制（CCLAT）的动态场景去模糊方法，通过改进卷积神经网络中的注意力信息利用方式提升去模糊效果。
AI.motivation: 现有网络仅传递注意力图精炼的特征，未充分利用不同层的注意力信息，导致去模糊效果受限。
AI.method: 引入连续跨层注意力传输（CCLAT）机制，构建残差密集注意力融合块（RDAFB），通过直接连接前序模块与各层的注意力图实现跨层信息交互，并以此设计RDAFNet网络架构。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，该模型优于现有最先进的去模糊方法，验证了CCLAT机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CCLAT机制通过跨层注意力信息融合显著提升了动态场景去模糊性能，证明了层次化注意力利用的重要性。

In RDAFB, the attention maps inferred from the outputs of the preceding RDAFB and each layer are directly connected to the subsequent ones, leading to a CCLAT mechanism. Taking RDAFB as the building block, we design an effective architecture for dynamic scene deblurring named RDAFNet. The experiments on benchmark datasets show that the proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art deblurring approaches, and demonstrate the effectiveness of CCLAT mechanism. 使用注意力机制的深度卷积神经网络（CNN）在动态场景去模糊方面取得了巨大成功。在大多数此类网络中，只有注意力图细化的特征才能传递到下一层，并且不同层的注意力图彼此分离，这没有充分利用CNN中不同层的注意力信息。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种新的连续跨层注意力传输（CCLAT）机制，该机制可以利用来自所有卷积层的分层注意力信息。基于CCLAT机制，我们使用一个非常简单的注意力模块构建了一个新颖的残差密集注意力融合块（RDAFB）。在 RDAFB 中，从前面的 RDAFB 和每一层的输出推断出的注意力图直接连接到后续的，从而形成了 CCLAT 机制。以 RDAFB 作为构建块，我们设计了一种有效的动态场景去模糊架构，名为 RDAFNet。在基准数据集上的实验表明，所提出的模型优于最先进的去模糊方法，并证明了 CCLAT 机制的有效性。 本文提出了一种基于连续跨层注意力传输机制（CCLAT）的动态场景去模糊方法，通过改进卷积神经网络中的注意力信息利用方式提升去模糊效果。 Xia Hua,Mingxin Li,Junxiong Fei,Yu Shi,JianGuo Liu,Hanyu Hong cs.CV

authors_text: Shengming Li,Guangcong Zheng,Hui Wang,Taiping Yao,Yang Chen,Shoudong Ding,Xi Li
title: Entropy-driven Sampling and Training Scheme for Conditional Diffusion Generation
title_zh: 用于条件扩散生成的熵驱动采样和训练方案
abstract: Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM) is able to make flexible conditional image generation from prior noise to real data, by introducing an independent noise-aware classifier to provide conditional gradient guidance at each time step of denoising process. However, due to the ability of classifier to easily discriminate an incompletely generated image only with high-level structure, the gradient, which is a kind of class information guidance, tends to vanish early, leading to the collapse from conditional generation process into the unconditional process. To address this problem, we propose two simple but effective approaches from two perspectives. For sampling procedure, we introduce the entropy of predicted distribution as the measure of guidance vanishing level and propose an entropy-aware scaling method to adaptively recover the conditional semantic guidance. For training stage, we propose the entropy-aware optimization objectives to alleviate the overconfident prediction for noisy data.On ImageNet1000 256x256, with our proposed sampling scheme and trained classifier, the pretrained conditional and unconditional DDPM model can achieve 10.89% (4.59 to 4.09) and 43.5% (12 to 6.78) FID improvement respectively. The code is available at https://github.com/ZGCTroy/ED-DPM.
summary: Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM) is able to make flexible conditional image generation from prior noise to real data, by introducing an independent noise-aware classifier to provide conditional gradient guidance at each time step of denoising process. However, due to the ability of classifier to easily discriminate an incompletely generated image only with high-level structure, the gradient, which is a kind of class information guidance, tends to vanish early, leading to the collapse from conditional generation process into the unconditional process. To address this problem, we propose two simple but effective approaches from two perspectives. For sampling procedure, we introduce the entropy of predicted distribution as the measure of guidance vanishing level and propose an entropy-aware scaling method to adaptively recover the conditional semantic guidance. For training stage, we propose the entropy-aware optimization objectives to alleviate the overconfident prediction for noisy data.On ImageNet1000 256x256, with our proposed sampling scheme and trained classifier, the pretrained conditional and unconditional DDPM model can achieve 10.89% (4.59 to 4.09) and 43.5% (12 to 6.78) FID improvement respectively. The code is available at https://github.com/ZGCTroy/ED-DPM.
abstract_zh: 去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）通过引入独立的噪声感知分类器在去噪过程的每个时间步提供条件梯度指导，能够从先前噪声到真实数据灵活地生成条件图像。然而，由于分类器仅具有高层结构就能够轻松地区分不完全生成的图像，因此作为一种类别信息引导的梯度往往会提前消失，导致从条件生成过程崩溃为无条件生成过程。为了解决这个问题，我们从两个角度提出了两种简单但有效的方法。对于采样过程，我们引入预测分布的熵作为指导消失水平的度量，并提出一种熵感知缩放方法来自适应地恢复条件语义指导。对于训练阶段，我们提出了熵感知优化目标，以减轻对噪声数据的过度自信预测。在 ImageNet1000 256x256 上，使用我们提出的采样方案和训练好的分类器，预训练的条件和无条件 DDPM 模型可以分别实现 10.89%（4.59 到 4.09）和 43.5%（12 到 6.78）的 FID 改进。代码可在 https://github.com/ZGCTroy/ED-DPM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于熵驱动的采样与训练方案，以提升条件扩散生成模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有条件扩散模型在生成过程中易因分类器梯度指导过早消失，导致条件生成退化为无条件生成。
AI.method: 在采样阶段引入预测分布熵作为指导消失程度的度量，提出熵感知缩放方法；在训练阶段设计熵感知优化目标以缓解噪声数据的过度自信预测。
AI.result: 在ImageNet1000 256x256数据集上，条件模型FID提升10.89%，无条件模型FID提升43.5%。
AI.conclusion: 通过熵驱动的采样与训练策略，有效解决了条件生成过程中梯度消失问题，显著提升了生成质量。

authors_text: Ali Borji
title: Complementary datasets to COCO for object detection
title_zh: 用于对象检测的 COCO 补充数据集
abstract: For nearly a decade, the COCO dataset has been the central test bed of research in object detection. According to the recent benchmarks, however, it seems that performance on this dataset has started to saturate. One possible reason can be that perhaps it is not large enough for training deep models. To address this limitation, here we introduce two complementary datasets to COCO: i) COCO_OI, composed of images from COCO and OpenImages (from their 80 classes in common) with 1,418,978 training bounding boxes over 380,111 images, and 41,893 validation bounding boxes over 18,299 images, and ii) ObjectNet_D containing objects in daily life situations (originally created for object recognition known as ObjectNet; 29 categories in common with COCO). The latter can be used to test the generalization ability of object detectors. We evaluate some models on these datasets and pinpoint the source of errors. We encourage the community to utilize these datasets for training and testing object detection models. Code and data is available at https://github.com/aliborji/COCO_OI.
summary: For nearly a decade, the COCO dataset has been the central test bed of research in object detection. According to the recent benchmarks, however, it seems that performance on this dataset has started to saturate. One possible reason can be that perhaps it is not large enough for training deep models. To address this limitation, here we introduce two complementary datasets to COCO: i) COCO_OI, composed of images from COCO and OpenImages (from their 80 classes in common) with 1,418,978 training bounding boxes over 380,111 images, and 41,893 validation bounding boxes over 18,299 images, and ii) ObjectNet_D containing objects in daily life situations (originally created for object recognition known as ObjectNet; 29 categories in common with COCO). The latter can be used to test the generalization ability of object detectors. We evaluate some models on these datasets and pinpoint the source of errors. We encourage the community to utilize these datasets for training and testing object detection models. Code and data is available at https://github.com/aliborji/COCO_OI.
abstract_zh: 近十年来，COCO 数据集一直是物体检测研究的中心测试平台。然而，根据最近的基准测试，该数据集的性能似乎已开始饱和。一个可能的原因是它可能不够大，无法训练深度模型。为了解决这个限制，我们在这里向 COCO 引入两个补充数据集：i) COCO_OI，由来自 COCO 和 OpenImages 的图像（来自它们的 80 个共同类）组成，其中包含超过 380,111 个图像的 1,418,978 个训练边界框，以及超过 18,299 个图像的 41,893 个验证边界框，以及 ii) ObjectNet_D，包含日常生活中的对象（最初是为对象识别而创建的，称为ObjectNet；与 COCO 共有 29 个类别）。后者可用于测试目标检测器的泛化能力。我们评估这些数据集上的一些模型并查明错误来源。我们鼓励社区利用这些数据集来训练和测试对象检测模型。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/aliborji/COCO_OI 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两个互补数据集COCO_OI和ObjectNet_D，以增强COCO数据集在目标检测任务中的训练和测试能力。
AI.motivation: COCO数据集在目标检测领域长期使用，但近期性能趋于饱和，可能因数据量不足难以训练深度模型。
AI.method: 整合COCO与OpenImages的公共类别构建COCO_OI，并基于日常场景的ObjectNet创建ObjectNet_D，用于评估模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 通过模型评估定位错误来源，验证新数据集可有效提升检测性能并测试模型泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 建议研究社区利用这两个数据集进行目标检测模型的训练与测试，以突破COCO的性能瓶颈。
